35.1: Zaburuna Daud. E KAWASANA OPU, upobhaliakea manga mia mobhaliaku, tee upotimbeakea manga mia mopotimbeakaaku.
35.2: Kenia o katangkesi maidhiidhi tee katangkesi maogemu, tee ubhangumo utulungiaku!
35.3: Bhindumea o pandanga tee ndamumu to uewangi manga mia mopajereaku! Paumbaaku ande Ingkoomo mopasalaamatiaku!
35.4: Taroakamo manga mia bhemopekamateaku amaea tee apotibhaaka aebu. Taroakamo manga mia mohaejatiakana kadhaki to iaku asowo tee atopekaea.
35.5: Taroakamo manga incia mboo kulina bhae ikamburakana ngalu. Taroakamo manga incia apajerea malaaʼekatina KAWASANA OPU.
35.6: Taroakamo dhalana manga incia amalalanda tee amararo, tee manga incia apajerea malaaʼekatina KAWASANA OPU.
35.7: Roonamo manga incia ataa katapu to iaku inda tee alasana tee manga incia aseli kabhalongko to arakoaku inda tee sababuna.
35.8: Taroakamo manga incia abinasa i wakutuu inda inamunamuna, tee taroakamo manga incia apesua i nuncana katapu itaana karona. Taroakamo manga incia akotibu tee abinasa i nuncana.
35.9: Sumaimo kusambo-sambo roonamo KAWASANA OPU tee kukaunde-unde roonamo Incia apasalaamatiaku.
35.10: Tee mpuu-mpuuna incaku bhekupogau, "E KAWASANA OPU, Ingkoo inda tee kadhimbamu! Ingkoo upasalaamati manga mia malute wakutuuna manga mia makaa apisaki manga incia, Ingkoo ujagani manga mia malute tee momisikini minaaka i limana manga mia morampasia."
35.11: Manga mia madhaki adhawu kasakusiina to abhaliaku, tee araeakaaku kupewau manga giu inda imatauku.
35.12: Kalapeku manga incia abholosia tee kadhaki, ngangarandaku amaasi tee amate o akalaku.
35.13: Garaaka, wakutuuna manga incia amapii, iaku kupake kae kadhu to tandana ande incaku amaporo. Kusikisaa karoku tee kupoasa, tee kupatungku bhaaku wakutuuna kudoʼa.
35.14: Mboomo kudoʼaaka sabhangkaku atawa o witinaiku. Iaku kutungku kutangisi manga incia, mboomo mia mosukara motangisina mateana inana.
35.15: Maka wakutuuna kutosunu, manga incia amasanaa tee aele-eleaku. Manga incia aporomusaka abhaliaku, tee inda aunto-unto afitanaaku.
35.16: Mboomo manga mia munaafiki, manga incia aele-eleaku torosu tee apakiri-kiriakaaku ngincina.
35.17: E Kawasana Opu, sakawana naepia Ingkoo soo utonto-tontoaku? Pabebasia o inyawaku minaaka i kahumbunina manga incia, rambasakaaku minaaka i manga musuku mohumbuniaku mboomo manga singa mangura sumai!
35.18: Sapadhana upasalaamatiaku, iaku bhekusukuru i Ingkoo i tanga-tangana uumatimu, tee bhekupujiko i tanga-tangana mia bhari.
35.19: Bholi utaroakea manga mia amusuiaku inda tee sababuna akaunde-unde wakutuuna akamataaku kunarakaa, tee bholi utaroakea manga mia abanciaku inda tee sababuna tee apotawaikiaku wakutuuna kusukara.
35.20: Roonamo mencuana giu pomalape ipogauakana manga incia, maka manga incia apogauaka haejatina to apekagau to abhali manga mia mopomalapena i lipu sii.
35.21: Manga incia akakee-kee tee ahinaaku kasiimpo apogau, "Atumpu incamu, ingkami takamatamea ipewaumu!"
35.22: E KAWASANA OPU Ingkoo padhamo ukamatea. Bholimo soo utaroaka! E Kawasana Opu, bholimo umaridho minaaka i iaku.
35.23: Bhangumo uewaaka hakuku, tee parakaraku, e Aulataʼalaku Kawasana Opuku!
35.24: E KAWASANA OPU, e Aulataʼalaku, adiliaku upapokanea mboomo kabanaramu! Bholi utaroakea manga incia akaunde-unde wakutuuna akamataaku kunarakaa.
35.25: Bholi utaroakea manga incia apogau i nuncana ngangarandana, "Atumpu incamu, siitumo ipeelumami!" Bholi utaroakea manga incia apogau, "Padhamo tapahancurua!"
35.26: Taroakamo manga mia mokaunde-undena mokamataaku wakutuuna kunarakaa amembali amaea tee abingu. Taroakamo manga mia mosomboakana karona amaea tee apotibhaaka aebu.
35.27: Taroakamo asambo-sambo tee akaunde-unde manga mia gauna bheakamataaku kutopabanara! Taroakamo manga incia bheapogau, "Tapanamo kaoge o KAWASANA OPU! Incia akaunde-unde ande akamata dhadhina bhatuana amasanaa tee inda akakurangaaka opeopea!"
35.28: Sumaimo iaku bhekupakoleleaka kabanaramu, tee kupuji-pujiko saeoa.

36.1: To kapalana molaguna. Zaburuna Daud, o bhatuana KAWASANA OPU.
36.2: Dosa apamembali mia madhaki arango pogau inda momalape i nuncana ngangarandana. Mia incia sumai apogau i nuncana ngangarandana, "Iaku inda kufaraluu kumaeka tee Aulataʼala."
36.3: Roonamo incia awuju karona, tee afikiria ande o mia mosagaanana inda amataua o kasalahana, tee inda dhaangia mobancia.
36.4: Pogau ibhoasakana satotuuna o kadhaki tee kagau-gau, incia inda aʼaarifu tee inda apewau kalape.
36.5: Incia ahaejatiaka kadhaki i bhawona kolemana, sadiamo apewau inda momalapena, tee inda amendeu apewau kadhaki.
36.6: E KAWASANA OPU, kaasimu molagina akawa i laiana, tee kaparacaeamu akawa i taʼina ngalu.
36.7: Kabanaramu mboomo gunu momakaa, manga kambotumu mboomo andalaogena, E KAWASANA OPU, Ingkoomo modhambaakana maanusia tee binata.
36.8: Tapanamo kalape o kaasimu molagina, e KAWASANA OPU! Bhari-bharia maanusia ujagania i nuncana peulusana panimu.
36.9: Manga incia amambosu akande i Bhanuamu, tee atarima manga giu momalape mboomo o umala mosiwulu.
36.10: Ingkoomo asalana dhadhina bhari-bharia mahaluku, tee kainawamu mosuluwina dhadhimami.
36.11: Palausakea o kaasimu molagina i mia momatauko, tee kabanaramu i mia momakatena incana.
36.12: Bholi utaroakaaku ahumbuniaku mia mosombo, atawa apadhencuaku mia madhaki.
36.13: Kamatea, mia mopewauna kadhaki akotibumo, manga incia apolangkuri tee inda amembali abhangu pendua.

37.1: Zaburuna Daud. Bholi uʼamara roonamo o mia mopewauna kadhaki, bholi ugigibulu tee pande gau-gau roonamo opea ipotibhaakana,
37.2: roonamo manga incia bhealausaka amatuu mboomo rumpu, tee amalau mboomo penembula.
37.3: Paracaeamo i KAWASANA OPU, tee upewaumo momalapena, mbooremo i lipu sumai tee uʼamani.
37.4: Kaunde-undemo roonamo KAWASANA OPU sumaimo Incia bheadhawuakako opea ipeelumu.
37.5: Pasaraakaakea o dhadhimu i KAWASANA OPU tee uparacaeamo i Incia, sumaimo Incia bheatulungiko.
37.6: Incia bheapatiumba kabanaramu mboomo kainawa, tee o kaʼadilimu mboomo caheana matanaeo.
37.7: Tanangimo, bholi tee uuʼuumu i aroana KAWASANA OPU tee uantagimea. Bholi uʼamara tee mia momalapena dhawuana, atawa tee mia mopekagau.
37.8: Untomo uʼamara tee ubholimea opea ilumbuakana incamu. Untomo uʼamara, roonamo giu incia sumai bheaumbaaka kadhaki.
37.9: Satotuuna o mia mopewauna kadhaki bheatopabinasa, maka manga incia moharapuna i KAWASANA OPU bheapotibhaaka tana tinauraka ijanjiakana sumai.
37.10: Inda amangenge indamo bheadhaangia uka o mia madhaki. Wakutuuna upeeloa i tampana, indamo tee manga incia.
37.11: Maka o mia mopaporitambena karona bheakotinaurakaaka tana incia sumai, tee akaunde-unde aniʼimati kasanaa motaralabhi-labhi.
37.12: Mia madhaki ahaejati inda momalape i mia mobanara, tee apakiri-kiriakea tee ngincina.
37.13: Maka o Aulataʼala apotawaikia roonamo akamatea ande o eona amakasumo.
37.14: Manga mia madhaki ahela ewangana tee apasiapu panana to apekamate manga mia misikini tee manga mia monarakaa, tee apekamate manga mia momakatena incana.
37.15: Maka manga incia bheatobhoki badana karona, tee o panana manga incia bheatokatuki.
37.16: Saidhe o harataana mia mobanara alabhi o kalapena minaaka i mia madhaki mobharina harataana.
37.17: Roonamo o takiona mia madhaki bheatokatuki, maka o KAWASANA OPU bheajagani mia mobanara.
37.18: KAWASANA OPU ajagani dhadhina mia inda tee kasalahana, tinaurakana manga incia sadhaadhaa saʼumurua.
37.19: Manga incia inda bheamaea i wakutuuna kanarakaa, tee i wakutuuna kaara manga incia bheamambosu.
37.20: Maka o mia madhaki bheabinasa, tee manga musuna KAWASANA OPU bheamofu, mboomo kamba-kamba i tana mokorumpu. Manga incia bheamofu tee atopadha mboomo ombu.
37.21: Ande dhaangia iadhana mia madhaki, manga incia inda bheapambulia pendua opea iadhana sumai, maka o mia mobanara abukeaka kaasi tee sadia apekadhawu.
37.22: Satotuuna o mia ibarakatina KAWASANA OPU bheakotinaurakaaka tana ijanjiakana sumai, sainamo o mia itundana bheatopamofu.
37.23: KAWASANA OPU mosusuakana dhala mobanara, to mia momalapena feʼelina mopasanaana ngangarandana.
37.24: Moomini asindoli incia inda bheamandawu roonamo KAWASANA OPU atuko limana.
37.25: Pepuu minaaka kumangura sakawana kumancuana, indapo mina kukamata mia mobanara abholia KAWASANA OPU, atawa o siwuluna amembali pande pengkaemani.
37.26: Incia abukeaka kaasi tee sadia apekapaadha, tee manga anana amembali barakati to incia.
37.27: Bholia momadhakina tee upewaumo momalapena, sumaimo ingkoo bheusadhaadhaa umboore to saʼumurua.
37.28: Roonamo KAWASANA OPU amaasiaka pewau momalape tee moʼadili, tee inda abholi manga mia mosaalihi. Manga incia bheatojagani saʼumurua, maka o siwuluna mia madhaki bheatopamofu.
37.29: Mia mobanara bheakotinaurakaaka tana ijanjiakana sumai, tee amboore iwe sumai saʼumurua.
37.30: Mia mobanara o pogauna akohikimati, bhari-bharia ipogauakana aʼadili.
37.31: Hukumuna Aulataʼalana manga incia adhikaia i nuncana ngangarandana, tee o bhengkalana inda bheasindoli.
37.32: Mia madhaki amata-matai mia mobanara, tee ahaejati apekamatea.
37.33: Maka o KAWASANA OPU inda bheataroakea amandawu i limana musuna, atawa ataroakea atohukumu i wakutuuna atoʼadili.
37.34: Harapumo i KAWASANA OPU tee utaʼatia o parintana, sumaimo Incia bheaangkako to apamembaliko mokotinaurakaakana tana ijanjiakana sumai, tee ingkoo bheukamata manga mia madhaki atopamofu.
37.35: Saangu wakutuu kukamata mia madhaki mopisakina mia mosagaanana, dhadhina mboomo puuna kau motuwuna ajulu amaoge tee amaowo i lipuna,
37.36: maka sapadhana sumai incia amofu, tee indamo atokamata. Moomini kupeeloa, indamo kupotibhaakea.
37.37: Kamatea o mia inda tee kasalahana tee momakatena incana, roonamo manga mia modhadhina mopomalape bheakaunde-unde o siwuluna naile itu.
37.38: Maka o mia mokodosa bheapabinasea bhari-bharia, tee o siwuluna bheatopamofu.
37.39: KAWASANA OPU apasalaamati mia mobanara, tee ajagani manga incia i wakutuuna kaseke.
37.40: KAWASANA OPU atulungi tee apasalaamati manga incia; Incia apasalaamatia minaaka i manga mia madhaki, roonamo manga incia apeulu i KAWASANA OPU.

38.1: Zaburuna Daud. Zikiri i wakutuuna pasombaana kurubanina kaudhania.
38.2: E KAWASANA OPU, bholi uhukumuaku i nuncana amaramu, bholi usikisaaku i nuncana pamurumu.
38.3: Roonamo anana panamu atongke i badaku, tee o limamu amakaa abhebheaku.
38.4: Inda dhaangia o kalapena namisi i badaku roonamo pamurumu, inda amatangka manga bukuku roonamo dosaku.
38.5: Manga kasalahaku abhari alaloia o bhaaku, mboomo bhawa momatamo mpuu to iaku.
38.6: Manga kambelaku akobhou tee amabuto, roonamo o kabhongo-bhongoku.
38.7: Kapiiku amatamo mpuu, sabutuna inda amembali kukakaro. Saeoa kutangi mboomo mia momaporona incana.
38.8: Badaku amasodho roonamo amagari buluku, inda dhaangia kalapena namisi i badaku.
38.9: Tanagaku amapupumo sabutuna inda kunamisi opeopea, iaku kupekidhei roonamo alilaho ngangarandaku.
38.10: E Kawasana Opu, bhari-bharia pemeliliku atokamata i aroamu, tee peenciku inda kubuniakea minaaka i Ingkoo.
38.11: Randaku akabhaka-bhaka tee o tanagaku indamo dhaangia, mataku amarawumo.
38.12: Manga sabhangkaku indamo akasuiaku roonamo panyakiku, witinaiku apekaridho minaaka i iaku.
38.13: Manga mia bhemopekamateaku ataakaaku katapu, tee manga mia mohaejatiakana kadhaki to iaku apogauaka kahancuru. Manga incia afikiriaka tuaapa carana amembali ahianati mia mosagaanana saeoa.
38.14: Maka iaku mboomo mia mabhongo inda moporango, mboomo mia mobhea inda momembalina mopogau.
38.15: Atotuu, iaku mboomo mia inda moporango, rampaakanamo incia sumai inda kutagali.
38.16: Maka iaku kuharapu i Ingkoo, e KAWASANA OPU. E Kawasana Opu, e Aulataʼalaku, Ingkoomo bhemolawaniaku.
38.17: Iaku kupogau, "Ancosala manga incia akaunde-unde akamataaku kusukara, atawa asomboaka karona wakutuuna akamataaku kusindoli."
38.18: Iaku saidhepo kumandawu, tee atorotorosu kunamisi kapii.
38.19: Iaku kuʼakuia manga kasalahaku, tee kulilaho wakutuuna kufikiri manga dosaku.
38.20: Manga musuku amakaa tee abhari mpuu, manga incia abanciaku inda tee sababuna.
38.21: Manga mia abalasi kalapeku tee kadhaki, tee amembali bhaliku garaaka iaku kupewau giu momalape.
38.22: E KAWASANA OPU, bholi ubholiaku. E Aulataʼalaku, bholi upekaridho minaaka i iaku.
38.23: Tulungiaku pekadhei, e Kawasana Opu, mopasalaamatiaku.

39.1: To kapalana molaguna. To Yedutun. Zaburuna Daud.
39.2: Iaku kupogau, "Bhekupengkaanaka kujagani karoku mamudhaakana inda kukodosa tee dhelaku. Iaku bhekukoputi muncuku kangengena dhaangia tee mia madhaki i aroaku."
39.3: Iaku inda kupogau sampeampearo; pogau momalape uka inda kubhoasakea, maka o kanarakaaku ahanda amatamo,
39.4: ngangarandaku alilaho. Ahanda kufikiria, ahanda amasodho ngangarandaku; kasiimpo kupogau,
39.5: "E KAWASANA OPU, paumbaakaaku naepia akawa o ajalaku tee dhaangia pia eopo uka o dhadhiku mamudhaakana kumataua ande o umuruku amampodho!
39.6: Kamatea, tapanamo kampodho o umuru itantuakamu to iaku. Dhadhiku mboomo inda tee maʼanana i matamu. Bhari-bharia maanusia modhaangiana i dunia bheamofu sakijamata mboomo poinunca. Sela
39.7: Dhadhina maanusia mboomo ngkamia-mia! Ncia-nciamo maanusia moomini apepadhai tanaga, incia arombusaka o harataa wakutuuna dhaangiapo adhadhi, maka samatena, inda amataua incema bhemoniʼimatia."
39.8: "Sii-sii opea bheiantagiku, e Kawasana Opu? Ingkoomo iharapuku.
39.9: Rambasakaaku minaaka i bhari-bharia dosaku, tee bholi utaroakaaku aele-eleaku mia mokabhongo-bhongo.
39.10: Iaku inda kukosuara tee inda kubungkale ngangaku, roonamo Ingkoomo mohukumuaku.
39.11: Pekaridhoa o limamu to ubhebheaku, sababuna saidhepo kumate roonamo kahukumumu.
39.12: Ingkoo uadhari maanusia tee kahukumu roonamo kasalahana, Ingkoo mboomo ane upahancuru opea imaasiakamami. Bhari-bharia maanusia tangkanamo mboomo poinunca!" Sela
39.13: "E KAWASANA OPU, perangoia o doʼaku, tee utilikiaku wakutuuna kugora kuemani tulungi. Bholi inda umaheruakea ande kutangi, roonamo iaku sii mboomo samia dhaga moumbana i Ingkoo, mboomo bhari-bharia manga opu-opuaku.
39.14: Bholi ukamataaku tee pamurumu mamudhaakana amembali kupemboi pendua wakutuuna indapo kumate."

40.2: Iaku kuantagi tee kuharapu mpuu katulungina KAWASANA OPU, kasiimpo Incia atilikiaku tee aperangoi goraku.
40.3: Incia aangkaaku minaaka i bhalona karompa, minaaka i tomba momandala. Incia apaʼamaniaku i bhawona gunu bhatu tee apekatangka bhengkalaku.
40.4: Incia aadhariakaaku lagu bhaau, lagu kapujia to Aulataʼalata. Abhari o mia bhemokamatea, kasiimpo amaeka tee aparacaea i KAWASANA OPU.
40.5: Amasanaamo o mia moparacaeana i KAWASANA OPU, incia inda aose mia mosombo, atawa aose mia mosombana barahala.
40.6: E KAWASANA OPU, e Aulataʼalaku, abhari o giu inda momentela mopadhana ipewaumu tee ihaejatiakamu to ingkami! Inda dhaangia momembalina mopodhimbana tee Ingkoo! Iaku bhekupetulatulaakea tee kubhoasakea, maka abhari laulauna to kugagaria.
40.7: Ingkoo inda uemani mamudhaakana kudhawuakako kurubani itunu tee pasombaana giuna ikande, maka Ingkoo padhamo ubungkale talingaku. Kurubani itunu tee kurubani kahapusuana dosa inda utuntua.
40.8: Kasiimpo kupogau, "Kamatea, iaku kuumba, i nuncana kalulungina kitabi mopadhana motoburi tee momembalina i karoku.
40.9: Iaku gauku kupewau opea ipeelumu, e Aulataʼalaku, tee o hukumumu dhaangia i nuncana ngangarandaku."
40.10: Iaku padhamo kupakoleleaka kabanara i tampana poromusakaana uumatimu mobharina sumai. Kamatea, iaku inda kutaangi bhiwiku, e KAWASANA OPU, Ingkoo uka umataua!
40.11: Kabanaramu inda kubuniakea i nuncana ngangarandaku, iaku kupogauaka ande Ingkoo sadia ukeniaka pojanjiamu tee kupogauaka kasalaamati minaaka i Ingkoo. Kaasimu molagina tee kabanaramu inda kurahasiaakea i aroana poromusakaana uumatimu mobhari sumai.
40.12: E KAWASANA OPU, bholi utaangi rahumatimu to iaku, taroakamo o kaasimu molagina tee kabanaramu sadia ajaganiaku.
40.13: Roonamo abhari mpuu o balaa molibuaku. Iaku apajereaku manga dosaku tee inda kumembali kupokamata; kabharina alabhia o bulua i bhaaku, sabutuna amateakea akalaku.
40.14: E KAWASANA OPU, madheimo upasalaamatiaku, e KAWASANA OPU, madheimo utulungiaku!
40.15: Maasangia manga mia mohaejatina mopekamateaku amaea tee abingu. Maasangia manga mia mohaejatina to mopacilakaaku apalai tee apotibhaaka aebu.
40.16: Maasangia manga mia moele-eleaku atokidha roonamo manga incia amaea.
40.17: Taroakamo bhari-bharia mia mopeeloko amasanaa tee akaunde-unde, tee taroakamo bhari-bharia momaasiakana kasalaamati minaaka i Ingkoo sadia apogau, "Tapanamo kaogena o KAWASANA OPU!"
40.18: Iaku sii kunarakaa tee kumisikini, maka o Aulataʼala afaduliakaaku. Ingkoomo motulungiaku tee mopasalaamatiaku, E Aulataʼalaku, bholi upekanoe-noe, pekadheimo utulungiaku.

41.2: Amasanaamo mia mofaduliakana mia misikini! KAWASANA OPU bheapasalaamatia i wakutuuna anarakaa.
41.3: KAWASANA OPU bheajagania tee adhambaakea. Sabutuna manga mia bheasarongiakea amasanaamo i lipuna mbooresana, tee inda upasaraakaakea i manga musuna.
41.4: KAWASANA OPU bheatulungia i wakutuuna amapii, tee apauntoa minaaka i kapiina.
41.5: Iaku kupogau, "E KAWASANA OPU, maasiakaaku, pauntoa o panyakiku roonamo kukodosamo tee Ingkoo."
41.6: Manga musuku apogauakaaku madhaki, manga incia apogau, "Naepia incia bheamate mamudhaakana manga mia amalinguakea?"
41.7: Manga mia mosoloaku inda amakate o ngangarandana; manga incia apara-para afaduli tee agau-gau. Manga incia apeelo lele madhaki minaaka i iaku, kasiimpo alingka apetulatulaakea i dhala.
41.8: Bhari-bharia mobanciaku apokamuntuiakaaku, manga incia ahaejatiakaaku tee kadhaki.
41.9: Pogauna manga incia, "Kapiina ahanda mpuu, indamo bheamembali atopaunto."
41.10: Sampe moomini o sabhangkaku momakasuna iparacaeaku, mokandena rotiku, ambulimo abhaliaku.
41.11: Maka Ingkoo, e KAWASANA OPU, susuakaaku o kaasimu, tee pauntoaku minaaka i kapiiku, mamudhaakana amembali kubalasi kadhakina manga musuku.
41.12: Tee mboo sumai iaku kumataua ande Ingkoo umaasiakaaku roonamo o musuku inda amembali asambo-samboakaaku.
41.13: Ingkoo utulungiaku roonamo kakatena totona incaku, tee udhikaaku i saripimu saʼumurua.
41.14: Atopujimo KAWASANA OPU, Aulataʼala isombana miana Israel, sii-sii tee saʼumurua! Aamin!

42.1: To kapalana molaguna. Lagu kaadharina miana Korah.
42.2: Mboomo rusa apemeliliaka umala mokouwe, mboo sumai uka iaku kupemeliliaka Ingkoo, e Aulataʼala.
42.3: Iaku kufaraluu mpuu Aulataʼala, Aulataʼala modhadhi. Naepia amembali kupoaro tee kukamata Aulataʼala?
42.4: Malo eona kutangi, loluku amembali kinandeku. Saeoa o musuku aele-eleaku tee apogau, "Iapai o Aulataʼalamu?"
42.5: Giumo incia sii iudhaniku, wakutuuna kupetulatulaaka o antona ngangarandaku: Tuaapa i piamo itu kulingka kupobhawa tee mia bhari wakutuu taporope i bhanuana Aulataʼala, kuporiaroaaka dhala poose tasambo-sambo tee tasukuru i nuncana kariaa sumai.
42.6: Pokia ingkoo umaasi e ngangarandaku, tee ulilaho i nuncana badaku? Harapumo i Aulataʼala roonamo iaku uka bhekupuji Incia tee kasalaamati moumbana minaaka i aroana.
42.7: E Aulataʼalaku, ngangarandaku ahancuru i nuncana badaku, rampaakanamo sumai iaku bhekuudhaniko minaaka i lipuna Umala Yordan tee Gunu Hermon, tee minaaka i Gunu Mizar.
42.8: Andalaoge alawani andalaoge mosagaanana tee suarana momakaa o uwe momandawu minaaka i kalangaana. Bhari-bharia ewo tee solomu akangkanaiaku.
42.9: I wakutuuna aeo KAWASANA OPU aparintaaka kaasina molagina, tee i wakutuuna amalo iaku kulagu, siitumo saangu doʼa to Aulataʼala mopadhadhiaku.
42.10: Iaku kupogau tee Aulataʼala, gunu bhatuku, "Pokia umalinguakaaku? Pokia manga musuku apisakiaku sabutuna iaku sadiamo kusukara?
42.11: Mboomo katobhoki imateaka i nuncana bukuku, manga bhaliku aele-eleaku. Manga incia saeoa aabha, "Iapai o Aulataʼalamu?"
42.12: Pokia ingkoo umaasi, e ngangarandaku, pokia ulilaho i nuncana badaku? Harapumo i Aulataʼala roonamo iaku uka bhekupuji Incia, Aulataʼalaku mopasalaamatiaku.

43.1: E Aulataʼala, dhawuakumo kaʼadili, tee uewaaka parakaraku i aroana lipu modorohaka. Pabebasiaku minaaka i pande pekagau tee mia madhaki,
43.2: roonamo Ingkoomo Aulataʼala peulusaku. Pokia Ingkoo umendeuaku? Pokia iaku sadiamo kusukara roonamo kapisakina musu?
43.3: Lambokoa o kainawamu tee kabanaramu to akapalaikiaku tee abhawaaku i gunumu momangkilo, i tampana mbooresamu.
43.4: Sumaimo, iaku bhekulingka kuporope i tampa tunuana kurubani to Aulataʼala, iaku bhekupoaro i Aulataʼala, mopasanaaku tee mopaunde-undeaku. Iaku bhekupujiko tee kecapi, e Kawasana Opu, e Aulataʼalaku.
43.5: Pokia umaasi e ngangarandaku tee pokia ulilaho i nuncana badaku? Uharapumo i Aulataʼala roonamo iaku uka bhekupuji Incia, Aulataʼalaku mopasalaamatiaku.

44.1: To kapalana molaguna. Zaburuna miana Korah. Laguna kaadhari.
44.2: E Aulataʼala, ingkami padhamo tarangoa. Opu-opuamami padhamo manga petulatulaaka giu mopadhana ipewaumu i zamanina manga incia, siitumo i zamani mangenge.
44.3: Ingkoo upadhencu manga lipu mosagaanana tee limamu karomu, kasiimpo upamboore opu-opuamami to kabholosina manga incia. Ingkoo upahancuru manga lipu, maka utaroakea opu-opuamami ajulu o kabharina.
44.4: Manga incia inda apoewaangiakea to apotibhaaka tana incia sumai, mencuana tee limana manga incia imembaliakana akana, maka tee lima kaanamu tee kuasamu, tee caheana roumu roonamo Ingkoo umaasiaka manga incia.
44.5: E Aulataʼala, Ingkoomo Rajaku, mopamembalina miana Israel akana.
44.6: Tee kuasamu ingkami tapadhencu musumami, tee saromu, talandalandaki manga mia bhemoewangina ingkami.
44.7: Mencuana panaku itangkaakaku, hancuku uka inda apasalaamatiaku.
44.8: Maka Ingkoomo mopasalaamatina ingkami minaaka i bhalimami, tee upekaea manga mia mobancina ingkami.
44.9: Roonamo Aulataʼala, ingkami sadia talaguaka lagu kapujia, tee saromu, ingkami bhetasukuru saʼumurua. Sela
44.10: Maka sii-sii Ingkoo manga bholimo tee manga taroaka tamaea. Ingkoo indamo umaju uka upobhawa tee tantaramami.
44.11: Ingkoo manga taroaka tapalai minaaka i musumami, tee manga mia mobancina ingkami arampasi harataamami.
44.12: Ingkoo manga pasarakaaka mboomo dumba isumbele, tee manga papogaa-gaa i lipu mosagaanana.
44.13: Ingkoo uaso uumatimu inda tee haragaana i musuna to amembali bhatua, tee inda uala laba saidhe uka.
44.14: Ingkoo utaroaka ingkami mangahina manga lipu sarimbanuamami, tee tamembali kaele-elena manga mia i saripimami.
44.15: Utaroakea manga lipu apotawaiki ingkami. Manga incia alengko-lengko bhaana to ingkami.
44.17: roonamo kurango kaele-ele tee kahina minaaka i musumami tee manga mia modhikaakana bukuna incana tee ingkami.
44.18: Bhari-bharia sumai padhamo akangkanai ingkami maka ingkami inda tamalinguakako atawa tahianati janjimu tee ingkami.
44.19: Incamami inda abhalii minaaka i Ingkoo, tee ingkami inda tabholi o kaadharimu
44.20: moomini Ingkoo padhamo upahancuru ingkami i tampana serigala, tee udhika ingkami i nuncana kalalanda.
44.21: Ande ingkami tamalinguaka sarona Aulataʼalamami, atawa tadoʼa tee tasomba i Aulataʼala mosagaanana,
44.22: Aulataʼala dhaanamo bheamataua, satotuuna Incia amataua o rahasiana ngangarandamami!
44.23: Saeo-saeo ingkami taaro mate rampaakanamo taose tee tataʼati i Ingkoo, tee ingkami tatoabhi mboomo dumba isumbele.
44.24: E Aulataʼala, pewaumo. Pokia Ingkoo mboomo ukole? Pewaumo! Bholi manga umendeu saʼumurua.
44.25: Pokia Ingkoo ubuniaka karomu tee umalinguaka kanarakaa tee kapisakimami?
44.26: Ingkami takotibu i nuncana ngawu, tee o badamami akumbu i tana.
44.27: Pewaumo tee tulungimo ingkami! Roonamo kaasimu molagina, manga tolosi!

45.1: To kapalana molaguna. Aose lagu: Kamba-kamba Bakung. Zaburuna miana Korah. Laguna kaadhari; laguna kaasi.
45.2: Ngangarandaku abukeaka tee manga lagu makesa. Iaku bhekulaguaka laguku to raja, dhelaku mboomo folupenina samia juru tulisi momakidha.
45.3: Ingkoo momangadana i tanga-tangana umane, kalapemu atokamata minaaka i pogaumu, sababuna sumai Aulataʼala abarakatiko to saʼumurua.
45.4: Bhokea o ewangamu i tangamu, e raja mobarani, ingkoo momalangana tee momuliana!
45.5: I nuncana kamuliangimu sumai usawikimo karetamu tee ukanamo, to kabanara, sifatuna mia inda mosombo, tee kaʼadili! Taroakamo lima kaanamu akarajaa pewauna motomaeka.
45.6: Anana panamu amatadha, alosa i bhakena manga musumu, manga lipu akotibu i aroamu.
45.7: Kauncuramakamu, e Aulataʼala, sadhaadhaa torotorosu tee saʼumurua, tee o katukona pamarintamu satotuuna o katukona kabanara.
45.8: Ingkoo umaasiaka kabanara tee ubanci mia madhaki. Sababuna sumai, Kawasana Opumu, Aulataʼalamu, padhamo alantiko umembali raja tee apasanaako alabhi minaaka i raja mosagaanana.
45.9: Bhari-bharia pakeamu akobhou mina-mina mawondu mboomo polona damar, garu, tee asana. Ingkoo umasanaa urango suarana kecapi tee gambusu minaaka i maligemu motobhelokiakana gadhi.
45.10: I tanga-tangana manga bhawine molaianiko dhaangia tee manga bhawine o anana raja. I weta kaanamu akabhale-bhale o ratu mopakena kabheloki bulawa momalape minaaka i Ofir.
45.11: Perangoiaku pekalape, e kabuabua, kamatea tee utaaia o talingamu! Malinguakamea o lipumu tee bhanuana amamu.
45.12: Taroakamo o raja apeeluko roonamo umakesa! Incia o opumu, sujumo uhoromatia.
45.13: Raʼeatina kota Tirus bheabhawaakako pasombaa, tee manga mia morangkaea bheaʼusaha to aala-ala incamu.
45.14: Anana raja bhemokawina tee rajana Israel apesua i nuncana maligena, pakeana kabuabua sumai abukeaka kasokai bulawa.
45.15: Incia bheatoʼantara i raja tee pakea motosokai, apoose tee manga sabhangkana, siitumo manga kabuabua molaianina anana raja.
45.16: Manga incia atoʼantara tee asambo-sambo tee akaunde-unde, manga incia apesua i nuncana maligena raja.
45.17: E raja, manga anamu bheabholosi opu-opuamu, ingkoo bheuangkea manga to amembali kaogesa i saangua alamu.
45.18: Iaku bhekupewau saromu amaoge tee bhari-bharia ipewaumu audhania mia sii-sii sakawana i aaherati, sabutuna bhari-bharia lipu bheapuji-pujiko torosu saʼumurua.

46.1: To kapalana molaguna. Laguna miana Korah; alaguakea tee suara momalanga.
46.2: Aulataʼala sumai o tampana peulusata tee o kakaata. Incia sadia amakasu to manga tulungi i wakutuuna kaseke.
46.3: Sumaimo ingkita inda tamaeka, moomini o alamu akolendu, moomini manga gunu atondu i nuncana tawo,
46.4: tee moomini o tawo akomburu tee akobura tee manga gunu akohudha rampaakanamo akangkanaia ewona tawo sumai. Sela
46.5: Dhaangia manga siwuluana uwena umala aumbaaka kaunde-unde to raʼeatina kotana Aulataʼala, siitumo o tampa momangkilo, mbooresana Aulataʼala Momalanga.
46.6: Aulataʼala amboore i tanga-tangana kota sumai, sabutuna o kota sumai inda bheakohudha. Aulataʼala bheatulungia wakutuuna akawa raneeo.
46.7: Manga raʼeatina lipu atobungke tee manga pamarintana abagoea, rampaakanamo Incia aparangoaka suarana, alamu ahancuru.
46.8: KAWASANA OPU, kapalana saangua pasukana sorogaa, apoose tee ingkita, Aulataʼala isombana Yakub siitumo o kotana benteta. Sela
46.9: Mai, kamatea opea ikarajaana KAWASANA OPU, Incia apewau giu inda momentela i alamu!
46.10: Incia apaunto potimbea i saangua dunia, pana apahancurua tee pandanga akatukia, Incia atunu manga kareta potimbea tee waa.
46.11: Firimanina, "Untomo upoewangi, mataumea ande Iaku sii o Aulataʼala! Manga lipu bheapekalangaaku, tee saangua alamu bheamuliangiaku."
46.12: KAWASANA OPU, kapalana saangua pasukana sorogaa, apoose tee ingkita, Aulataʼala isombana Yakub siitumo kotana benteta. Sela

47.1: To kapalana molaguna. Zaburu minaaka i miana Korah.
47.2: E bhari-bharia lipu, pujimo Aulataʼala! Bhija-bhijamea o Aulataʼala tee usambo-sambomo.
47.3: Roonamo KAWASANA OPU Momalanga sumai atomaeka mpuu, Incia o raja maoge mokuasaina saangua alamu.
47.4: Incia apekatalo manga lipu tee adhawuakea i nuncana kuasata, tee manga lipu adhikaia i tambena aeta.
47.5: Incia mangapiliaka tana bhemomembalina tinauraka ibanggaakata saʼumurua. Ingkita o siwuluna Yakub, uumati imaasiakana. Sela
47.6: Wakutuuna Aulataʼala akompa i kauncuramakana, manga mia asambo-sambo tee akaunde-unde, tee atowiiakea sangkakala.
47.7: Laguakamea o lagu kapujia to Aulataʼala, laguakamea! Laguakamea o lagu kapujia to Rajata, laguakamea!
47.8: Roonamo Aulataʼala o Rajana saangua alamu, laguakamea o laguna kaadhari!
47.9: Aulataʼala satotuuna o Rajana bhari-bharia lipu, Incia amboore i bhawona kauncuramakana momangkilo.
47.10: Manga kapalana lipu aporomusaka to amembali uumatina Aulataʼala isombana Ibrahim. Roonamo bhari-bharia mokuasaina alamu sii atungku i Aulataʼala, Incia atomuliangi mpuu.

48.2: Tapanamo kaoge o KAWASANA OPU tee alaenga mpuu atopuji i kotana Aulataʼalata, i gununa momangkilo.
48.3: Amakesa amalanga, apasanaa mia i saangua alamu, siitumo o gunu Sion i weta i napa, kotana Raja Maoge!
48.4: I nuncana manga bentena Aulataʼala padhamo apatiumbaaka ande karona satotuuna o bente momakaa.
48.5: Kamatea, manga raja aporomusaka, manga incia amaju apobhawa-bhawa.
48.6: Sakamatana kotana Sion, manga incia amente; manga raja atokidha tee apalai roonamo amaeka.
48.7: Iwe sumai manga incia arengku roonamo amaeka, tee anamisi kapii mboomo bhawine bhemopalaahirina.
48.8: Tee garura Ingkoo upahancuru manga kapala maoge minaaka i Tarsis.
48.9: Mboomo mopadhana irangota, mboo siitumo uka ikamatata, i kotana KAWASANA OPUNA saangua alamu, i kotana Aulataʼalata, ipekatangkana Aulataʼala to saʼumurua. Sela
48.10: E Aulataʼala, ingkami taudhania o kaasimu molagina i nuncana Baitullamu momangkilo.
48.11: Mboomo saromu, e Aulataʼala, mboo siitumo o mia i saangua alamu amuliangiko. Ingkoo ukokuasa tee uʼadili.
48.12: Taroakamo raʼeatina Sion akaunde-unde, tee taroakamo manga anana bhawine Yuda asambo-sambo roonamo sadia uʼadili i wakutuuna uhaakimu mia.
48.13: Lingkamo uumatina Aulataʼala, tiingia o Sion, tee ubulilingia, tee ugagaria manga munarana.
48.14: Tilikia manga rindina, kamatea o bentena, mamudhaakana amembali upetulatulaakea i manga siwulumu.
48.15: Satotuuna o siimo Aulataʼala, Aulataʼalata abakaa; Incia bhemokapalaikina ingkita saʼumurua!

49.1: To kapalana molaguna. Zaburuna miana Korah.
49.2: Perangoia o giu incia sii, e bhari-bharia lipu, taaia o talingamiu e bhari-bharia raʼeatina dunia,
49.3: Malape o kaogesa atawa o mia maidhiidhi, mia morangkaea atawa o mia misikini!
49.4: Ngangaku bheabhoasaka manga pogau imembaliakamiu ubukeaka hikimati, tee ngangarandaku bheafikiri manga giu imembaliakamiu umakidha umaʼanaia.
49.5: Talingaku bhekubungkalea to kuperangoi manga kabhanti moʼaarifu, poose kumagasiaaka kecapi, bhekubhoasakea maʼanana o taataangkeku.
49.6: Iaku inda kufaraluu kumaeka i wakutuuna kaseke, wakutuuna kadhakina musuku alibuaku.
49.7: Manga incia mia motangkaakana harataana tee mosomboakana karangkaeana.
49.8: Satotuuna, inda samia uka momembalina mopasalaamatina karona samia, atawa apomea katolosina i Aulataʼala to apamembalia kabholosina inyawana
49.9: roonamo ponambona katolosina inyawana mia amaali mpuu, tee inda bheakawa moomini apomeaia tee opeapo uka
49.10: mamudhaakana incia amembali adhadhi saʼumurua tee inda bheakamata bhalona koburuna.
49.11: Maka satotuuna, incia bheakamata mia moʼaarifu uka bheamate, mboo sumai uka tee mia mokabhongo-bhongo tee mia mobhore; manga incia bheabholi harataana to mia mosagaanana.
49.12: Koburuna manga incia bheamembali bhanuana saʼumurua, mbooresana manga incia asadhaadhaa to saʼumurua, moomini manga incia dhaangia tee tanana karona.
49.13: Maka o maanusia moomini tee karangkaeana inda bheamembali adhadhi torosu. Maanusia apokana tee binata dhaanamo bheabinasa.
49.14: Mboo siimo dhawuana mia motangkaakana karona, tee ajalana manga mia momaasiakana pogauna karona. Sela
49.15: Aulataʼala apatotapuaka manga incia to amate mboomo dumba, manga incia awulua mboomo dumba apesua i bhalona koburu, manga incia bheasapo lausaka i nuncana koburu. Badana manga incia bheamabuto tee ahancuru, amaridho minaaka i bhanuana.
49.16: Maka o Aulataʼala bheatolosiaku minaaka i duniana mia mate roonamo Incia bheaalaaku minaaka iwe sumai. Sela
49.17: Bholi umaeka ande o mia mosagaanana amembali arangkaea, tee o harataana ahandamo abhari,
49.18: roonamo wakutuuna amate, incia inda amembali abhawa opeopeapo uka, tee o harataana inda bheasapo i koburu to apobhawa tee incia.
49.19: Moomini kangengena dhadhina incia aabhi karona atobarakati tee apuji-pujia mia roonamo akodhawua,
49.20: incia uka bheatutuni manga opu-opuana, momatena porikana i tampa momalalanda tee iwe sumai, indamo uka bheakamata kainawa pendua.
49.21: Maanusia morangkaea, maka inda amembali amaʼanai hikimati, amembali tapapokanea tee binata motopabinasa.

50.1: Zaburuna Asaf. KAWASANA OPU, Aulataʼala Mokokuasana Mpuu, afirimani tee agoraaka saangua alamu minaaka i timbu sakawana i bhara.
50.2: Minaaka i kota Sion momakesa mpuu, Aulataʼala apatiumba karona mboomo cahea.
50.3: Aulataʼalata aumba tee inda soo akatongo-tongo; waa imangauaka dhaangia i aroana, tee garura momakaa dhaangia i saripina.
50.4: Incia agoraaka laiana tee alamu to amembali sakusii wakutuuna aʼadili uumatina.
50.5: Firimanina, "Romusakaakaaku bhari-bharia uumatiku mosaalihi i aroaku, siitumo manga incia mopadhana mobokena pojanjia tee Iaku alaloi kurubani isumbele."
50.6: Laiana apakoleleaka kabanarana, roonamo o karona Aulataʼala moʼadilina uumatina. Sela
50.7: "Rangoa e uumatiku, Iaku bhekufirimani! E Israel, Iaku bhekumembali sakusii tee opea mopadhana ipewaumu, Iakumo o Kawasana Opu, Aulataʼalamu!
50.8: Mencuana rampaakanamo kurubani isumbelemu mbakana kuraeakako, atawa o kurubani tunuamu modhaangiana i aroaku.
50.9: Iaku kumendeu bhekutarima sapi umane minaaka i bhanuamu, atawa o bhembe umane minaaka i kandamu,
50.10: roonamo bhari-bharia binata maila i koo o pewauaku, tee uka bhari-bharia manga kadhambaaka modhaangiana i rewuna gunu.
50.11: Iaku kumataua bhari-bharia manu-manu modhaangiana i gunu, tee manga mahaluku modhadhi i nuncana koo o pewauaku.
50.12: Ande kumaara, inda afaraluu kupaumbaakako, roonamo alamu tee bhari-bharia antona o pewauaku.
50.13: Iaku inda kukande dagina sapi umane, inda uka kusumpu raana bhembe umane.
50.14: Sukurumo i Aulataʼala to amembali pasombaamu to Incia, tee upomeaia o tolauna onimu i KAWASANA OPU.
50.15: Goraakaaku i wakutuuna umaseke, Iaku bhekutulungiko, tee ingkoo bheumuliangiaku."
50.16: Maka to mia madhaki o KAWASANA OPU afirimani, "Inda tee faʼedana ingkoo usarongi hukumuku, tee upogauaka manga pojanjiaku.
50.17: Roonamo ingkoo umendeu utoudhaniaka, tee inda umaheruakea uka manga firimaniku.
50.18: Ande upokawa tee mia manako, ingkoo uposabhangkaakea, tee manga pande zina, ingkoo upooseakea.
50.19: Muncumu utaroakea abhoasaka manga pogau madhaki, tee o dhelamu sadia apekagau.
50.20: Ingkoo utorotorosu uraeaka tee upogauaka witinaimu karomu, tee ufitanaaia.
50.21: Mboo sumaimo ipewaumu, maka Iaku inda tee uuʼuuku, jadi ufikiria ande Iaku sii kupokana tee ingkoo. Maka sii-sii bhekuhukumuko, tee kubhawea o parakara incia sii i aroamu mamudhaakana umaʼanaia.
50.22: Kamatamea o giu incia sii, e ingkomiu momalinguakana Aulataʼala, kojagamo ancosala Kupabinasakomiu tee inda dhaangia mopasalaamatikomiu.
50.23: Incema mopasombaakana sukuru i Iaku mboomo kurubani, inciamo amuliangiaku; o mia modhadhina i nuncana kajujuru, Aulataʼala bhekususuakea kasalaamati to incia."

51.2: I wakutuuna Nabii Natan audhaniaka Raja Daud sapadhana incia apewau zinaa tee Batsyeba.
51.3: E Aulataʼala, maasiakaaku roonamo kaasimu molagina. Apokana tee rahumatimu momaoge, hapusumea manga dosaku!
51.4: Bhanuia tee pekangkiloa karoku minaaka i kasalahaku, tee pekangkiloaku minaaka i dosaku.
51.5: Roonamo kumataua manga kasalahaku, tee dosaku sadia kuudhania.
51.6: I Ingkoo, tangkanamo i Ingkoo kukodosa tee kupewau opea iabhimu amadhaki. Sabutuna ubanara i wakutuuna ufirimani ande kusala, tee uʼadili i wakutuuna uhukumuaku.
51.7: Satotuuna, kumadhaki pepuu mina kutopalaahiri, tee kukodosa minaaka i nuncana kadhuma.
51.8: Satotuuna, Ingkoo upeelu kabanara i nuncana baatini, tee Ingkoo uadhariakaaku hikimati i nuncana ngangarandaku.
51.9: Pekangkilomea o dosaku, sumaimo iaku bhekumangkilo, pekangkiloaku sumaimo bhekumembali maputi mpuu.
51.10: Taroakamo kurango lele kaunde-unde tee kasanaa, tee taroakamo manga bukuku ipahancurumu sii akaunde-unde pendua.
51.11: Tutubhia o roumu tee bholi ukamata manga giu madhaki ipewauku, tee uhapusumea bhari-bharia kasalahaku.
51.12: E Aulataʼala, padhaangiakaaku ngangaranda momangkilo, dhikaia o rohi mobhaau tee matangka i nuncana baatiniku.
51.13: Bholi ubhanakaaku minaaka i aroamu, tee bholi ualea o rohimu momangkilona.
51.14: Paunde-undeaku pendua roonamo kasalaamati minaaka i Ingkoo, tee dhawuaku ngangaranda morela to kutaʼati i Ingkoo.
51.15: Sumaimo, iaku bhekuadhariaka parintamu i manga mia mopewauna kasalaha, tee manga mia mokodosa bheambuli i Ingkoo.
51.16: Rambasakaaku minaaka i kasalaha roonamo kupekamate mia sagaanana, e Kawasana Opu, e Aulataʼala mopasalaamatiaku, tee bhekulaguaka roonamo kabanaramu.
51.17: E Aulataʼala, papogauaku, sumaimo iaku bhekupujiko!
51.18: Sumaimo Ingkoo inda upeelua kurubani isumbele. Moomini iaku kupasombaaka kurubani tunua, Ingkoo inda upeelua.
51.19: Satotuuna kurubani mopasanaana Aulataʼala sumai o rohi mohancuru. E Aulataʼala, ngangaranda mohancuru tee momapuro inda bheuhinaia.
51.20: Maasangia Ingkoo usanaa pewau malape i Sion, pakakaroa pendua rindina peulusa i sakaaratea kotana Yerusalem.
51.21: Sumaimo, bheupeelu utarimaia manga kurubani isumbele molaenga, siitumo kurubani pasombaa itunu tee kurubani pasombaa mototunu saangua, sumaimo mia bheapasombaaka manga sapi umane i bhawona tampana tunuana kurubanimu.

52.1: To kapalana molaguna. Lagu kaadharina Daud,
52.2: wakutuuna Doʼeg, miana Edom sumai, aumba apokawa tee Saul tee apaumbaaka ande o Daud akawamo i bhanuana Abimelekh.
52.3: E mia mobarani, pokia ingkoo usomboaka kadhakimiu? Kaasina Kawasana Opu sadhaadhaana to saʼumurua!
52.4: Saeo ingkoo uhaejati to upanarakaa mia sagaanana. Pogaumu amatadha mboomo piso motowinto, e mia pande pekagau!
52.5: Ingkoo ulabhi upeelu momadhakina tee inda upeelu momalapena, labhi upeelu kagau-gau minaaka i upogauaka kabanara. Sela
52.6: Ingkoo usanaa upekapii incana mia tee manga pogaumu, e pande pekagau!
52.7: Maka o Aulataʼala bheapahancuruko to saʼumurua. Incia bheasoroko tee apalimbako minaaka i mbooresamu, tee adhikako i nuncana duniana mia mate. Sela
52.8: Akamata incia sumai, mia mobanara bheamaeka tee amente, kasiimpo apotawaikiko,
52.9: Manga incia apogau, "Siitumo mia moindana moemanina peulusa i Kawasana Opu, tabeana soo atangkaaka karangkaeana motaralabhi-labhi, tee apahancuru mia mosagaanana to apekatangka karona."
52.10: Maka, iaku sii mboomo puuna zaitun mosuburu i nuncana bhanuana Aulataʼala. Iaku kuparacaea tee kaasina molagina Aulataʼala to saʼumurua.
52.11: Iaku sadiamo kusukuru i Ingkoo saʼumurua rampaakanamo opea ipewaumu. Iaku bhekuharapu i saromu i aroana manga mia mosaalihi sababuna saromu amalape.

53.1: To kapalana molaguna. Mboomo laguna kanarakaa. Lagu kaadharina Daud.
53.2: Mia mokabhongo-bhongo apogau i nuncana ngangarandana, "Inda dhaangia o Aulataʼala." Pewauna manga incia amadhaki tee atomarika, inda dhaangia mopewauna kalape.
53.3: Minaaka i sorogaa, Aulataʼala atonto anana maanusia, to akamata ara dhaangia o mia moʼaarifu, mopeelona Aulataʼala.
53.4: Bhari-bharia mia abholi dhala mobanara tee akarajaa giu momadhaki. Inda dhaangia mopewauna kalape, moomini samia uka.
53.5: Firimanina Aulataʼala, "Buaka apesua i akala, ande manga mia mopewauna kadhaki inda amatau giu momalape? Manga incia apekaoge karona tee akande uumatiku mboomo akande roti, tee inda adoʼa i Iaku."
53.6: Maka iwe sumai manga incia bheamaeka mpuu, garaaka inda dhaangia o giu imaeka! Sababuna Aulataʼala apekantale bukuna manga mia moewangiko. Ingkoo bheupekatalo tee upekaea manga incia, sababuna o Aulataʼala amendeu manga incia.
53.7: Maasangia o kasalaamati to miana Israel aumba minaaka i Sion, kotana Aulataʼala! Wakutuuna Aulataʼala apambuli kadhaangiana uumatina, siwuluna Yakub bheamasanaa o namisina tee o miana Israel bheakaunde-unde.

54.1: To kapalana molaguna. Tee kagasiana kecapi. Lagu kaadharina Daud
54.2: wakutuuna miana Zifi aumba apogauaka i Raja Saul, "Daud apeopo i ingkami."
54.3: E Aulataʼala pasalaamatiaku roonamo saromu, tee adilia parakaraku roonamo kakaamu.
54.4: Maasangia urangoa doʼaku, e Aulataʼala, rangoa manga pogau ibhoasakaku.
54.5: Manga mia momalangana incana akakaro aewangiaku, tee manga mia mosombo gauna bheaala inyawaku. Manga incia inda afaduliaka Aulataʼala. Sela
54.6: Satotuuna Aulataʼala motulungiaku, Kawasana Opu modhambaakaaku.
54.7: Taroakamo kadhaki ambuli akangkanai manga musuku. Roonamo kaasimu molagina, pabinasamea manga incia!
54.8: Tee relana totona incaku, iaku bhekupasombaaka kurubani to Ingkoo. Iaku bhekusukuru tee Ingkoo, e KAWASANA OPU, roonamo saromu amalape.
54.9: Roonamo Ingkoo padhamo urambasakaaku minaaka i sagala kanarakaa, sabutuna kukamata musuku amatalo.

55.1: To kapalana molaguna. Tee kagasiana kecapi. Lagu kaadharina Daud.
55.2: E Aulataʼala, perangoia o doʼaku, tee bholi inda ufaduliakea giu iemaniku.
55.3: Kamataaku tee tulungiaku! Kulilaho tee kupekidhei
55.4: roonamo kahandana musu tee roonamo kapisakina mia madhaki. Manga incia apanarakaaku, manga incia aʼamaraikiaku tee abanciaku.
55.6: Iaku kurengku tee kumaeka mpuu, kamingkiri akuasaiaku.
55.7: Iaku kupogau, "Ande kukopani mboomo manu-manu jarajara! Iaku bhekupolaka tee kupeelo tampa momalino.
55.8: Umbe, iaku bhekulingka maridho mpuu, tee kumboore i tana matuu. Sela
55.9: Iaku bhekupekadhei kupeelo tampa peulusaku minaaka i ngalu makaa tee garura."
55.10: E Kawasana Opu, upabingumea manga musuku tee upapogeso-gesomea pogauna, roonamo kukamata mia apewau kasega tee apogera i nuncana kota.
55.11: Malo eona manga incia apekatii-tii i bhawona rindina bente motiingina kota, tee i nuncana kota apewau kadhaki tee apanarakaa mia.
55.12: Manga incia apabinasa mia i tanga-tangana kota, i dhaoa manga incia sadhaadhaa apekapisaki tee apekatipu.
55.13: Ande o musuku abanciaku, amembali kukapoia, ande o bhaliku ahinaaku amembali kupekaridho.
55.14: Maka ingkoo mboomo samia witinaiku! Sabhangkaku! Sampomatauku malape!
55.15: I piamo itu ingkita taposabhangka malape, tee tapobhawa-bhawa talingka i bhanuana Aulataʼala i tanga-tangana mia bhari!
55.16: Taroakamo manga musuku amate inda atomatau, tee asapo akadhadhi-dhadhi i duniana mia mate, roonamo kadhaki dhaangia i mbooresana tee i tanga-tangana manga incia.
55.17: Maka iaku bhekugora i Aulataʼala, tee KAWASANA OPU bheapasalaamatiaku.
55.18: Wakutuuna konowia, saeona, tee pontanga eo, kupeenci tee kupekidhei, tee Incia uka bhearango suaraku.
55.19: Incia bheatolosiaku minaaka i musu mobhaliaku, roonamo abhari mia moewangiaku.
55.20: Aulataʼala, mokokauncuramakana pepuu i zamani i piamo itu, bhearangoa doʼaku tee apekatalo manga incia, roonamo manga incia amendeu atoba tee inda amaeka i Aulataʼala. Sela
55.21: Mia mopadhana kuabhia witinaiku incia sumai apacilaka sabhangkana, tee incia inda akeniakea janjina.
55.22: Bhoasakana amaʼalusu mpuu to aala-ala inca, maka neatina to apacilaka mia. Pogauna amararo alabhi minaaka i mina, maka satotuuna bhari-bharia sumai mboomo ewanga momatadha.
55.23: Pasarakaakamea o bhawamu i KAWASANA OPU, sumaimo Incia bheadhambaakako, tee inda bheataroaka mia mobanara abagoea saʼumurua.
55.24: Maka Ingkoo, e Aulataʼala, bheupapesua manga incia i nuncana kabhalongko momandalana mpuu. Manga pande pekamate tee pande pekagau inda bheakawa samuntanga umuruna. Maka, iaku kuparacaea i Ingkoo.

56.1: To kapalana molaguna. Mboomo lagu: Manu-manu jarajara mopopoteona i puuna kau tarbantin momaridho. Zaburuna Daud wakutuuna miana Filistin arako incia i Gat.
56.2: E Kawasana Opu, maasiakaaku roonamo manga mia alanda-landakiaku tee saeoa apisakiaku.
56.3: Manga musuku sadia alanda-landakiaku, abhari mia moewangiaku, e Aulataʼala Momalanga!
56.4: I wakutuuna kumaeka, kuparacaea i Ingkoo.
56.5: Iaku kupuji firimanina Aulataʼala, tee kuparacaea i Aulataʼala, siitumo inda bhekumaeka. Opea momembalina ipewauna maanusia to iaku? Inda dhaangia!
56.6: Saeoa musuku apatiipambuli pogauku, bhari-bharia haejatina manga incia to iaku amadhaki.
56.7: Manga incia aporomusaka tee apeopo, alukuti bhengkalaku, tee ahaejati apekamateaku.
56.8: Balasia manga incia to kadhakina ipewauna; e Kawasana Opu, patobhatamea manga lipu tee amaramu!
56.9: Ingkoo umataua saopea kabharina kanarakaaku, Udhika loluku i nuncana butolomu. Buaka bhari-bharia dhaangia i nuncana kitabimu?
56.10: Sumaimo manga musuku bheasowo i wakutuuna kugora. Tee mboo sumai, kumataua ande Aulataʼala aewaakaaku.
56.11: Iaku kupogauaka kalape to KAWASANA OPU tee kupuji firimanina, roonamo Aulataʼala adhawu janji momalape.
56.12: Iaku kuparacaea i Incia, siitumo iaku inda bhekumaeka. Opea momembalina ipewauna maanusia to iaku?
56.13: E Aulataʼala, kuwaajibu bhekupewaua tolauna oniku tee Ingkoo, bhekupasombaaka kurubani kasukuru i Ingkoo.
56.14: Sababuna Ingkoo upasalaamatiaku minaaka i mate, tee ujaganiaku sabutuna inda kutosunu. Tee mboo sumai, iaku kumembali kulingka i aroana Aulataʼala i nuncana kainawana dhadhi.

57.1: To kapalana molaguna. Mboomo lagu: Bholi upahancuru. Zaburuna Daud, wakutuuna incia apalaiaka Saul tee aopo i nuncana lia.
57.2: Maasiakaaku, e Aulataʼala, maasiakaaku, roonamo i Ingkoomo kupeulu. I tambena panimu iaku kupeulu, sakawana garura sumai aunto.
57.3: Iaku kudoʼa kuemani tulungi i Aulataʼala Momalanga, Aulataʼala apamondo ihaejatiakana to dhadhiku.
57.4: Maasangia Incia bhealawaniaku minaaka i sorogaa tee apasalaamatiaku, Incia bheapaʼaebu manga mia molanda-landakiaku. Sela Aulataʼala alamboko kaasina molagina tee inda bheamabhotu janjina tee iaku saʼumurua.
57.5: Iaku kudhaangia i tanga-tangana musu, manga incia mboomo singa mobhembaruna maanusia. Ngincina amatadha mboomo pandanga tee anana pana, tee dhelana mboomo ewanga momatadha.
57.6: E Aulataʼala, susuakea kaogesamu i laiana tee kamuliangimu i saangua alamu.
57.7: Manga musuku ataa katapu to iaku, sakawana amate akalaku. Manga incia aseli kabhalongko i aroaku to apacilakaaku, maka o karona manga mokotibuna. Sela
57.8: Ngangarandaku amatangka, e Aulataʼala, ngangarandaku amatangka. Gauku bhekulaguaka lagu kapujia to Ingkoo.
57.9: Iaku bhekubhangu tee kumagasiaaka gambusu tee kecapi! Iaku bhekubhangu raneeooge!
57.10: Iaku bhekusukuru i Ingkoo i tanga-tangana manga lipu, e Kawasana Opu, tee kulaguaka manga lagu kapujia.
57.11: Sababuna kaasimu molagina amaoge akawa i laiana, tee kabanaramu akawa i taʼina ngalu.
57.12: E Aulataʼala, susuakea kaogesamu i laiana, tee kamuliangimu i saangua alamu.

58.1: To kapalana molaguna. Mboomo lagu: Bholi upahancuru. Zaburuna Daud.
58.2: E manga mia mokokuasa, atotuu buaka udhawu kambotu mobanara? Buaka ujujuru i wakutuuna uʼadili maanusia?
58.3: Inda, uhaejatiaka momadhakina i nuncana ngangarandamiu, tee upewau kasega tee limamiu i bhawona alamu.
58.4: Mia madhaki asaladhala pepuu minaaka alaahiri, tee agau-gau minaaka i nuncana kadhuma.
58.5: Manga incia mboomo ulo mokobisa tee mboomo ulo momabhongo momendeuna morango
58.6: sabutuna inda arango suarana pande parikana ulo, moomini suarana pande baca doʼa moʼahalii.
58.7: E Aulataʼala, upahancurumea o ngincina i nuncana ngangana. Hobutimea nginci mantoana manga singa mangura, e KAWASANA OPU!
58.8: Taroakamo manga incia aila mboomo uwe motobusaka kasiimpo indamo atokamata. Wakutuuna manga incia ahela panana, o panana manga amembalimo amakundu.
58.9: Taroakamo manga incia mboomo bhiku morere amembali nggalanggala, mboomo rahasia momatena i nuncana kadhuma tee indapo akamata matana eo.
58.10: Indapo asadaria, manga incia abinasamo, ibaratina mboomo rumpu mokorui momaijo tee indapo amaoge, maka aporikanamo atowiia ngalu tee apolakaakea mboomo penembulana momalau. Amarana Kawasana Opu bheakangkanaia i wakutuuna manga incia dhaangiapo adhadhi.
58.11: Mia mobanara bheakaunde-unde wakutuuna manga incia akamata kabalasina to mia madhaki, tee abhanui aena tee raana manga incia.
58.12: Mia bheapogau, "Totuu dhaangia fahala to mia mobanara! Satotuuna, Aulataʼala modhawuna kaʼadili i alamu!"

59.1: To kapalana molaguna. Mboomo lagu: Bholi upahancuru. Zaburuna Daud, siitumo wakutuuna Raja Saul atumpu mia to alibu bhanuana Daud tee ahaejati to apekamatea.
59.2: E Aulataʼalaku, rambasakaaku minaaka i manga musuku, jaganiaku minaaka i manga mia moewangiaku.
59.3: Rambasakaaku minaaka i manga mia mopewauna kadhaki, tee pasalaamatiaku minaaka i pande pekamatena mia.
59.4: Kamatea, manga incia aopo tee aantagiaku kulalo mamudhaakana amembali apekamateaku, manga mia makaa aporomusaka to aewangiaku, garaaka iaku inda kupewau kasalaha, tee uka inda kupewau dosa, e KAWASANA OPU.
59.5: Moomini inda dhaangia o kasalahaku, manga incia abuntuli tee amakanu aewangiaku. Bhangumo, upokawaakaaku tee ukamata kadhaangiaku!
59.6: E KAWASANA OPU, Ingkoo Aulataʼalana saangua alamu isombana miana Israel. Maasangia ubhangumo to uhukumu bhari-bharia lipu! Bholi umaasi i bhari-bharia mia mopewauna kadhaki tee pande hianati. Sela
59.7: I wakutuuna konowia manga incia ambulimo, tee akaolu-olu mboomo mantoa mobulilingina kota.
59.8: Kamatea, ngangana manga incia apekasindiri! Dhelana manga incia mboomo ewanga momatadha, roonamo manga pande hianati afikiri, "Inda dhaangia manga rangona!"
59.9: Maka Ingkoo, upotawaiki manga incia, e KAWASANA OPU, Ingkoo uele-ele bhari-bharia lipu.
59.10: E kakaaku, iaku bhekuantagiko; roonamo Ingkoo, e Aulataʼala, satotuuna o kota benteku.
59.11: Aulataʼala i nuncana kaasi molagina bhemopokawaakaaku, tee bheataroakaaku kukamata manga musuku atotalo.
59.12: Bholi upekamate manga incia mamudhaakana lipuku inda amalingu; maka tee kuasamu upapogaa-gaaia tee pakotibumea manga incia, e Aulataʼala, peulusamami!
59.13: Roonamo dosa minaaka i muncuna tee pogau ibhoasakana dhelana, taroakamo manga incia atorako i nuncana kasombona. Roonamo katunda tee kagau-gau ibhoasakana manga incia,
59.14: pabinasamea i nuncana amaramu; pabinasamea sampe amapupu. Tee mboo sumai, mia bheamataua ande Kawasana Opu aparintangi lipuna Israel, tee uka bhari-bharia lipu i dunia. Sela
59.15: I wakutuuna konowia manga incia ambulimo, tee akaolu-olu mboomo mantoa atiingi kota.
59.16: Manga incia apekalingka-lingka apeelo kinandena, tee akaolu-olu ande inda amambosu.
59.17: Maka iaku bhekulaguaka kuasamu, i saeona iaku bhekusambo-sambo roonamo kaasimu molagina, sababuna Ingkoo mboomo bente mojaganiaku tee tampana peulusaku i wakutuuna kanarakaaku.
59.18: E kakaaku, i Ingkoomo iaku bhekulaguaka manga lagu kapujia, roonamo Ingkoomo, e Aulataʼala, benteku mojaganiaku, Kawasana Opu momaasiakaaku.

60.1: To kapalana molaguna. Aose lagu: Kamba Bakung Kasakusii. Zaburuna Daud, to atoadhariaka
60.2: wakutuuna incia aewangi miana Aram-Naharaim tee miana Aram-Zoba, tee wakutuuna Yoab ambuli sapadhana apekamate 12.000 miana Edom i Mbolongana Asin.
60.3: E Aulataʼala, Ingkoo padhamo manga mendeu, tee utaroaka manga musu akatuki katangkesimami. Ingkoo uʼamara tee ingkami, maka sii-sii upekalapea pendua kadhaangiamami minaaka i kanarakaa.
60.4: Ingkoo padhamo ulendu alamu tee upaporuawetaia, tulungi upekalapea pendua manga ngkolelena, roonamo dunia sii atorende.
60.5: Utaroakea uumatimu anamisi giu momatamo, upasumpu ingkami angguru sakawana tadida.
60.6: Ingkoo padhamo upabhale tombi to manga mia momaekana tee Ingkoo mamudhaakana manga incia aporomusaka iwe sumai to apeulu minaaka i manga pande pana. Sela
60.7: Manga pakana tee kuasamu tee uperangoimea o doʼamami, mamudhaakana manga mia imaasiakamu atopasalaamati.
60.8: Aulataʼala padhamo afirimani i tampana momangkilo, "Iaku gauku kukaunde-unde, tee kupodhawu-dhawuaka Tana Sikhem, tee kuʼukuru Mbolongana Sukot.
60.9: Gilead tee Manasye o pewauaku, Efraim mboomo helem minaaka i ase mojaganina bhaaku, tee Yuda katukona pamarintaku.
60.10: Maka o Tana Moab amembali palangga tampana bhanuiana aeku, tee i bhawona Tana Edom kutudhaaka sandaliku. E Tana Filistin, Iaku kusambo-sambomo roonamo padhamo kutaloko!"
60.11: Incema bhemobhawaaku i kota mokobentena makaa sumai? Incema momembalina moʼantaraaku sakawana i Edom?
60.12: E Aulataʼala, buaka mencuana Ingkoo mangabhanakana? E Aulataʼala, Ingkoo inda umaju upobhawa tee tantaramami to taewangi musu.
60.13: Manga tulungi minaaka i musu, roonamo o katulungina maanusia inda akoguna.
60.14: Tapobhawa tee Aulataʼala ingkita tamembali tatalo musuta, sababuna Incia bhemopahancuruna musuta.

61.1: To kapalana molaguna. Tee kagasiana kecapi. Zaburuna Daud.
61.2: E Aulataʼala rangoa igoraakaku, perangoia o doʼaku.
61.3: Minaaka i tapana alamu kugoraakako wakutuuna amate akalaku. Bhawaaku i gunu bhatu molabhina kalangana minaaka i karoku
61.4: roonamo Ingkoomo peulusaku, munara momakaa to kupeuluaka minaaka i musuku.
61.5: Taroakamo saʼumurua dhadhiku kumboore i nuncana Kema Momangkilomu, mamudhaakana kuʼamani i nuncana peulusana panimu. Sela
61.6: Sababuna Ingkoo padhamo urango tolauna oniku, e Aulataʼala, tee padhamo udhawuaku tinauraka idhawuakamu to mia momaekako.
61.7: Maasangia upekarambe umuruna raja, mamudhaakana incia adhadhi saʼumurua.
61.8: Maasangia incia amembali raja saʼumurua i aroana Aulataʼala, parintaakamea o kaasimu molagina tee janjimu inda momabhotu to mojagania.
61.9: Sumaimo iaku sadia bhekulaguaka lagu kapujia to saromu, tee kupomea tolauna oniku saesaeo.

62.1: To kapalana molaguna. Mboomo: Yedutun. Zaburuna Daud.
62.2: Tangkanamo i saripina Aulataʼala o namisiku amalimua, minaakamo i Incia o kasalaamatiku.
62.3: Tangkanamo Incia gunu bhatuku tee mopasalaamatiaku, Incia mboomo kota bente moewaakaaku, iaku inda bhekukohudha sampeampearo.
62.4: Sakawana naepia ingkomiu uhumbuni mia? E bhari-bharikomiu, buaka ingkomiu bheubhebhe mia ihumbunimiu, mboomo ubhebhe rindi mobhele tee tondo momakasuna motobhata?
62.5: Manga incia tangkanamo ahaejati to apasabua minaaka i kauncuramakana momalangana, manga incia sadia agau-gau, tee o muncuna manga incia aemani barakati, maka i nuncana ngangarandana apekatunda. Sela
62.6: E ngangarandaku, tangkanamo i Aulataʼala o namisiku amalimua roonamo tangkanamo Incia iharapuku.
62.7: Tangkanamo Incia o gunu bhatuku tee mopasalaamatiaku, Incia o benteku, iaku inda bhekukohudha.
62.8: Aulataʼala modhawuaku kasalaamati tee mopamembaliaku kumulia, Incia o gunu bhatuku momakaa tee o tampana peulusaku.
62.9: E manga witinai, sadiamo uparacaea i Aulataʼala, palimbamea antona ngangarandamu i aroana, sababuna Incia o tampana peulusata. Sela
62.10: Mia mohina mboomo sampearo poinunca, tee o mia momulia inda amembali atoparacaea. Atotimbangi manga incia bhari-bharia amagaagaa, alabhi o kagaa-gaana minaaka i ngalu.
62.11: Bholi uparacaea tee hasili ipotibhaakamiu minaaka i uhanda mia, tee bholi uharapuaka harataa irampasi. Ande o harataamiu ajulu o kabharina, incamu bholi aposaronaka i harataamiu sumai.
62.12: Sampearo Aulataʼala afirimani, rua giu irangoku, siitumo ande o kuasa minaaka i Aulataʼala,
62.13: tee minaaka i Ingkoo uka o kaasi molagina, e Kawasana Opu. Roonamo Ingkoo mobalasina bhari-bharia mia apokana mboomo ipewauna.

63.1: Zaburuna Daud wakutuuna incia adhaangia i Tana Matuuna Yuda.
63.2: E Aulataʼala, Ingkoomo Aulataʼalaku, iaku kupeeloko, tee gauku kupokawa tee Ingkoo. Saangua badaku apemeliliakako, mboomo mia molingkana i tana matuu mofaraluuna uwe.
63.3: Mboo sumaimo kutontoko i tampamu momangkilo to kukamataaka kuasamu tee kamuliangimu.
63.4: Roonamo kaasimu molagina alabhi akoharagaa minaaka i dhadhi, sababuna sumai kupujiko.
63.5: Mboo sumaimo bhekupujiko saʼumurua dhadhiku, tee kuangka limaku to kumuliangi saromu.
63.6: Atumpu incaku, mboomo tee kinande momambaka, tee kupujiko tee bhiwiku mokaunde-unde,
63.7: wakutuu kuudhaniko i kolemaku, tee kufikiriko samaloa.
63.8: Roonamo Ingkoomo motulungiaku, i tambena panimu iaku kusambo-sambo.
63.9: Ngangarandaku bheakeniakako pekatangka, lima kaanamu atukoaku.
63.10: Maka manga mia mohaejatina mopekamateaku bheapesua i tambena tana tee manga mia mate;
63.11: manga musuku bheatopekamateaka tee hancu, tee amembali kinandena serigala.
63.12: Maka raja bheakaunde-unde roonamo katulungina Aulataʼala; bhari-bharia mia moposumpana tee Aulataʼala bheabangga, roonamo Incia bheasoncongi ngangana manga pande gau-gau.

64.2: E Aulataʼala, maasangia urango doʼaku i wakutuuna kupeenci, pasalaamatia inyawaku minaaka i kasegana musu.
64.3: Jaganiaku minaaka i haejati irahasiaakana manga mia madhaki, tee minaaka i isikadina manga mia mopewauna kadhaki.
64.4: Pogauna manga amatadha mboomo hancu, tee pogau ibhoasakana amapii mboomo anana pana.
64.5: Manga incia apana manga mia inda mosala minaaka i tampana opoana, sumaimo alausaka apanea inda tee kaekana.
64.6: Manga incia sadia ahaejatiaka momadhakina, apomufakati to ataa katapu tee apobuniaka, tee apogau i nuncana ngangarandana, "Inda dhaangia manga kamatana!"
64.7: Manga incia ahaejatiaka kadhaki tee apogau, "Ihaejatiakamami amondomo!" Manga incia abuniaka opea ihaejatiakana, roonamo ngangarandana maanusia inda amembali amataua mia mosagaanana.
64.8: Maka Aulataʼala apana manga incia tee saanampuu manga incia amambela.
64.9: Aulataʼala bheapasindoli manga incia rampaakanamo dhelana; bhari-bharia mia mokamatea bhearengku tee abhibhi.
64.10: Bhari-bharia mia bheamaeka; manga incia bheapetulatulaaka opea mopadhana ipewauna Aulataʼala, tee bheafikiri opea mopadhana ipewauna.
64.11: Taroakamo mia mobanara akaunde-unde roonamo KAWASANA OPU tee apeulu i Incia. Taroakamo bhari-bharia mia momakatena incana bheabangga tee Incia!

65.1: To kapalana molaguna. Zaburuna Daud. Laguna.
65.2: E Aulataʼala, alaengamo ingkami tapujiko i Sion, tee tapomea o tolauna onimami i Ingkoo.
65.3: Sababuna Ingkoomo moperangoina doʼa, i Ingkoomo bhari-bharia maanusia bheaumba.
65.4: Wakutuuna dosamami alabhi o katamona minaaka i kakaamami, Ingkoomo moʼamponina kasalahamami.
65.5: Amasanaamo mia ipilimu tee ipekakasumu to amboore i aroana Bhanuamu. Bheapatumpu incamami tee bhari-bharia momalapena modhaangiana i Bhanuamu, siitumo i nuncana Baitullamu momangkilo.
65.6: Tee manga pewaumu moʼadili tee inda momentela Ingkoo ulawani ingkami, e Kawasana Opu, mopasalaamatina ingkami. Ingkoomo iparacaeana saangua alamu tee i tawo momaridho mpuu.
65.7: Minaaka i kakaamu, upakaro manga gunu; upakanaakea kuasamu momakaana.
65.8: Ingkoomo mopauntona suarana pamuruna tawo, siitumo suarana pamuruna ewona, tee karobhona manga lipu.
65.9: Manga mia i saangua alamu amaeka akamata manga tanda inda momentela ipewaumu. Minaaka i timbu sakawana i bhara, upewaua asambo-sambo tee akaunde-unde.
65.10: Tana sumai udhambaakea tee udhawua wao, Upasuburua sabutuna hasilina abhari mpuu. Umalana Aulataʼala abukeaka tee uwe, tee upasadiaakea gandum to maanusia, mboo sumaimo upatotapuakea.
65.11: Ingkoo sadia upakouwe tana ibhingkunina, tee uparatea manga tongkana tanana, upekagodhea tee wao, tee ubarakati manga penembulana.
65.12: Roonamo kalapemu, satao-satao udhawuakea timpua, I iapaipo ubhengkala, ubholi manga giu momalape.
65.13: Manga rumpu i tana matuu atuwu asuburu, manga gunu akaunde-unde.
65.14: Manga tana mokorumpu abukeaka gulumana dumba, tee manga mbolonga atipuaka gandum. Bhari-bharia asambo-sambo tee alagu akaunde-unde.

66.1: To kapalana molaguna. Laguna Zaburu. Sambo-sambomo to Aulataʼala, e saangua alamu!
66.2: Laguakamo manga lagu kapujia tee umuliangimea o sarona, muliangimea o kapujiana to Incia.
66.3: Pakawaakea i Aulataʼala, "Tapanamo atomaeka ipewaumu! Roonamo kuasamu amaoge, sumaimo o musu-musumu atungku tee arengku i aroamu.
66.4: Saangua dunia asuju asombako. Manga incia apuji-pujiko, tee alaguaka lagu kapujia to saromu." Sela
66.5: Mai, kamatea opea ipewauna Aulataʼala, ipewauna inda momentela to maanusia.
66.6: Incia abhalii tawo amembali tana matuu, tee manga opu-opuata apolimba i umala tee adhala ae. Siitumo ingkita takaunde-unde roonamo bhari-bharia ipewauna.
66.7: Incia aparinta tee kakaana to saʼumurua, tee o matana ajagani manga lipu mamudhaakana manga mia mobhalia inda asomboaka karona. Sela
66.8: Pujimo Aulataʼalamami, e manga lipu, parangoakamea o kapujiamiu i Incia!
66.9: Incia mojagani inyawamami mamudhaakana inda tamate, tee inda ataroakea o aemami asindoli.
66.10: E Aulataʼala, Ingkoo padhamo manga uuji, tee manga pekangkilo mboomo mia mopekangkilona pera i nuncana waa.
66.11: Ingkoo upapesua ingkami i nuncana jari, tee udhika bhawa momatamo i bhawona torukumami.
66.12: Ingkoo utaroakea manga mia alanda-landaki bhaamami. Ingkami talaloi waa tee mawa, maka Ingkoo ubhawa ingkami i tampa momalape tee momalalesa.
66.13: Iaku bhekupesua i nuncana bhanuamu tee kubhawa kurubani itunu. Iaku bhekupomea tolauna oniku
66.14: ibhoasakaku minaaka i ngangaku i wakutuuna kumaseke.
66.15: Iaku bhekupasombaaka to Ingkoo manga kurubani itunu minaaka i binata momalompo, tee momawonduna bhouna minaaka i dumba umane. Iaku bhekupasombaakako manga sapi umane tee bhembe umane. Sela
66.16: Mai perangoia, e bhari-bharia mia momaeka i Aulataʼala! Iaku bhekupetulatulaaka opea mopadhana ipewauna to iaku.
66.17: Tee ngangaku kugoraakea sabutuna o dhelaku alaguaka lagu kapujia to Incia.
66.18: Ande kumaasiaka giu madhaki i nuncana ngangarandaku, atantumo o Aulataʼala amendeu aperangoiaku.
66.19: Maka o Aulataʼala aperangoia, Incia amaheruakaaku wakutuuna kudoʼa.
66.20: Atopujimo o Aulataʼala, moperangoina doʼaku tee inda apekaridhoakaaku o kaasina molagina minaaka i karoku.

67.1: To kapalana molaguna. Tee kagasiana kecapi. Laguna Zaburu.
67.2: Maasangia o Aulataʼala manga maasiaka tee manga barakati, maasangia Incia manga kamata tee kalapena incana, Sela
67.3: tee mboo sumai, maanusia i bhawona alamu sii amataua opea ipeelumu to manga incia, tee bhari-bharia lipu amataua ande Ingkoo mokokuasana to mopasalaamatina manga incia.
67.4: E Aulataʼala, maasangia manga lipu apujiko, maasangia bhari-bharia lipu apujiko.
67.5: Maasangia manga lipu akaunde-unde tee asambo-sambo roonamo Ingkoo tee kaʼadili uhaakimu manga lipu, tee utonda bhari-bharia lipu i bhawona alamu. Sela
67.6: Maasangia manga lipu apujiko, e Aulataʼala, maasangia bhari-bharia lipu apujiko.
67.7: Alamu padhamo adhawuaka hasilina; Aulataʼala, Aulataʼalata, padhamo abarakati ingkita.
67.8: Maasangia Aulataʼala manga barakati torosu; maasangia bhari-bharia lipu i bhawona dunia amaekaia.

68.1: To kapalana molaguna. Zaburuna Daud. Laguna.
68.2: Taroakamo Aulataʼala akakaro tee apewau musuna apogaa-gaa; taroakamo manga mia mobancia amatalo tee apalai minaaka i aroana.
68.3: Mboomo ombu aila wakutuuna atowiia ngalu, taroakamo Ingkoo uwulu manga incia. Mboomo taru arere i aroana waa, taroakamo mia madhaki abinasa i aroana Aulataʼala.
68.4: Maka taroakamo o mia mobanara akaunde-unde, taroakamo manga incia amasanaa i aroana Aulataʼala, tee taroakamo manga incia asambo-sambo tee akaunde-unde.
68.5: Lagumo to Aulataʼala, laguakamo lagu kapujia to sarona! Pasiapuakea dhala oge to Incia mosawina i taʼina ngalu! Sarona o KAWASANA OPU, kaunde-undemo i aroana!
68.6: Amana manga ana maelu tee moewaakana manga iaiaro siitumo o Aulataʼala i tampana mbooresana momangkilo.
68.7: Mia momboorena samia-miana Aulataʼala aposaangua i nuncana saangu bhanua, Incia apabebasi mia mototorongku sabutuna manga incia amasanaamo dhadhina, maka manga mia mobhalia amboore i tana matuu.
68.8: E Aulataʼala, wakutuuna ukapalai uumatimu wakutuuna apotimbe, tee wakutuuna ulaloi tana matuu, Sela
68.9: alamu akolendu, tee o laiana apasapo wao, roonamo umbaana Aulataʼala isombana miana Israel, siitumo isarongiakana Aulataʼala i Sinai.
68.10: E Aulataʼala, amaranca mpuu Ingkoo upasapo wao, tee upasuburu tana tinaurakamu i wakutuuna amatuu;
68.11: sabutuna o uumatimu ambooresia. E Aulataʼala, tee kalapemu udhawuakea bhari-bharia ifaraluuna mia misikini.
68.12: Kawasana Opu apakawaaka firimanina, tee rombongana mia bhari mobhawana lele malape sumai.
68.13: "Manga raja tee tantarana apalai, umbe, apalaiaka karona!" Manga bhawine momboorena i nuncana bhanua apodhawu-dhawuaka bara irampasi minaaka i tampana potimbea.
68.14: Moomini ingkomiu apotidhole i tanga-tangana kandana dumba, bara irampasimiu mboomo panina jarajara ilapisiaka pera, buluna minaaka i bulawa mokokila!
68.15: Wakutuuna o Kawasana Opu Mokokuasana apapogaa-gaa manga raja iwe sumai, asapomo salju i Gunu Zalmon.
68.16: Gunu Basan o gunu momakaa. Gunu mobharina tubuna, siitumo o Gunu Basan.
68.17: E Gunu Basan mobharina tubuna, pokia ingkoo ugigibulu tee Gunu Sion ipilina Aulataʼala to amembali tampana kauncuramakana? Satotuuna o KAWASANA OPU bheamboore iwe sumai saʼumurua!
68.18: Kawasana Opu aumbamo minaaka i Gunu Sinai tee apesua i tampana momangkilo tee puluna rewu kareta potimbeana, inda atolentu o kabharina.
68.19: Ingkoo ukompa i tampa momalanga tee ubhawa manga mia mototaangi i talikumu. Ingkoo utarima hadia mobhari minaaka i maanusia, moomini minaaka i manga mia mobhaliko. KAWASANA OPU, Aulataʼala, bheamboore iwe sumai.
68.20: Atopujimo Kawasana Opu, mosodhana bhawata saesaeo. Incia o Aulataʼala mopasalaamatina ingkita. Sela
68.21: Aulataʼalata satotuuna o Aulataʼala mopasalaamatina ingkita, tee KAWASANA OPU motulungina ingkita mamudhaakana inda tamate.
68.22: Maka o Aulataʼala bheapurokoti bhaana musuna, tee kauwana bhaana mokobulua minaaka i manga mia mosadhaadhaana modhadhina i nuncana kasalaha.
68.23: Kawasana Opu afirimani, "Iaku bhekubhawea pendua o musumu minaaka i Basan; bhekubhawea pendua manga incia minaaka i tawo momandala
68.24: mamudhaakana ingkomiu amembali ubhanui aemu tee raana manga incia, tee manga mantoamu amembali apotibhaaka dhawuna tee atumpu incana adhelapia."
68.25: Manga mia padhamo akamatako wakutuuna ambeliakako mboomo raja, e Aulataʼala; ambeliakako o Kawasana Opuku, o Rajaku to ulingka uporope i mbooresamu momangkilo.
68.26: Manga molaguna adhaangia i aroa, momagasiaakana kecapi i taliku, i tanga-tanga manga kabuabua mobhebhena ganda-ganda. Mboo siimo laguna manga incia,
68.27: "Pujimea o Aulataʼala i tanga-tangana uumatina momaoge, Pujimea o KAWASANA OPU, e bhari-bharikomiu siwuluna Israel!"
68.28: Bhaa-bhaana o siwuluna Binyamin, momembalina kamia momaidhiidhi mpuu mokapalaina manga incia, kasiimpo aosea manga lakina Yuda i saangu rombongana, kasiimpo manga lakina Zebulon tee lakina Naftali.
68.29: E Aulataʼala, palimbamea o kakaamu. E Aulataʼala, susuakamea o kakaamu, mboomo mopadhana ipewaumu to ingkami.
68.30: Rampaakanamo Bhanuamu i Yerusalem, manga raja abhawa pasombaa to Ingkoo.
68.31: Gorampangia o Mesir, lipu mboomo binata maila i tanga-tangana gelaga, gorampangia o Mesir, lipu mboomo gulumana sapi umane tee manga anana, siitumo manga lipu mokokuasa. Pahancurua manga incia momasoʼoakana pera, papogaa-gaaia manga lipu momaasiakana potimbea.
68.32: Manga potolowea bheaumba minaaka i Mesir, tee miana Etiopia lausaka bheataanaka limana tee adhawu pasombaana i Aulataʼala.
68.33: Lagumo to Aulataʼala, e bhari-bharia lipu i dunia sii! Laguakamo lagu kapujia to Kawasana Opu, Sela
68.34: to Incia mosawina i kareta modhalana i bhawona laiana, siitumo laiana modhaangiana pepuu minaaka i zamani mangenge. Rangoa, Incia apaperangoaka suarana, suarana amakaa tee akoguntu.
68.35: Akuimea o kuasana Aulataʼala! Kaogena dhaangia i bhawona lipu Israel, kuasana akawea i laiana.
68.36: E Aulataʼala, Ingkoo inda umentela mpuu wakutuuna ulimba minaaka i tampana mbooresamu momangkilo! Aulataʼala isombana miana Israel adhawuaka kuasana tee kakaana to uumatina. Atopujimo Aulataʼala!

69.1: To kapalana molaguna. Aose lagu: Kamba-kamba Bakung. Zaburuna Daud.
69.2: Pasalaamatiaku, e Aulataʼala, roonamo o uwe akawamo i bhorokoku.
69.3: Iaku kutondu i nuncana tomba momandala, inda dhaangia o tampana polandakaku. Iaku kukotibu i uwe momandala, tee o mawa apaampeaku.
69.4: Iaku kumangule kugora kuemani tulungi; goncoku amatuu. Mataku amalau kuantagi Aulataʼalaku.
69.5: Mia mobanciaku inda akoʼalasa, alabhi o kabharina minaaka i bulua i bhaaku. Manga mia mogauna mopabinasaaku abhari mpuu; manga incia amembali musuku inda akosababu. Iaku apakisaaku kubholosi harataa inda irampasiku.
69.6: E Aulataʼala, Ingkoo umataua o kabhongo-bhongoku, manga kasalahaku inda atobuniaka minaaka i Ingkoo.
69.7: Bholi utaroakea manga mia motangkaakako apotibhaaka kaea roonamo iaku, e KAWASANA OPU, Aulataʼalana saangua alamu! Bholi utaroakea manga mia mopeeloko apotibhaaka aebu roonamo iaku, e Aulataʼala isombana miana Israel!
69.8: Rampaakanamo Ingkoo iaku kutohina, tee o kae atutubhi rouku.
69.9: Iaku mboomo dhaga to manga witinaiku, tee bhari-bharia witinaiku aabhiaku mia moumba.
69.10: Ngangarandaku akarore-rore to kuewaaka bhanuamu, sabutuna apekangauaku, tee o kahinana manga mia mohinako akangkanaiaku.
69.11: Wakutuuna kupaporitambe karoku tee kupoasa, iaku kumembali kahinana mia.
69.12: Wakutuuna kupake kae kadhu to tandana kusukara, rampaakanamo sumai manga incia apotawaikiaku.
69.13: Iaku kumembali giu ipogauakana manga mia mouncurana i bhambana lawana kota tee apamembaliaku lagu kaele-elena manga pande sumpu.
69.14: Maka kudoʼa i Ingkoo, e KAWASANA OPU, e Aulataʼala, lawaniaku i wakutuu momalape; lawaniaku roonamo kaasimu molagina motaralabhi-labhi tee roonamo katulungimu momembalina iparacaeaku.
69.15: Pasalaamatiaku minaaka i nuncana tomba, tee bholi utaroakaaku kutondu. Rambasakaaku minaaka i manga mia mobanciaku tee minaaka i uwe momandala.
69.16: Bholi utaroakaaku apaampeaku mawa, atawa kutondu i tawo momandala. Bholi utaroakaaku kutokoburu i nuncana bhalo.
69.17: E KAWASANA OPU, maasangia ulawaniaku roonamo kaasimu molagina amalape, poilimo tee urangoaku rampaakanamo rahumatimu momaoge.
69.18: Bholi ubuniaka roumu minaaka i bhatuamu roonamo iaku kunarakaa, lawaniakumo pekadhei.
69.19: Umbamo pasalaamatiaku, pabebasiaku minaaka i manga musuku.
69.20: Ingkoo umataua tuaapa o musuku aele-eleaku, apekaeaaku tee ahinaaku. Ingkoo ukamatea bhari-bharia musuku.
69.21: Kahinana sumai apahancuru incaku, sabutuna amate o akalaku. Iaku kuharapu kaasina mia, maka inda dhaangia; iaku kupeelo mia mohiburuaku, maka inda kupotibhaakea.
69.22: Sampe manga incia uka adhawuaku racu to kukandea, tee wakutuuna amatuu bhorokoku, adhawuaku cuka to kusumpua.
69.23: Taroakamo kinande i aroana manga incia amembali katapu to karona, tee amembali kapetambo to manga sabhangkana.
69.24: Taroakamo matana manga incia amarawu mamudhaakana inda amembali apokamata, tee taroakamo o tangana manga incia sadia arengku.
69.25: Palimbamea pamurumu to manga incia, tee taroakamo o amaramu mokarore-rorena akangkanai manga incia.
69.26: Taroakamo pokemaana manga incia amembali amalino, tee taroakamo inda samia uka momboorena i kemana manga incia.
69.27: Roonamo manga incia apajere manga mia mopadhana ibhebhemu, tee apetulatulaaka o kanarakaana manga mia mopadhana ipekambelamu.
69.28: Taroakamo urangania kabharina kasalahana manga incia, tee manga incia bholi upabanarea.
69.29: Taroakamo o sarona manga incia uhapusua minaaka i nuncana boku mokoantoakana manga sarona mia momalape, tee o sarona manga incia bholi upapesuaia i nuncana daftarana mia mobanara.
69.30: Maka iaku sii kunarakaa tee kumapii. E Aulataʼala, tulungiaku tee ujaganiaku.
69.31: Iaku bhekulagu to kupuji sarona Aulataʼala, tee kusukuru tee kumuliangia.
69.32: Giu incia sumai alabhi alaenga i matana KAWASANA OPU minaaka i binata pasombaa, tee minaaka i sapi umane maoge mokotandu tee mokokonuku mopoweta.
69.33: Manga mia monarakaa bheakamatea tee akaunde-unde. Taroakamo incamiu adhadhi pendua, e ingkomiu mopeelona Aulataʼala!
69.34: KAWASANA OPU aperangoi mia misikini, tee Incia inda apandaʼente uumatina modhaangiana i nuncana katorongku.
69.35: Taroakamo Incia apujia bhari-bharia modhaangiana i laiana tee i dunia, i tawo tee bhari-bharia mahaluku modhadhina i nuncana tawo
69.36: roonamo Aulataʼala bheapasalaamati Kota Sion, tee apendua abhangu manga kota i Tana Yuda mamudhaakana manga bhatuana amboore tee akotanaaka lipu incia sumai saʼumurua.
69.37: Siwuluna minaaka i manga bhatuana bhemokotinaurakaakea, tee manga mia momaasiakana Kawasana Opu bheamboore i nuncana.

70.1: To kapalana molaguna. Zaburuna Daud. Zikiri i wakutuuna pasombaana kurubanina kaudhania.
70.2: E Aulataʼala, pasalaamatiaku! E KAWASANA OPU, tulungiaku pekadhei!
70.3: Taroakamo manga mia mogauna mopekamateaku amaea tee apalai roonamo abingu. Taroakamo manga mia mogauna mopacilakaaku apotibhaaka kahina tee aʼaebu.
70.4: Taroakamo manga mia mopogauna, "Namisia, namisia!" tee mopotawaikiaku abhalili roonamo amaea.
70.5: Taroakamo bhari-bharia mia mopeeloko asambo-sambo tee akaunde-unde roonamo Ingkoo. Taroakamo manga mia momaasiakana kasalaamati minaaka i Ingkoo sadia apogau, "Tapanamo kalanga o Aulataʼala!"
70.6: Iaku sii kunarakaa tee kumisikini, umbamo pekadhei, e Aulataʼala! Ingkoomo motulungiaku tee mopasalaamatiaku. E KAWASANA OPU bholi upekanoe-noe!

71.1: E KAWASANA OPU, Ingkoomo o peulusaku, bholi sampeampearo kutopekaea.
71.2: Rambasakaaku, tee upabebasiaku roonamo Ingkoo ubanara; perangoiaku tee upasalaamatiaku.
71.3: Membalimo gunu bhatu to tampana mbooresaku sadia momembalina iumbatiku. Ingkoo padhamo udhawu parinta mamudhaakana kutopasalaamati roonamo Ingkoomo gunu bhatu mojaganiaku tee bente potaangiaku.
71.4: E Aulataʼalaku, pasalaamatiaku minaaka i limana mia madhaki, minaaka i kuasana mia inda moʼadili tee mia masega.
71.5: Ingkoomo iharapuku, e KAWASANA OPU Aulataʼala, Ingkoomo iparacaeaku minaaka dhaangia kumangura.
71.6: Ingkoomo o tampana kupasande minaaka i nuncana kadhuma; Ingkoomo mopalimbaaku minaaka i kompona inaku, sumaimo iaku sadia kupujiko.
71.7: Iaku kumembali mboomo mia ipeelona manga pande pana, maka Ingkoomo o tampana peulusaku momakaa.
71.8: Ngangaku sadia apujiko, saeoa iaku kumuliangiko.
71.9: Bholi ubhanakaaku i wakutuuna kumancuana, tee bholi ubholiaku ande atopadhamo kakaaku.
71.10: Sababuna manga musuku apogauakaaku, tee manga mia mogauna mopekamateaku asahimuakaaku.
71.11: Pogauna manga incia, "Aulataʼala padhamo abholi incia! Pajeremea tee urakomea roonamo inda dhaangia bhemorambasakea!"
71.12: E Aulataʼala, bholi umaridho minaaka i iaku, e Aulataʼalaku, tulungiaku pekadhei!
71.13: Taroakamo mia moraeakaaku apotibhaaka kaea tee abinasa. Taroakamo manga mia mogauna mopacilakaaku abukeaka kahina tee aebu.
71.14: Maka sadia kuharapu, tee iaku ahandamo bhekupujiko.
71.15: Ngangaku saeoa bhekupetulatulaaka manga pewaumu mobanara, tee kasalaamati inda motolentu minaaka i Ingkoo.
71.16: Iaku bhekuumba tee kupuji pewauna momakaana KAWASANA OPU Aulataʼala. Iaku bhekumuliangiakea tangkanamo kaʼadilina Karomu samia.
71.17: E Aulataʼala, minaaka kumangura Ingkoo moadhariaku, tee sakawana sii-sii iaku kupetulatulaaka pewaumu inda momentela.
71.18: Sampe sakawana kumancuana tee kukouwa uka, e Aulataʼala, bholi ubholiaku, mamudhaakana kumembali kupakoleleaka kuasamu i siwulu sii-sii, tee kaogesamu i bhari-bharia mia bhemoumbana naile itu.
71.19: E Aulataʼala, kuasamu tee kabanaramu akawea i laiana! Ingkoo padhamo upewau manga giu momaoge, e Aulataʼala, incema mopokanana tee Ingkoo?
71.20: Ingkoo padhamo utaroakaaku kunamisi bhari kanarakaa tee balaa, Ingkoo uka bheupadhadhiaku pendua. Minaaka i nuncana koburu Ingkoo bheuangkaaku pendua.
71.21: Ingkoo bheupamembaliaku ajulu kutohoromati, tee uhiburuaku pendua.
71.22: Iaku bhekupujiko tee gambusu roonamo umembali utoparacaea, e Aulataʼalaku. Tee kecapi Iaku bhekulaguaka lagu kapujia to Ingkoo, e Momangkilona, Aulataʼala isombana miana Israel!
71.23: Bhiwiku bheasambo-sambo wakutuuna kulaguaka lagu kapujia to Ingkoo, apokana uka mboomo inyawaku mopadhana itolosimu.
71.24: Dhelaku bheapakoleleaka katulungimu mobanara saeoa, roonamo manga mia mopadhana moʼusahana to mopacilakaaku amembali amaea tee amajule.

72.1: Zaburuna Sulaiman. E Kawasana Opu, dhawuakea o kaʼadilimu to raja, tee udhawuakea o kabanaramu to anana raja.
72.2: Maasangia incia aʼadili uumatimu tee kabanara, tee aʼadili apewau mia motopisaki.
72.3: Maasangia manga gunu aumbaaka kasanaa to raʼeati, tee manga kabumbu ahasiliaka kabanara.
72.4: Maasangia incia bheaewaaka parakarana manga mia motopisaki i tanga-tangana raʼeati, apasalaamati manga mia misikini tee apahancuru manga pande pisaki.
72.5: Maasangia manga incia bheamaeka i Ingkoo kangengena dhaangia tee matanaeo tee kangengena dhaangia tee bula, saʼumurua.
72.6: Maasangia raja incia sumai mboomo uwena wao mosapona i bhawona rumpu mopadhana motoweli, tee mboomo wao maranca mobubusina dunia.
72.7: Maasangia o kabanara sadhaadhaa aniʼimatia raʼeati kangengena raja dhaangiapo adhadhi, tee o kasanaa ataralabhi-labhi sakawana bula indamo dhaangia.
72.8: Incia bheakokuasa minaaka i tawo sakawana i tawo, minaaka i Umala Efrat sakawana i tapana dunia.
72.9: Manga mia momboorena i tana matuu bheatungku i aroana, tee manga musuna adhelapi ngawuna tana.
72.10: Maasangia manga raja minaaka i Tarsis tee manga raja minaaka i pulo-pulo mosagaanana bheabhawaakea hadia. Maasangia manga raja minaaka i Syeba tee Seba abhawa pasombaa to incia.
72.11: Maasangia bhari-bharia raja bheasuju i aroana, tee bhari-bharia lipu apabhatua karona i incia.
72.12: Roonamo incia bhearambasaka mia misikini mogorana i incia, tee atolosi mia motopisaki tee mia inda mototulungi.
72.13: Incia bheamaasiaka mia misikini tee mia monarakaa, tee apasalaamati inyawana mia inda mokokadhaangia.
72.14: Tee bheatolosi dhadhina manga incia minaaka i mia masega tee mopisakina manga incia, sababuna o dhadhina manga incia akoharagaa mpuu i matana.
72.15: Maasangia amarambe o umuruna! Maasangia o bulawa minaaka i Syeba atopasombaaka to incia. Maasangia incia sadia atodoʼaaka, tee saeoa o mia aemaniakea barakati.
72.16: Maasangia o gandum ataralabhi-labhi i saangua lipu, akawea i lolona gunu. Maasangia o hasilina tanana asuburu mboomo i Libanon, tee o raʼeatina kotana ajulu o kabharina mboomo rumpu i tana lapa.
72.17: Maasangia o sarona raja atoudhani saʼumurua, maasangia sahandana abhari o mia momatauna sarona, kangengena dhaangiapo tee matanaeo. Maasangia bhari-bharia lipu bheapotibhaaka barakati roonamo incia, tee bhari-bharia lipu asarongiakea amasanaa.
72.18: Atopujimo KAWASANA OPU, siitumo Aulataʼala isombana miana Israel, mopewauna manga giu inda momentela samia-miana!
72.19: Atopujimo sarona momuliana saʼumurua! Maasangia saangua alamu abukeaka tee kamuliangina. Aamin, aamin!
72.20: Mboo siimo kapadhaana doʼana Daud bin Isai.

73.1: Zaburuna Asaf. Satotuuna o Aulataʼala sumai amalape tee miana Israel, tee mia morelana totona incana.
73.2: Maka iaku saidhepo kusindoli, tee saidhepo kumanduli,
73.3: roonamo kugigibulu kukamata mia mosombo wakutuuna kukamata kasanaana tee karangkaeana mia madhaki.
73.4: Manga incia inda anamisi kapii, badana manga incia amalompo tee amakaa.
73.5: Manga incia inda anamisi kanarakaa mboomo mia mosagaanana, tee manga incia inda akangkanaia balaa mboomo maanusia mosagaanana.
73.6: Siitumo o sababuna manga incia aporanteaka tee pewau mosombo, tee kasegana asalibumbuaka karona mboomo juba.
73.7: Matana manga incia aʼuntu roonamo kaogena bukuna, ngangarandana manga incia abukeaka tee manga haejati madhaki.
73.8: Manga incia tee kadhakina aele-ele tee apeonii mia mosagaanana, tee kalangana incana manga incia apekapahanda tee apekapisaki.
73.9: Ngangana manga incia ahina sorogaa, tee dhelana atipua saangua dunia to abhoasaka manga pogau inda mokoguna.
73.10: Sumaimo manga mia ambuli aose manga incia, tee inda apotibhaaka saangu kasalaha uka minaaka i manga incia.
73.11: Tee manga mia madhaki apogau, "Tuaapa o Aulataʼala bheamataua opea ipewaumami? Buaka Incia Momalangana dhaangia tee imatauna?"
73.12: Kamatamea, mboo siimo manga mia madhaki: manga incia atanangi torosu tee o harataana ahandamo abhari.
73.13: Satotuuna asia-siamo kujagani ngangarandaku mamudhaakana amangkilo, tee kubhanui limaku to tandana inda kusala.
73.14: Roonamo saeoa akangkanaiaku balaa, tee saraneeo-saraneeo kutohukumu.
73.15: Ande kupogau, "Iaku gauku kupogau mboo sumai," sumaimo iaku kuhianati siwuluna uumatimu.
73.16: Maka i wakutuuna kuʼusaha to kumaʼanaia, hali incia sumai amarasai mpuu to iaku;
73.17: siimpo kumataua o kapadhaana dhadhina manga incia wakutuuna kupesua i nuncana bhanuana Aulataʼala.
73.18: Satotuuna, i tampa momararo udhika manga incia, tee upekandawua manga sakawana abinasa.
73.19: Manga incia abinasa sakijamata, apaampea sakawana amofu minaaka i kamingkiri.
