73.20: Manga mia madhaki bheaila mboomo pongipi i wakutuuna o mia atobhangu i koleana. E Kawasana Opu, kaudhania to manga incia uhapusua wakutuuna ubhangu.
73.21: Wakutuuna ngangarandaku amaporo mpuu, tee o baatiniku mboomo isusu-susu,
73.22: iaku kukabhongo-bhongo tee inda tee imaʼanaiku, i aroamu iaku mboomo binata inda mokoʼakala.
73.23: Moomini mboo sumai, iaku sadia i saripimu. Ingkoo ukeni lima kaanaku.
73.24: Ingkoo utondaaku tee naasehatimu, tee utarimaaku tee kahoromati naile itu.
73.25: Incema motulungiaku i sorogaa ande mencuana Ingkoo? I dunia sii inda dhaangia ipeeluku, ande mencuana Ingkoo.
73.26: Inyawa tee badaku amembali amofu tee abinasa, maka o Aulataʼala kakaana incaku tee o tinaurakaku saʼumurua.
73.27: Satotuuna o mia momaridhona minaaka i Ingkoo bheabinasa. Ingkoo bheupabinasa manga mia mohianatiko.
73.28: Maka to iaku, tapanamo kalape ande kupomakasu tee Aulataʼala, KAWASANA OPU Aulataʼala bhekupamembalia o tampana peulusaku mamudhaakana kumembali kupetulatulaakea bhari-bharia ipewaumu!

74.1: Lagu kaadharina Asaf. E Aulataʼala, pokia Ingkoo ubhanaka ingkami? Buaka ingkami tatomendeu saʼumurua? Pokia pamurumu akarore-rore tee manga dumba igembalamu?
74.2: Maasangia uudhania o uumatimu mopadhana ipotibhaakamu i piamo itu, lipu mopadhana itolosimu amembali lipu tinaurakamu. Udhania Gunu Sion, tampa mopadhana iumbatimu to umbooresia.
74.3: Paporopea bhengkalamu i tampa mohancuru saʼumurua sumai; bhari-bharia bara i nuncana tampa momangkilo padhamo apahancurua musu.
74.4: Manga bhalimu akakee-kee, "Takanamo!" i tampamu momangkilo, tee apakaro manga tombi to tandana ande manga incia akana minaaka i ingkami.
74.5: Atokamata mboomo mia moangkana ndamuna apekalanga-langea to apale manga puuna kau i koo.
74.6: Bhari-bharia bara ibheloki andamua tee apalua.
74.7: Manga incia atunu bhanua ibaadatimu sakawana arata tee tana, tee apanaajisi tampana mbooresamu.
74.8: I nuncana ngangarandana manga incia apogau, "Mai tapisakia bhari-bharia!" Manga incia atunu bhari-bharia tampana ibaadati i lipu sii.
74.9: Ingkami indamo uka takamata manga tanda inda momentela, samia nabii uka inda dhaangia, inda samia uka i tanga-tangamami momataua sakawana naepia bhari-bharia sii amembali.
74.10: E Aulataʼala, sakawana naepia manga bhali bheaele-eleko? Buaka saʼumurua o musu bheahina saromu?
74.11: Pokia Ingkoo uhelaia pendua o lima kaanamu? Pokia Ingkoo soo usaku-saku limamu? Pepadhaimea manga incia!
74.12: Maka o Aulataʼala o rajaku minaaka i piamo itu. Incia mopasalaamatina ingkami i dunia.
74.13: Tee kakaamu Ingkoo uweta tawo, tee upasaki bhaana manga Lewiatan i tawo.
74.14: Ingkoo upekapuro manga bhaana Lewiatan, tee upamembalia kinandena manga binata momboorena i tana matuu.
74.15: Ingkoo mobungkalena matana uwe tee umala; sainamo manga umala mokouwena torotorosu, upekatuua.
74.16: Ingkoomo mopadhaangiana eo tee malo, Ingkoomo modhikana matanaeo tee bula.
74.17: Ingkoo mopatotapuakana bhari-bharia tidhana alamu, Ingkoo mopewauna bulaana paneeo tee bulaana wao.
74.18: Udhania tuaapa o musumu aele-eleko, e KAWASANA OPU, lipu mokaafiri ahina saromu.
74.19: Bholi upasaraaka inyawana manu-manu jarajaramu i binata masega, tee bholi umalinguakea to saʼumurua inyawana uumatimu motopisaki.
74.20: Udhania o pojanjia ipewaumu tee ingkami, roonamo manga tampa malalanda i dunia sii abukeaka tee manga mia mopewauna kasega.
74.21: Bholi utaroakea o mia motopisaki ambuli atopekaea, maka maasangia o mia monarakaa tee mia misikini bheapuji saromu.
74.22: E Aulataʼala, bhangumo, ewaakea o parakaramu; udhania ande manga mia mokaafiri ahinako saeoa.
74.23: Bholi umalinguakea o suarana manga bhalimu, tee o karobhona manga mia moewangiko apene torotorosu.

75.1: To kapalana molaguna. Zaburuna Asaf to lagu: Bholi Upahancurua.
75.2: Ingkami tasukuru i Ingkoo, e Aulataʼala; ingkami tasukuru i Ingkoo roonamo umakasu. Manga mia apetulatulaaka bhari-bharia pewaumu inda momentela.
75.3: "I wakutuu mopadhana itantuakaku, Iaku bhekuhaakimu tee kaʼadili.
75.4: I wakutuuna alamu tee bhari-bharia antona atolendu, Iakumo bhemopekatangkana manga ariina. Sela
75.5: To manga mia mosombo Iaku kupogau, 'Bholi usombo,' kasiimpo to mia madhaki, 'Bholi upepujiaka kakaamu;
75.6: bholi upepujiaka kakaamu uewangi sorogaa, atawa upogau tee upataja bhorokomu.' "
75.7: Roonamo Incia Mokanana minaaka i timbu tee minaaka i bhara, Inciamo Mokanana minaaka i tana matuu sakawana i tana mokogunu.
75.8: Aulataʼala o haakimu; Incia apaporitambe mia mosala tee apekalanga mia mobanara.
75.9: Roonamo pamuruna KAWASANA OPU mboomo tonde i limana, akoantoaka uwena angguru mokobura, mobukeakana tee kajalona rampa. Incia bhealali antona, mamudhaakana o kulimpasana bheasumpua tee apepadhaia bhari-bharia mia madhaki i dunia.
75.10: Maka iaku saʼumurua bhekupakoleleaka giu incia sii, Iaku bhekulaguaka lagu kapujia to Aulataʼala isombana Yakub.
75.11: Iaku bhekupekakatu bhari-bharia kakaana mia madhaki, maka o kakaana mia mobanara bhekurangania.

76.1: To kapalana molaguna. Tee atikiakea kecapi. Zaburuna Asaf to lagu.
76.2: Manga miana Yuda amatau Aulataʼala, sarona amaoge i Israel.
76.3: Bhanuana i Yerusalem, tee tampana mbooresana i Gunu Sion.
76.4: Iwe sumakomo Incia akatuki bhari-bharia manga ewangana potimbeana musuna, bhari-bharia panana mokakila-kila, katangkesina, tee hancuna. Sela
76.5: Ingkoo ukocahea mpuu! Alabhi umulia minaaka i manga gunu modhaangiana i zamani mangenge.
76.6: Hasilina potimbea padhamo atorampasi minaaka i manga mia mobarani. Manga incia atokole saʼumurua; inda dhaangia minaaka i tantarana sumai momembalina moangkana limana uka.
76.7: E Aulataʼala isombana Yakub, roonamo kagorampangimu, manga ajara tee mosawikia amalimpu.
76.8: Atotuu-totuu Ingkoo utomaeka mpuu! Incema momembalina mopotaangina i aroamu wakutuuna upamuru?
76.9: Minaaka i sorogaa uparangoakea o kambotuna kahukumumu, alamu uka amaeka tee inda tee uuʼuuna
76.10: wakutuuna Aulataʼala abhangu to apaʼadili tee apasalaamati bhari-bharia mia motopisaki i alamu. Sela
76.11: Satotuuna o pamurumu tee maanusia imembaliakamu utopuji, tee bhilaana pamurumu sumai upamembalia kabhokena tangamu.
76.12: Pojanjimo tee upomeamea o tolauna onimu sumai i KAWASANA OPU, Aulataʼalamu! Taroakamo bhari-bharia modhaangiana i saripina abhawa pasombaana to Incia molaengana imaeka.
76.13: Incia mopekamatena akalana manga mia mokokuasa, tee manga raja i dunia amaeka i aroana.

77.1: To kapalana molaguna. Zaburuna Asaf to Yedutun.
77.2: Iaku kugora i Aulataʼala tee suara momandii, i Aulataʼala kugora, mamudhaakana aperangoiaku.
77.3: I piamo itu, i eona kumaseke kupeelo Kawasana Opu, tee wakutuuna amalo kutanaaka limaku inda kumangumangule; ngangarandaku inda aunda atotautau.
77.4: Ande kuudhani Aulataʼala, kupekidhei; ande kupeudhaudhani, ahanda amaule ngangarandaku. Sela
77.5: Ingkoo mopamembalina mataku sadhaadhaa atobungkale; alilaho o namisiku sabutuna inda amembali kupogauaka opeopea.
77.6: Kufikifikiriaka zamani i piamo itu, tee i tao-tao molapa.
77.7: Iaku kuudhani laguku i wakutuuna amalo, kupeudhaudhani i nuncana ngangarandaku, tee o rohiku apekaabha-abha,
77.8: "Buaka Kawasana Opu bheamanga bholi to saʼumurua? Tee indamo uka manga maasiaka?
77.9: Buaka atopadhamo o kaasina molagina? Buaka amapupumo janjina saʼumurua?
77.10: Buaka o Aulataʼala amalingumo to manga maasiaka? Buaka i nuncana pamuruna Incia atutubhi rahumatina? Sela
77.11: Kasiimpo kupogau, "Siimo kaporona incaku ande o lima kaanana Momalangana Mpuu indamo ajaganiaku."
77.12: Iaku bhekuudhani opea mopadhana ipewauna KAWASANA OPU. Umbe, iaku bhekuudhani manga giu inda momentela mopadhana ipewaumu i zamani i piamo itu.
77.13: Iaku bhekuudhaudhania i nuncana ngangarandaku bhari-bharia ikarajaamu, tee kufikifikiria bhari-bharia giu momaoge mopadhana ipewaumu.
77.14: Dhalamu amangkilo, e Aulataʼala, Dewa iapai momaogena mboo Aulataʼalamami?
77.15: Ingkoomo Aulataʼala mopewauna giu inda momentela. Ingkoo padhamo ususuaka kuasamu i tanga-tangana manga lipu.
77.16: Tee limamu utolosi uumatimu, siitumo siwuluna Yakub tee Yusuf. Sela
77.17: E Aulataʼala, uwe akamatako, uwe akamatako tee amaeka; umbe, andalaoge uka atorende.
77.18: Taʼina ngalu apasapo wao maranca, tee o laiana uka akanduu-nduu; manga anana panamu akakila-kila.
77.19: Ruuna guntumu atorango i nuncana tambusisi, tee o bhibhitomu apekainawa dunia. Alamu uka akolendu tee atorende.
77.20: Dhalamu alaloi tawo, tee udhala upolimba i andalaoge; maka o tandarana aemu inda atokamata.
77.21: Ingkoo ugembalaaka uumatimu mboomo mia mowuluna gulumana dumba tee upake limana Musa tee Harun to akapalai manga incia.

78.1: Lagu kaadharina Asaf. E lipuku, rangoa o kaadhariku, taaia o talingamu tee opea ipogauakaku.
78.2: Iaku bhekubungkale ngangaku to kupakawaaka ibarati, tee bhekupogauaka manga pogau rahasia modhaangiana minaaka i zamani piamo itu,
78.3: siitumo manga giu mopadhana irangomami tee imataumami, tee mopadhana ipetulatulaakana manga opu-opuamami.
78.4: Ingkami inda bhetabuniakea minaaka i anaanana manga incia, maka ingkami bhetapetulatulaakea i siwuluna sapadhana ingkami manga kapujia to KAWASANA OPU tee kakaana, tee manga giu inda momentela mopadhana ipewauna.
78.5: Incia padhamo apakawaaka tuturana to siwuluna Yakub, tee apatotapuaka Hukumuna Taurati i tanga-tangana miana Israel. Incia atumpu manga opu-opuata to aadhariakea i anana manga incia
78.6: mamudhaakana o siwulu bhemoumbana amataua, siitumo manga anaana bhemolaahirina naile itu. Kasiimpo manga incia uka bheaumba tee apetulatulaakea i anana manga incia.
78.7: Tee mboo sumai manga incia bheadhika kaparacaeana i Aulataʼala, tee inda amalinguaka opea ipewauna Aulataʼala, maka ataʼatia manga parintana;
78.8: tee bholi mboomo opu-opuana miana Israel, adorohaka tee aewangiaku, siitumo opu-opuana tee ngangarandana inda atotapu i Aulataʼala, tee manga incia inda ataʼatia.
78.9: Miana Efraim mokoewangaakana pana sumai, abhalili tee apalai i eona potimbea.
78.10: Manga incia inda akenia pekatangka o pojanjiana tee Aulataʼala, tee amendeu aose hukumuna.
78.11: Manga incia amalinguakea opea mopadhana ikarajaana Kawasana Opu tee amalinguaka manga giu inda momentela mopadhana ipakamataakana to manga incia.
78.12: I aroana opu-opuana manga incia, Aulataʼala apewau giu inda momentela, i atina Zoan i Tana Mesir.
78.13: Incia aweta tawo tee ataroakea manga incia apolimba, tee o uwe apekakatea mboomo rindi.
78.14: Wakutuuna pontanga eo manga incia atondaia apapooseakea tee taʼina ngalu, tee wakutuuna malo manga incia apapooseakea tee caheana waa.
78.15: Incia aweta manga bhatu i tana matuu, tee adhawua manga asumpu ataralabhi-labhi, mboomo minaaka i andalaoge.
78.16: Incia apalimba uwe minaaka i bhatu, sabutuna o uwe sumai asiwulu mboomo umala.
78.17: Maka manga incia dhaangiapo uka torotorosu akodosa tee adorohaka i Momalangana i tana matuu.
78.18: Manga incia acobai Aulataʼala i nuncana ngangarandana tee atuntu kinande ipeeluna apokana tee nawusuuna.
78.19: Manga incia aewangi Aulataʼala tee apogau, "Amembali buaka o Aulataʼala apasiapu kinande i tana matuu?
78.20: Atotuumo ande o bhatu abhebhea sabutuna apidhiaka uwe tee manga umala apasiwulua tee alua, maka amembali buaka Incia manga dhawuaka roti, atawa amembali buaka Incia apasiapu dagi to uumatina?"
78.21: Sabutuna o KAWASANA OPU apamuru wakutuuna arango giu incia sumai; waa morore akangkanai uumatina Yakub, tee o pamuruna ahandamo mpuu to miana Israel,
78.22: roonamo manga incia inda aʼiimani i Aulataʼala tee inda aparacaea ande Incia bhemopasalaamatina manga incia.
78.23: Maka Incia adhawu parintana to laiana, tee abungkale manga bhambana sorogaa;
78.24: Incia apasapo waona manna mamudhaakana manga incia amembali akande, tee mboo sumai Incia adhawuaka to manga incia o gandum minaaka i sorogaa.
78.25: Maanusia akande rotina malaaʼekati; Aulataʼala adhawuaka manga incia kinande motaralabhi-labhi.
78.26: Incia atowii ngaluna timbu i laiana, tee atowii ngaluna salata tee kuasana;
78.27: Incia apasapo waona dagi mboomo ngawu o kabharina, tee manu-manu mboomo kabharina bhone i tawo.
78.28: Incia apakotibu manga manu-manu sumai i tanga-tangana pokemaana, i saripina mbooresana manga incia.
78.29: Kasiimpo manga incia akande sakawana amambosu mpuu, roonamo Aulataʼala padhamo adhawuakea opea ipeeluna manga incia apokana tee nawusuuna.
78.30: Maka indapo uka manga incia atumpu incana, siitumo tangasaana o kinande dhaangiapo i nuncana ngangana manga incia,
78.31: pamuruna Aulataʼala aumba tee abhali manga incia tee ahobuti inyawana manga jampina manga incia, tee apekamate manga ana mangurana Israel.
78.32: Moomini mboo sumai, manga incia sadhaadhaa akodosa, manga incia inda aparacaea tee manga giu inda momentela mopadhana ipewauna.
78.33: Rampaakanamo sumai, Kawasana Opu apekamate manga incia mboomo sampearo tahela poinunca, tee o dhadhina manga incia apepadhaia i nuncana balaa motomaeka mokawana inda inamu-namu.
78.34: Siitumo ande Incia apekamate sagaa minaaka i manga incia, siimpomo manga incia apeeloa; manga incia atobamo tee abhalili apeelo Aulataʼala tee mpuu-mpuuna incana.
78.35: Manga incia audhania ande o Aulataʼala gunu bhatuna manga incia, tee o Aulataʼala Momalanga motolosina manga incia.
78.36: Maka manga incia atipu Aulataʼala tee ngangana, tee agau-gaua tee dhelana manga incia.
78.37: Ngangarandana manga incia inda atotapu i Aulataʼala; manga incia inda akeniaka janjina.
78.38: Maka roonamo Incia amaasiaka uumatina, sumaimo Aulataʼala aʼamponi kasalahana manga incia tee inda apabinasea. Sampe Incia uka amenturu ataangi amarana, tee inda apalimba pamuruna.
78.39: Incia amataua ande o maanusia inda abakaa, manga incia mboomo ngalu molalo tee inda ambuli pendua.
78.40: Manga incia amenturu mpuu adorohaka tee Aulataʼala, tee apekaporo incana i tana matuu.
78.41: Dhaangia pia mpearo manga incia acobai Aulataʼala, tee apekaporo incana Momangkilona, Aulataʼala isombana miana Israel.
78.42: Manga incia inda audhania o kuasana, tee inda audhania i wakutuuna Incia atolosi manga incia minaaka i bhalina;
78.43: i wakutuuna Incia apewau manga tanda inda momentela i Tana Mesir, tee manga muuzizati i atina Zoan.
78.44: Aulataʼala abhalii manga umala apamembalia raa, mboo sumai uka tee manga siwuluna uwe, sabutuna manga miana Mesir inda amembali asumpua.
78.45: Incia aumbaaka gulumana lale mosampa to mopepadhaina manga incia, tee aumbaaka barakaka to mopahancuruna manga incia.
78.46: Incia adhawuaka hasilina timpuana manga incia mamudhaakana akandea o ulo-ulo, tee o hasilina kanguleana bukuna manga incia to akandea kabhoro.
78.47: Incia apahancuru puuna angguruna manga incia tee wao bhatu, tee manga puuna arana manga incia tee alona esi.
78.48: Incia ataroaka o gulumana binatana manga incia akangkanaia waona bhatu, tee o gulumana kadhambaakana manga incia akangkanaia bherese.
78.49: Aulataʼala arambasaka pamuruna mokarore-rore to manga incia; amarana, lumbuna incana, tee kapiina incana, mboomo sarombonga malaaʼekati moumbana to mopacilakana manga incia.
78.50: Aulataʼala ataroakea o pamuruna akarore-rore, tee inda ajoli-joli manga incia mamudhaakana atopabinasa, maka o inyawana manga incia apasaraakea i panyaki imateaka.
78.51: Incia apekamate bhari-bharia ana umane tumpe i Mesir, siitumo bhaa-bhaana o kakaana manga incia i pokemaa i Tana Ham.
78.52: Maka o uumatina karona abhawea alimba mboomo dumba. Incia atonda uumatina i tana matuu mboomo gulumana kadhambaaka.
78.53: Incia akapalai uumatina sakawana asalaamati, sabutuna o uumatina inda amaeka; sainamo musuna atanggalamu i nuncana tawo.
78.54: Incia abhawa uumatina sakawana i tanana momangkilo, i gunu incia siimo, mopadhana ipokawaakana tee lima kaanana.
78.55: Incia uka apadhencu manga lipu mosagaanana minaaka i aroana uumatina, kasiimpo apapodhawu-dhawuakea tee kaʼukuru o lipu tinaurakana sumai to manga incia, tee ataroaka manga lipuna Israel ambooresi kemana manga musuna.
78.56: Maka manga incia acobai Aulataʼala Momalanga, tee adorohaka i Incia. Manga incia inda aosea o parintana,
78.57: tee manga incia inda ataʼati tee ahianati pojanjiana tee Aulataʼala mboomo opu-opuana; manga incia inda amembali atotangkaaka mboomo pana mobengko.
78.58: Manga incia apamembali Aulataʼala aʼamara tee tampana momalanga to apasombaaka kurubani; manga incia apamembali Aulataʼala akaura-ura tee manga patuna dewana.
78.59: Wakutuuna o Aulataʼala arango giu incia sumai, Incia apamuru, tee amendeu atarima miana Israel sampeampearo!
78.60: Incia amendeumo amboore i tampana mbooresana i Silo, siitumo o Kema Momangkilo, tampana mbooresana i tanga-tangana maanusia.
78.61: Incia ataroakea o sorongana pojanjiana atotaangi, tee o tanda kamuliangina amandawu i limana bhali.
78.62: Incia ataroaka musu apekamate uumatina tee hancu, tee apawoa amarana i uumatina karona.
78.63: Manga ana umane momangurana manga incia akandea waa sabutuna inda atorango o laguna kawia to manga kabuabua.
78.64: Manga imamuna manga incia amateaka ewanga, tee manga iaiarona imamu sumai inda atangisi umanena.
78.65: Kasiimpo abhangumo o KAWASANA OPU mboomo mia siimpo mobhanguna mokole, mboomo jampi asambo-sambo sapadhana asumpu angguru.
78.66: Incia apewau manga bhalina apalaiaka karona; Incia apewau manga incia amaea saʼumurua.
78.67: Incia amendeu siwuluna Yusuf tee inda apili sukuna Efraim;
78.68: maka Incia apili sukuna Yuda, siitumo Gunu Sion imaasiakana.
78.69: Incia apabhangu tampana momangkilo mboomo kalangana laiana, tee mboomo alamu, momatangka to saʼumurua.
78.70: Aulataʼala apili Daud, o bhatuana, tee aalea wakutuuna incia tangasaana ajagani gulumana dumba.
78.71: Aulataʼala aala Daud minaaka i karajaana awulu manga dumba mopadudu sumai tee apamembalia mogembalaakana siwuluna Yakub, siitumo o miana Israel, uumatina tee tinaurakana.
78.72: Tee karelana totona incana o Daud agembalaaka uumatina, tee kakidhana incia amataua tuaapa o carana akapalai manga incia.

79.1: Zaburuna Asaf. E Aulataʼala, manga lipu inda momatauko apesuamo i nuncana tana tinaurakamu! Manga incia apanaajisi Bhanuamu Momangkilo; manga incia padhamo apahancuru saangua kota Yerusalem.
79.2: Manga incia padhamo adhawuaka maeatina manga bhatuamu to kinandena manga manu-manu i laiana, tee o dagina maeatina manga mia mosaalihi to binata maila.
79.3: Manga incia padhamo alali raana manga mia sumai mboomo uwe i saangua kota Yerusalem, tee inda dhaangia mokoburua.
79.4: Ingkami tamembalimo kahinana manga sarimbanuamami, tee tamembali kaele-ele tee giu ipogauakana manga mia isaripimami.
79.5: E KAWASANA OPU, sakawana naepia? Buaka Ingkoo bheupamuru to saʼumurua tee amaramu bhearore mboomo waa roonamo ukaura-ura?
79.6: Pasapomea o pamurumu i bhawona manga lipu inda momatauko, tee i bhawona manga pamarinta inda mosombako!
79.7: Sababuna manga incia padhamo apepadhaia uumatimu, siitumo siwuluna Yakub, tee apahancuru mbooresana.
79.8: Bholi upatanggoaka to ingkami o kasalahana manga opu-opuamami, taroakamo o rahumatimu amadhei akawa i ingkami roonamo amatemo akalamami.
79.9: Manga tulungimo, e Aulataʼala mopasalaamatina ingkami, to kaogesana saromu. Rampaakanamo saromu, manga rambasaka tee manga amponi minaaka i dosa-dosamami.
79.10: Bholi utaroakea manga lipu mosagaanana aabha, "Iapai o Aulataʼalana manga incia?" Taroakamo ingkami takamatako wakutuuna ubalasi raana manga bhatuamu motopekamatena, mamudhaakana manga lipu amataua.
79.11: Taroakamo o pekidheina manga mia mototaangi akawa i aroamu; rampaakanamo kaogena kuasamu, taroakamo adhadhiaka manga mia mopadhana itantuaka to atopekamate.
79.12: Balasia manga lipu i saripimami sumai pitu kali lipa o kahina mboomo mopadhana ipewauna manga incia to Ingkoo, e Kawasana Opu!
79.13: Sumaimo ingkami o uumatimu, dumba igembalamu sii, bhetasukuru i Ingkoo saʼumurua, tee minaaka i siwulumami sakawana siwulu bhemoumbana bheapetulatulaaka kaogesana saromu.

80.1: To kapalana molaguna. Aose lagu: Kamba-kamba Bakung. Laguna kasakusii. Zaburuna Asaf.
80.2: Maasangia urangoa, e Gembalana miana Israel, e Ingkoo mokapalaina siwuluna Yusuf mboomo gulumana dumba! Ingkoo mokokauncuramakana i bhawona manga malaaʼekatina kerub, utiumbamo tee caheamu
80.3: i aroana Efraim, Binyamin, tee Manasye! Susuakamea o kuasamu tee uumbamo to upasalaamati ingkami!
80.4: E Aulataʼala, pambulimea pendua o kadhaangiamami; taroakamo o roumu akocahea sabutuna ingkami bhetasalaamati.
80.5: E KAWASANA OPU, Aulataʼalana saangua alamu, sakawana naepia upamuru, moomini o uumatimu adoʼa?
80.6: Ingkoo udhawua kaporona inca to kinandena manga incia, tee lolu mobhari to uwe isumpuna.
80.7: Ingkoo umanga pamembali giu ipotagaliakana manga lipu isaripimami, tee o musumami uka manga ele-ele.
80.8: E Aulataʼalana saangua alamu, pambulimea pendua o kadhaangiamami, maasangia o roumu akocahea mamudhaakana ingkami tasalaamati.
80.9: Uumatimu mboomo puuna angguru Ingkoo ubhawea upalimbaia minaaka i Mesir; upadhencu manga lipu mosagaanana, kasiimpo o puuna angguru sumai upombulaia.
80.10: Ingkoo upekangkiloakea tana to incia, kulesena atuwu tee apabuke saangua lipu.
80.11: Manga gunu asalibumbuakea tee ngkamia-miana, tee manga rahana atutubhi manga puuna aras momaoge.
80.12: Manga rangkana adhola sakawana i tawo, tee manga lolona akawa i Umala Efrat.
80.13: Pokia Ingkoo ubhongka manga tondona sabutuna bhari-bharia mia molalo amembali atobhe bhakena?
80.14: Bhawu abhembarua, tee bhari-bharia binata maila akandea.
80.15: E Aulataʼalana saangua alamu, maimo umbuli i uumatimu, tontomea minaaka i sorogaa tee ukamatamea! Maheruakamea o puuna angguru sii,
80.16: puuna angguru ipombulamu tee kuasamu, tee o tunana ipekatangkamu to karomu.
80.17: Musu padhamo apale tee atunu puuna angguru sii. Maasangia manga incia abinasa rampaakanamo kagorampangimu.
80.18: Maka taroakamo limamu adhaangia to mia i weta i kaanamu, siitumo to anana maanusia ipekakaamu to karomu.
80.19: Tee mboo sumai, ingkami inda bhetasowo minaaka i Ingkoo; jagania o dhadhimami, sumaimo ingkami bhetasombako.
80.20: E KAWASANA OPU, Aulataʼalana saangua alamu, pambulimea pendua o kadhaangiamami, taroakamo o roumu akocahea mamudhaakana ingkami tasalaamati.

81.1: To kapalana molaguna. Mboomo lagu Gitit. Zaburuna Asaf.
81.2: Sambo-sambomo to Kawasana Opu, o kakaata. Sambomo tee ukaunde-undemo to Aulataʼala isombana Yakub.
81.3: Lagumo tee upakoonimea o ganda-ganda, pakoonimea o kecapi momandii upapooseakea tee suarana gambusu.
81.4: Towiimea o torompe i bula mobhaau, i wakutuuna kainawana bula, i eona raraeata.
81.5: Siitumo saangu katotapu to miana Israel, saangu hukumu minaaka i Aulataʼala isombana Yakub.
81.6: Incia apatotapua amembali saangu kaudhania to siwuluna Yusuf, wakutuuna Incia aewangi Tana Mesir. Iaku kurango suara inda imatauku,
81.7: "Iaku padhamo kuangka bhawaamu minaaka i awaamu, tee o limamu kupalapea minaaka i langka kasodhaamu.
81.8: I nuncana kaseke ingkoo ugora, kasiimpo kurambasakako. Kulawani ingkoo minaaka i tampa rahasiana guntu, tee Iaku padhamo kuuji ingkoo i matana uwe Meriba. Sela
81.9: E uumatiku, rangoa opea iudhaniakaku! E Israel, ande mpuu ingkoo unda uperangoiaku!
81.10: Bholi dhaangia i tanga-tangamiu aulataʼala mosagaanana, tee bholimo usomba dewana lipu mosagaanana.
81.11: Iakumo KAWASANA OPU, Aulataʼalamu, mobhawako ulimba minaaka i tana Mesir. Bungkalea ngangamu pekaewa-ewa, tee bhekuantokia kupabukea."
81.12: "Maka, o uumatiku amendeu aperangoiaku, Israel amendeu atungku i aroaku.
81.13: Sababuna sumai, Iaku kutaroaka manga incia amentagali torosu, sabutuna manga incia adhadhi aose haejatina karona.
81.14: Ande mpuu o uumatiku aunda aperangoiaku, ande mpuu Israel aunda adhadhi mboomo kapeeluku,
81.15: sumaimo bhekuagoria to kupekatalo musuna manga incia, tee kuewangi bhari-bharia bhalina manga incia.
81.16: Manga mia mobancina KAWASANA OPU naile itu bheatungku tee arengku i aroana, tee kahukumuna to manga incia bheanamisia saʼumurua.
81.17: Maka, bhekudhawuakako kinande minaaka i gandum momalapena mpuu, tee uka iaku bhekupekambosuakako golana uwani minaaka gunu bhatu."

82.1: Zaburuna Asaf. Aulataʼala akapalai sidangi i sorogaa. Incia amembali haakimu mobhotukiakana parakara i tanga-tangana manga "aulataʼala,"
82.2: "Sakawana naepia ingkomiu bheuala kambotu tee cara inda moʼadili tee uewaaka manga mia madhaki? Sela
82.3: Ewaakamea o hakuna mia momisikini tee ana maelu, dhawuakea kaʼadili to mia motopisaki tee mia inda mokokadhaangia.
82.4: Pasalaamatia o mia momisikini tee mia monarakaa, rambasakea manga incia minaaka i limana mia madhaki."
82.5: Ingkomiu inda umataua, ingkomiu uka inda umaʼanaia, ingkomiu udhala i nuncana kalalanda; bhari-bharia ariina alamu sii atolendu tee tuturana raʼeati amarungga.
82.6: Iaku padhamo kufirimani, "Ingkomiu sii 'manga aulataʼala' tee bhari-bharikomiu sii o anana Momalangana;
82.7: moomini mboo sumai, ingkomiu bheumate mboomo maanusia, tee mboomo manga kaogesa, ingkomiu uka bheumate."
82.8: E Aulataʼala, kakaromo, adilia o dunia sii; roonamo bhari-bharia lipu satotuuna o pewauamu.

83.2: E Aulataʼala, bholi inda tee uuʼuumu, bholi ukatongo-tongo tee usaku limamu, e Aulataʼala!
83.3: Kamatamea, manga musumu apewau karobho, manga mia mobanciko apekalangamo bhaana.
83.4: Manga incia apadhaangia pomufaakati madhaki to aewangi uumatimu, tee aposaangu to aewangi manga mia ijaganimu.
83.5: Pogauna manga incia, "Mai tapabinasea o lipuna Israel, mamudhaakana o sarona Israel inda atoudhani!"
83.6: Manga incia aposaangu i nuncana saangu haejati, tee apojanji to aewangiko.
83.7: Manga incia satotuuna o mia momboorena i pokemaana Edom tee miana Ismail, miana Moab tee miana Hagar,
83.8: Gebal, Amon, Amalek, Tana Filistin tee raʼeatina Tirus.
83.9: Tee o Asyur uka aposaangu tee manga incia, amembali motulungina siwuluna Lut. Sela
83.10: Pewaumea manga incia mboomo ipewaumu i miana Midian, tee mboomo ipewaumu i Sisera tee Yabin i bhiwina Umala Kison,
83.11: mopadhana ipabinasamu minaaka i nuncana dunia, tee o maeatina amembali karombu to pasuburuana tana.
83.12: Pamembalia o kaogesana manga incia mboomo Oreb tee Zeb, patungkua o rajana manga incia mboomo Zebah tee Salmuna
83.13: mopogauna, "Mai takuasaia o lipu mbooresana Aulataʼala!"
83.14: E Aulataʼala, pamembalia manga incia mboomo ngawu mopolaka, mboomo laena bhae ibhaleakana ngalu.
83.15: Mboomo waa motununa koo, tee mboomo rorena waa mopekangauna manga gunu,
83.16: pajerea manga incia tee garuramu, tee upekaekaia tee tambusisimu.
83.17: Taroakamea o rouna manga incia abukeaka aebu tee taroakamo saromu, e KAWASANA OPU, abalasiaka karona.
83.18: Taroakamo manga incia amaea tee amaidhiidhi incana saʼumurua; taroakamo manga incia anamisi kaea tee amate.
83.19: Taroakamo manga incia amataua ande tangkanamo Ingkoo mokosarona KAWASANA OPU, Momalangana i saangua dunia.

84.1: To kapalana molaguna. Mboomo lagu Gitit. Zaburuna miana Korah.
84.2: Tapanamo kasanaana o tampana mbooresamu, e KAWASANA OPUNA saangua alamu!
84.3: Incaku apemeliliaka bhanuana KAWASANA OPU, sampemo kumalute roonamo pemeliliku sumai. Saangua badaku tee jiwaku akaunde-unde to Aulataʼala modhadhi.
84.4: Manu-manu ntomintomi apotibhaaka bhanua to karona, tee o manu-manu walawalangke apotibhaaka saangu poteo, to tampana adhika manga anana i saripina manga tampana tunuana kurubanimu, e KAWASANA OPUNA saangua alamu, e Rajaku tee Aulataʼalaku.
84.5: Amasanaamo o mia momboorena i Bhanuamu, Manga incia atorotorosu apujiko. Sela
84.6: Amasanaamo mia mopotibhaakana kakaa minaaka i Ingkoo, tee o ngangarandana apemeliliaka to aziara i Gunu Sion.
84.7: Wakutuuna manga incia alalo i Mbolonga Baka, tampa incia sumai abhaliia amembali matana uwe. Bulaana wao bhaa-bhaana uka abhari aumbaaka barakati to mbolonga sumai.
84.8: Samangengena alingka sahandana uka o kakaana, sakawana apoaro tee Aulataʼala mobhawoakana bhari-bharia dewa i Sion.
84.9: E KAWASANA OPU, Aulataʼalana saangua alamu, perangoia o doʼaku. Tilikimea, e Aulataʼala isombana Yakub! Sela
84.10: Tontomea o raja mopadhana ipilimu, e Aulataʼala, kamatamea o rouna mia mopadhana ilantimu to katangkesina uumatimu.
84.11: Roonamo amalape saeo i aroana Bhanuamu minaaka i sarewu eo i tampa mosagaanana. Iaku labhina kumaasiaka kumembali mojaganina Bhanuana Aulataʼalaku minaaka i kumboore i kemana mia madhaki.
84.12: Roonamo KAWASANA OPU, Aulataʼala satotuuna o matanaeo tee o katangkesita; Incia manga dhawuaka rahumati tee kamuliangi. KAWASANA OPU sadia apewau kalape tee manga mia moosena dhala mobanara.
84.13: E KAWASANA OPUNA saangua alamu, akaunde-undemo bhari-bharia mia moparacaeako!

85.1: To kapalana molaguna. Zaburuna miana Korah.
85.2: E KAWASANA OPU, Ingkoo padhamo upewau malape to lipumu minaaka i piamo itu, Ingkoo padhamo upekalapea pendua o kadhaangiana miana Israel.
85.3: Ingkoo padhamo uʼamponia o dosana uumatimu, tee ututubhia bhari-bharia dosana manga incia. Sela
85.4: Bhari-bharia iʼamaraakamu padhamo upauntoa, tee upanaindamea o pamurumu mokarore-rorena sumai.
85.5: Sii-sii pambulimea pendua o kadhaangiamami mboomo i piamo itu, e Aulataʼala, manga mopasalaamatina, tee upekaridhomea o pamurumu to ingkami.
85.6: Buaka saʼumurua Ingkoo bheupamuru tee ingkami? Buaka saʼumurua bheutorotorosu uʼamara tee ingkami tee siwulumami?
85.7: Buaka Ingkoo umendeu manga padhadhi pendua mamudhaakana o uumatimu akaunde-unde rampaakanamo Ingkoo?
85.8: E KAWASANA OPU, susuakamea o kaasimu molagina to ingkami, tee mangadhawuakamo kasalaamatimu.
85.9: Iaku gauku kuperangoi opea bheifirimaniakana KAWASANA OPU, siitumo o Aulataʼala, roonamo Incia bheafirimaniaka kasanaa to uumatina tee manga mia mosaalihi. Maka manga incia bholi apendua akabhongo-bhongo.
85.10: Satotuuna o kasalaamati minaaka i Kawasana Opu amakasu tee manga mia momaekana tee Incia mamudhaakana o kamuliangina amembali amboore i liputa.
85.11: Kaasi molagina tee pojanjia inda momabhotu bheapokawa, kabanara tee kasanaa bheaposakulaka.
85.12: Kataʼatina maanusia i Kawasana Opu bheatuwu minaaka i tana, tee o kabanara bheapotonto minaaka i sorogaa.
85.13: KAWASANA OPU uka bhearahumatiaka kalapena, tee o liputa bheakohasiliaka timpua motaralabhi-labhi.
85.14: Kabanara bheaporikanaaka dhalana Aulataʼala, tee apasiapuakea dhala to Incia.

86.1: Doʼana Daud. E KAWASANA OPU, perangoiaku tee ulawaniakumo, roonamo kunarakaa tee kumisikini.
86.2: Jagania o inyawaku roonamo iaku kutaʼatiko, pasalaamatia o bhatuamu moparacaeana tee Ingkoo.
86.3: Maasiakaaku, e Kawasana Opuku, roonamo saeoa kudoʼa i Ingkoo.
86.4: Paunde-undemea o ngangarandana bhatuamu sii, roonamo i Ingkoomo tampaku kusomba, e Kawasana Opu.
86.5: E Aualataʼala, Ingkoo umalape tee upekaʼamponi, kaasimu molagina ataralabhi-labhi to bhari-bharia mia modoʼana i Ingkoo.
86.6: E KAWASANA OPU, perangoimea o doʼaku, tee faduliakaaku wakutuuna kuemani tulungi.
86.7: Wakutuuna kumaseke iaku kugora i Ingkoo roonamo Ingkoo bheutarima doʼaku.
86.8: Inda dhaangia mopokanana tee Ingkoo i tanga-tangana manga dewa, e Kawasana Opu, tee inda dhaangia mopokanana tee opea ipewaumu.
86.9: Bhari-bharia lipu ipadhaangiamu bheaumba tee asuju i aroamu, e Kawasana Opu, tee bheamuliangia o saromu.
86.10: Sababuna Ingkoo umakaa tee upewau manga giu inda momentela. Tangkanamo Ingkoo o Aulataʼala.
86.11: E KAWASANA OPU, adhariakaaku dhalamu, mamudhaakana kudhadhi kuosea kabanaramu; pekatangkea incaku mamudhaakana kuhoromati saromu.
86.12: E Aulataʼala, KAWASANA OPU, iaku bhekupujiko tee mpuu-mpuuna incaku, tee bhekumuliangi saromu saʼumurua.
86.13: Roonamo kaasimu molagina amaoge mpuu to iaku, Ingkoo padhamo upasalaamatiaku minaaka i mate.
86.14: E Aulataʼala, manga mia mosombo ahumbuniaku; rombongana manga mia masega gauna apekamateaku, tee manga incia inda afaduliakako.
86.15: Maka Ingkoo e Kawasana Opu, satotuuna o Aulataʼala mobukeakana kaasi, usabara tee ataralabhi-labhi o kaasimu molagina tee pojanjiamu tee iaku inda amabhotu.
86.16: Tontoaku tee umaasiakaakumo; dhawuakea bhatuamu sii kakaamu tee upasalaamatiaku, roonamo mboomo inaku, iaku uka kulaianiko.
86.17: Dhawuakaaku saangu tanda ande Ingkoo umalape mamudhaakana manga mia mobanciaku amaea wakutuuna akamatea ande Ingkoo, KAWASANA OPU, motulungiaku tee mopekatangkana incaku.

87.1: Zaburuna miana Korah, saangu lagu. KAWASANA OPU apakaro kotana i bhawona tubuna gunu momangkilo.
87.2: KAWASANA OPU amaasiaka bhambana lawana Sion alabhi minaaka i bhari-bharia tampa mosagaanana modhaangiana i Israel, lipuna Yakub.
87.3: Manga mia apogauakako tee giu momulia, e kotana Aulataʼala. Sela
87.4: Pogauna Kawasana Opu, "Iaku bhekusarongi Rahab tee Babel i tanga-tangana lipu momatauaku. Tee uka o Tana Filistin, Tirus tee Etiopia, 'Manga incia sii uka atoabhi amembali raʼeatina Sion.' "
87.5: Maka to Sion, manga mia bheapogau, "Mia incia sii tee mia incia sumai alaahiri i nuncana, tee o Aulataʼala Momalangana sakaro-karona bhemopekatangkea."
87.6: KAWASANA OPU bhealentua wakutuuna daftaraana manga lipu, "Manga incia sii uka aabhia o raʼeatina Sion." Sela
87.7: Apoose amanari, manga mia bhealagu, "Minaaka i Sion ingkita tatarima manga giu momalape mboomo mia momboorena i saripina matana uwe."

88.1: Doʼa to kapalana molaguna. Zaburuna miana Korah. Mboomo lagu: Kasukarana Kanarakaa. Lagu kaadharina Heman, miana Ezrahi.
88.2: E KAWASANA OPU, e Aulataʼala mopasalaamatiaku, iaku kukagora-gora o eo tee malo i aroamu.
88.3: Taroakamo o doʼaku akawa i aroamu. Maasangia urangoa o goraku.
88.4: Roonamo abharimo mpuu kunamisi kanarakaa, tee saidhepo kumate.
88.5: Iaku kutolentu i tanga-tangana mia mopesuana i liana koburu, tee o kakaana bukuku kabilanga atopadhamo.
88.6: Iaku mboomo mia motobholi i tanga-tangana mia mate, mboomo mia motopekamate ipatidhole i nuncana koburu, tee indamo uudhaniaku uka, roonamo kutorambasakamo minaaka i limamu.
88.7: Ingkoo udhikaaku i nuncana koburu i tambe mpuu, i tampa momandala tee momalalanda.
88.8: Pamurumu amatamo mpuu kunamisia, tee utaburiaku mboomo ewona tawo. Sela
88.9: Ingkoo upekaridhoakaaku manga musirahaku, tee upewaua manga incia amarikaaku. Iaku kumboore i nuncana kurunga tee inda amembali kulimba;
88.10: mataku amarea roonamo kanarakaa. E KAWASANA OPU, saesaeo iaku kugora i Ingkoo, iaku kutaanaka limaku i Ingkoo.
88.11: Buaka Ingkoo bheupewau muuzizati to mia mate? Inda! Buaka o rohi bheabhangu to apuji Ingkoo? Inda! Sela
88.12: Buaka o kaasimu molagina atopakoleleaka i nuncana koburu, tee o lele pojanjiamu inda amabhotu atopakoleleaka i tampana pabinasaana mia? Inda!
88.13: Dhaangia buaka momatauna muuzizatimu i nuncana kalalanda, tee momatauna kabanaramu i lipu tampana sagala giu atomalinguaka? Inda!
88.14: Maka iaku kupekee kuemani tulungi i Ingkoo, e KAWASANA OPU, saeona mpuu akawamo o doʼaku i aroamu.
88.15: E KAWASANA OPU, pokia Ingkoo ubhanakaaku? Pokia ubuniakea o roumu minaaka i karoku?
88.16: Minaaka dhaangia kumaidhiidhi kunarakaa tee saidhepo kumate, inda kukapoia kutanggo manga kamingkiri iumbaakamu.
88.17: Pamurumu mokarore-rore akangkanaiaku; kamingkiri ahumbuniaku sakawana kubinasa.
88.18: Bhari-bharia sumai akangkanaiaku mboomo mawa saeoa tee alibuaku minaaka i bhari-bharia rope.
88.19: Manga sabhangkaku tee musirahaku upekaridhoakaaku minaaka i karoku; sii-sii o sabhangkaku soomo kalalanda.

89.2: Iaku bhekulaguaka lagu kaasina KAWASANA OPU molagina saʼumurua, tee ngangaku bhekupakoleleaka pojanjiamu inda amabhotu saʼumurua zamani.
89.3: Iaku kupogau, "Kaasimu molagina amatangka saʼumurua, tee pojanjiamu inda momabhotu upatotapua i laiana."
89.4: Kawasana Opu apogau, "Iaku padhamo kubhoke pojanjia tee mia ipiliku, Iaku padhamo kupotunda tee Daud, bhatuaku,
89.5: 'Iaku bhekupatotapuaka manga siwulumu saʼumurua, tee kubhangu kauncuramakamu to siwulumu naile itu.' " Sela
89.6: E KAWASANA OPU, taroakamo manga mahalukuna sorogaa apuji manga giu inda momentela ipewaumu, tee pojanjiamu inda momabhotu i tanga-tangana rombongana malaaʼekati mangkilo.
89.7: Incema buaka i laiana momembalina mopodhimbana tee KAWASANA OPU? Incema buaka modhaangiana i tanga-tangana mahalukuna sorogaa momembalina motopapokana tee KAWASANA OPU?
89.8: Incia o Aulataʼala motohoromati i nuncana majilisina malaaʼekati momangkilo, amaoge tee atomaeka alabhi minaaka i bhari-bharia modhaangiana i saripina.
89.9: E KAWASANA OPU, Aulataʼalana saangua alamu, incema buaka mopokanana tee ingkoo? Ingkoo umakaa, e KAWASANA OPU, tee sadia ubukeaka pojanjia inda momabhotu.
89.10: Ingkoo mokuasaina ewona tawo; ande o ewo amalanga, Ingkoo mopekalinoa.
89.11: Ingkoo mopahancuruna Rahab mboomo maeati; Ingkoo mopapogaa-gaana manga musumu tee kakaamu.
89.12: Laiana o pewauamu tee o alamu o pewauamu uka. Ingkoo mopadhaangiana dunia tee bhari-bharia antona.
89.13: Napa tee salata, Ingkoo mopadhaangiaia; Gunu Tabor tee Hermon uka asambo-sambo roonamo saromu.
89.14: Limamu amaoge, lima kaanamu atopekalanga tee kakaana momulia.
89.15: Kabanara tee kaʼadili amembali o fondasina kauncuramakamu, kaasi molagina tee pojanjiamu inda momabhotu atokamata i nuncana bhari-bharia pewaumu.
89.16: Amasanaamo o lipu mosambo-sambona mopujiko, modhadhina i nuncana caheana roumu, e KAWASANA OPU!
89.17: Roonamo saromu manga incia akaunde-unde saeoa, tee roonamo kabanaramu manga incia apujiko.
89.18: Ingkoo o kamuliana kakaana manga incia, tee roonamo kalapemu, ingkami tahandamo tamakaa.
89.19: Katangkesimami o pewauana KAWASANA OPU, siitumo o rajamami pewauana Aulataʼala Momangkilo isombana miana Israel.
89.20: I piamo itu, i nuncana pokamataana mia Ingkoo ufirimani i manga mia motaʼatiko, mboosii, "Iaku padhamo kutulungi samia o mia mobarani, Iaku padhamo kupekalanga samia ipiliku minaaka i lipu sumai.
89.21: Iaku padhamo kupokawaaka Daud, o bhatuaku, tee padhamo kulantia tee mina hususuku momangkilo.
89.22: Limaku sadhaadhaa bheajagania, sampemo limaku uka bhekupekatangkaakea.
89.23: Musu inda bheamembali ahumbunia, tee inda bheapisakia mia madhaki.
89.24: Iaku bhekupahancuru manga bhalina i aroana, tee kupabinasa manga mia mobancia.
89.25: Pojanjiaku inda bheamabhotu tee kaasiku molagina bheapobhawa tee incia, tee roonamo saroku o bheajulu o kakaana.
89.26: Iaku bhekupamembali limana akuasai tawo, tee o lima kaanana akuasai manga umala.
89.27: Incia bheagora i Iaku, 'Ingkoomo o Amaku, Aulataʼalaku, tee gunu bhatu mopasalaamatiaku!'
89.28: Iaku uka bhekuangkea to amembali ana tumpeku, tee kupamembalia momalangana mpuu minaaka i bhari-bharia manga raja i dunia.
89.29: To saʼumurua bhekudhambaakea o kaasiku molagina to incia, tee o pojanjiaku tee incia bheasadhaadhaa amatangka.
89.30: Bhekupewaua o siwuluna adhaangia saʼumurua, tee o kauncuramakana bhekupotaangiakea kangengena laiana dhaangiapo i bhawona dunia.
89.31: Ande manga anana inda ataʼati tee hukumuku, tee o dhadhina inda aose tuturaku,
89.32: tee ande manga incia inda aose opea mopadhana ipatotapuakaku, tee inda aose manga parintaku,
89.33: sumaimo bhekuhukumua manga incia tee kasambina lauro, tee bhekubhebhea roonamo dosana manga incia.
89.34: Maka Iaku inda bhekubhotukia o kaasiku molagina to incia, tee inda bhekumalinguakea pojanjiaku inda momabhotu.
89.35: Iaku sadhaadhaa kupamondo pojanjiaku, tee opea mopadhana ifirimaniakaku inda bhekubhaliia.
89.36: Sampearo to saʼumurua Iaku kusumpa to kangkilona saroku, tee inda bhekugau-gau Daud.
89.37: Siwuluna bheadhaangia to saʼumurua, tee o kauncuramakana bheasadhaadhaa i aroaku mboomo matanaeo,
89.38: bheasadhaadhaa saʼumurua mboomo bula, mosakusiiakea minaaka i laiana." Sela
89.39: Maka sii-sii Ingkoo umendeua tee ubholia; Ingkoo upamuru tee mia mopadhana ilantimu.
89.40: Ingkoo ubhotuki janjimu tee bhatuamu, tee o mahakotana upekarombuakea tee ngawuna tana.
89.41: Upatobhatea bhari-bharia manga rindina kotana, tee upahancurua manga bentena.
89.42: Bhari-bharia mia molalo amanako pewauana; incia amembali giuna kaele-ele to manga sarimbanuana.
89.43: Ingkoo upekalanga lima kaanana manga bhalina, tee bhari-bharia musuna upewaua akaunde-unde.
89.44: Ingkoo uka upamembali matana ewangana rajamami inda akoampadhea, tee inda utulungia i nuncana potimbea.
89.45: Upauntoa o kuasana momuliana, tee o kauncuramakana utudhaakea i tana.
89.46: Upekampodhoa o umuruna rajamami wakutuuna amangura, tee usalibumbungiakea tee kaea. Sela
89.47: Sakawana naepia uka e KAWASANA OPU? Buaka bheubuniaka karomu saʼumurua? Sakawana naepia o pamurumu akarore-rore mboomo waa?
89.48: Udhania, tapanamo kampodho o dhadhiku sii, tapanamo sia-siana dhadhina bhari-bharia maanusia ipadhaangiamu!
89.49: Incema buaka o maanusia momembalina modhadhina torosu tee inda amate? Tee incema momembalina mopasalaamatina inyawana tee alapa minaaka i mate? Sela
89.50: E Kawasana Opu, i iapai o kaasimu molagina i piamo itu mopadhana ijanjiakamu to Daud tee katunda i nuncana pojanjiamu inda momabhotu?
89.51: E Kawasana Opu, udhania tuaapa o bhatuamu sii atohina; incaku atanggo kahinana bhari lipu.
89.52: Manga musumu ahina raja mopadhana ilantimu, e KAWASANA OPU, manga incia aele-elea iapaipo uka o lingkaana.
89.53: Pujimo KAWASANA OPU to saʼumurua! Aamin, ya aamin!

90.1: Doʼana Musa, bhatuana Aulataʼala. E Kawasana Opu, Ingkoomo tampamami tapeulu to saʼumurua.
90.2: Indapo manga gunu atopadhaangia, indapo alamu tee dunia sii upamembalia, Ingkoomo Aulataʼala mobakaa, inda tee auwalina inda tee aahirina.
90.3: Ingkoo ubhalii maanusia amembali ngawuna tana, firimanimu, "Mbulimo i asalamu e anana maanusia."
90.4: I nuncana pokamatamu sarewu tao apokana mboomo eo iawi siimpo molapana, atawa mboomo sapalika jagaana malo.
90.5: Ingkoo upepadhai dhadhimami mboomo tapongipi, mboomo rumpu motuna saeona;
90.6: wakutuuna saeona o rumpu atuwu tee atuna, maka wakutuuna konowia amalau tee amatuu.
90.7: Sababuna ingkami tamofu roonamo amaramu, tee ingkami tatokidha roonamo pamurumu.
90.8: Manga kasalahamami udhikaia i aroamu tee o dosamami motobuniaka atokamata i nuncana caheana roumu.
90.9: Sababuna bhari-bharia eomami tanamisi pamurumu mokarore-rore, tee talaloi tao-taomami mboomo kadheina tapoinunca.
90.10: Kangengena dhadhimami tangkanamo pitu pulu tao, atawa ande amakaa o bukumami koroo akawa walu pulu tao, maka manga eo momalape mpuu ipotibhaakamami tangkanamo kasukara tee kanarakaa; dhadhimami amampodho tee amasimba, sapadhana sumai tamofumo.
90.11: Incema buaka momatauna kaogena amaramu? Pamurumu amaoge mpuu apokana mboomo mia amaekako.
90.12: Manga adharimo to tagagari eo-eomami momampodhona sii mamudhaakana ingkami tapotibhaaka o ngangaranda moʼaarifu.
90.13: E KAWASANA OPU, mbulimo. Sakawana naepia Ingkoo uʼamara? Maasiakapea manga bhatuamu.
90.14: Patumpua o incamami i wakutuuna saeona tee kaasimu molagina mamudhaakana ingkami tasambo-sambo tee takaunde-unde saʼumurua dhadhimami.
90.15: Pasanaaia o incamami, apokana mboomo upewau eo-eomami i piamo itu asukara, tee apokana tee tao-tao itanggomami wakutuuna tanamisi kanarakaa.
90.16: Taroakamo opea ipewaumu akamatea manga bhatuamu, tee o kuasamu momulia sumai akamatea anaanamami.
90.17: Taroakamo kabarakatina Kawasana Opu, Aulataʼalamami, dhaangia to ingkami. Pekatangkea o angkana limamami, mamudhaakana usahamami akohasili!

91.1: Mia modhadhina i nuncana kajaganina Aulataʼala Momalanga, bheamboore i nuncana peulusana Kawasana Opu Mokokuasa,
91.2: bheapogau i KAWASANA OPU, "Ingkoomo o tampana peulusaku tee o bentena potaangiaku; Aulataʼalaku, iparacaeaku."
91.3: Incia bhemorambasakako minaaka i katapu, tee minaaka i panyaki imateaka.
91.4: Incia bheasalibumbungiakako tee panina, tee ingkoo bheuʼamani i nuncana peulusana. Incia atoparacaea tee bheamembali katangkesi tee o bentemu.
91.5: Ingkoo inda bheumaeka tee balaa moumbana i wakutuu malo, atawa o kahumbuni inda inamu-namu moumbana i wakutuu eo.
91.6: Ingkoo inda bheumaeaka tee panyaki imateaka moumbana i nuncana kalalanda, atawa tee kalelei ibinasaaka moumbana i wakutuu pontanga eo.
91.7: Moomini sarewu mia amate i saripimu, tee sapulu rewu mia amate i weta i kaanamu, maka ingkoo inda bheucilaka.
91.8: Ingkoo tangkanamo bheutontoa tee matamu karomu, tee ukamatea tuaapa Aulataʼala bheahukumu mia madhaki.
91.9: Roonamo KAWASANA OPU upamembalia tampana peulusamu, tee Aulataʼala Momalanga upamembalia mbooresamu,
91.10: siitumo ingkoo inda bheucilaka, tee balaa bheamaridho minaaka i bhanuamu.
91.11: Roonamo Incia bheatumpu manga malaaʼekatina to apobhawa tee ingkoo, mamudhaakana ajaganiko iapaipo uka o lingkaamu.
91.12: Manga malaaʼekati sumai bheaangkako tee rua mbalia limana mamudhaakana o aemu inda atosunu i bhatu.
91.13: Singa tee ulo bheulempagia, singa mangura tee ulo mokobisa bheulanda-landakia.
91.14: Firimanina Kawasana Opu, "Roonamo manga mia momaasiakaaku, bhekupasalaamatia; tee Iaku bhekujagani manga mia momatauna saroku.
91.15: Wakutuuna manga incia agoraakaaku, siitumo Iaku bhekulawania; Iaku bhekupobhawa tee manga incia i nuncana kaseke, tee bhekupasalaamatia tee kumuliangia.
91.16: Tee umuru marambe bhekupatumpua incana, tee bhekususuakea ande Iaku bhemopasalaamatia."

92.1: Zaburuna saangu lagu to eona Saputuu.
92.2: Tapanamo kalape tasukuru i KAWASANA OPU tee talaguaka manga lagu kapujia to saromu, e KAWASANA OPU Momalanga;
92.3: to tapakoleleaka kaasimu molagina i wakutuu saeona tee tuaapa Ingkoo ukeniaka pojanjiamu inda momabhotu i wakutuu malo,
92.4: poose tatiki gitari sapulu taliana, tee taoseakea gambusu tee kecapi.
92.5: Roonamo Ingkoo, e KAWASANA OPU, upaunde-undeaku tee opea mopadhana ipewaumu; iaku kusambo-sambo tee opea mopadhana ikarajaamu.
92.6: Amaoge mpuu bhari-bharia ipewaumu, e KAWASANA OPU, amandala mpuu o fikirimu tee amarasai to tamaʼanaia!
92.7: Mia mokabhongo-bhongo inda bheamembali amataua, mia mokurana fikirina inda bheamaʼanaia o giu incia sumai:
92.8: Moomini manga mia madhaki atuwu mboomo rumpu, tee o mia madhaki ahandamo abhari, maka manga incia sadhaadhaa bheatopabinasa saʼumurua.
92.9: Maka Ingkoo i tampa momalanga saʼumurua e KAWASANA OPU.
92.10: Roonamo manga musumu, e KAWASANA OPU, roonamo manga musumu bheabinasa; tee bhari-bharia mia madhaki bheupapogaa-gaaia.
92.11: Maka upamembaliaku kumakaa mboomo karambau, tee ulaliakaaku mina bhaau to ubarakatiaku.
92.12: Mataku akamatamo kandawuna manga musuku, tee o talingaku arangomo katalona manga mia madhaki mobhaliaku.
92.13: Mia mobanara bheatuwu tee akobhake torosu mboomo puuna horomaa, tee incia bheamaoge mboomo puuna aras i Libanon.
92.14: Manga incia mboomo puuna kau ipombula i aroana Bhanuana KAWASANA OPU, tee ajulu o kaogena i aroana Bhanuana Aulataʼalata.
92.15: Moomini akoʼumurumo dhaangiapo uka akobhake, tee asadhaadhaa asuburu tee amaijo o tawana,
92.16: manga miana mobanara sumai apakoleleaka ande o KAWASANA OPU sumai abanara. Incia o gunu bhatuku, tee sadia apewau moʼadili.

93.1: KAWASANA OPU o Raja, Incia abukeaka kamuliangi! KAWASANA OPU abukeaka kuasa, tee apatokamata kakaana. Incia apakakaro dunia tee inda dhaangia momembalina mohudhalia.
93.2: Kauncuramakamu amatangka minaaka i zamani mangenge, tee Ingkoo udhaangiamo minaaka i dunia indapo dhaangia.
93.3: Manga umala mokalua-lua ahandamo apekaoge suarana, e KAWASANA OPU, manga umala mokalua-lua ahandamo apekaoge suarana, manga umala mokalua-lua ahandamo apekaoge ruuna ewona.
93.4: Maka minaaka i suarana uwe momaoge, tee minaaka i ewona tawo momakaa, alabhi amaoge KAWASANA OPU i tampa momalanga.
93.5: E KAWASANA OPU, hukumumu abakaa saʼumurua, Kangkilo alaenga i nuncana Bhanuamu saʼumurua zamani.

94.1: E Aulataʼala, Ingkoomo KAWASANA OPU mobalasina kadhaki. Potokamatamea ande Ingkoo mobalasina kadhaki, e Aulataʼala!
94.2: Maasangia ahukumua, e haakimuna dunia; hukumua manga mia mosombo apokana tee pewauna!
94.3: Sakawana naepia manga mia madhaki, e KAWASANA OPU, sakawana naepia, manga mia madhaki akaunde-unde?
94.4: Manga incia ataburaka pogau mosombo minaaka i ngangana, tee bhari-bharia mia mopewauna kadhaki sumai apekalanga karona.
94.5: Manga incia apisaki uumatimu, e KAWASANA OPU, tee apahancuru tinaurakamu.
94.6: Manga incia apekamate iaiaro tee mia dhaga, tee apekamate ana maelu.
94.7: Pogauna manga incia, "KAWASANA OPU inda akamatea, Aulataʼalana Yakub isombana miana Israel inda atontoa."
94.8: Perangoimea, e manga mia mokabhongo-bhongo i tanga-tangana lipu sii! E manga mia mokabhongo-bhongo, naepia buaka ingkomiu bheumembali uʼaarifu?
94.9: Incia modhikaakea talinga, inda mungki Incia inda aporango! Incia mopamodelena mata, inda mungki Incia inda apokamata!
94.10: Incia mosasina manga lipu tee moadharina maanusia, dhaanamo Incia bheahukumua uka!
94.11: KAWASANA OPU amataua haejatina maanusia, ande bhari-bharia sumai inda tee maʼanana.
94.12: Masanaamo mia iadharimu, e KAWASANA OPU, tee udhawua kaadhari minaaka i hukumumu;
94.13: upasanaa incana i wakutuuna kasukara, sakawana mia madhaki apesua i nuncana bhalona katapu.
94.14: Roonamo KAWASANA OPU inda bheabhanaka uumatina, tee Incia inda bheabholi miana lipuna momembalina tinaurakana;
94.15: sababuna kaʼadili bheambuli pendua to manga mia mobanara, tee bhari-bharia mia momakatena incana bheaose.
94.16: Incema buaka moewaakaaku i manga mia madhaki? Incema buaka bhemopoaroakaaku to aewangi manga mia mopewauna kadhaki?
94.17: Ande mencuana KAWASANA OPU motulungiaku, saidhepo kumate i tampa momalino.
94.18: Wakutuuna kufikiri, "Aeku asindoli," sumaimo kaasina KAWASANA OPU molagina motukoaku.
94.19: Wakutuuna abhari fikiriku i nuncana baatiniku, Ingkoo utautauaku, sumaimo kukaunde-unde.
94.20: Inda mungki Ingkoo uposaangu tee manga kaogesa momadhaki, mopewauna kasalaha alaloi katotapuna inda moʼadilina.
94.21: Manga incia apomufakati aewangi dhadhina mia mobanara, tee ahukumu mate manga mia inda mosala.
94.22: Maka KAWASANA OPU mboomo kota bente moewaakaaku, tee Aulataʼala amembali gunu bhatu tampana peulusaku.
94.23: Incia bheahukumu manga mia madhaki apokana tee pewauna, tee bheapabinasea roonamo dosana. KAWASANA OPU, Aulataʼalata bheapabinasa manga incia.

95.1: Mai tasambo-samboaka to KAWASANA OPU! Mai tasambo-sambo tee takaunde-unde to gunu bhatu kasalaamatita!
95.2: Mai tapoaro i aroana tee taemani sukuru, tee tasambo-sambo to Incia tee talaguakea lagu kapujia!
95.3: Roonamo KAWASANA OPU o Aulataʼala momaoge, tee Incia o Raja momaoge mokuasaina bhari-bharia dewa.
95.4: Manga tampa momandala mpuu i alamu adhaangia i nuncana limana, tee manga lolona gunu uka o pewauana.
95.5: Incia mokuasaina tawo, roonamo Incia mopadhaangiaia, tee ati uka, o angkana limana.
95.6: Mai tasuju tasomba Incia, tasuju i aroana KAWASANA OPU mopadhaangiana ingkita.
95.7: Roonamo Inciamo o Aulataʼalata, tee ingkita o uumati idhambaakana, tee o gulumana dumba igembalaakana limana. Eo sii ande urango suarana,
95.8: bholimo umentagali mboomo i Meriba, tee mboomo wakutuuna i Masa, i tana matuu,
95.9: wakutuuna o opu-opuamiu acobaiaku tee aujiaku moomini manga incia padhamo akamata opea ikarajaaku.
95.10: Pata pulu tao o kangengena kumarika manga mia incia sumai. Firimaniku, "Manga incia o lipu mosaladhala, tee inda aose parintaku."
95.11: Rampaakanamo sumai, Iaku kupotunda i nuncana pamuruku, "Manga incia inda bheapesua i tampana poniuntoa mopadhana ijanjiakaku to manga incia, siitumo i Kanaan."

96.1: Laguakamo lagu bhaau to KAWASANA OPU, Lagumo to KAWASANA OPU, e saangua dunia!
96.2: Lagumo to KAWASANA OPU tee upujimo sarona! Pakoleleakea saesaeo o kasalaamati minaaka i Incia.
96.3: Petulatulaakea o kamuliangina i tanga-tangana manga lipu, tee upetulatulaakea manga pewauna inda momentela i bhari-bharia uumatina maanusia.
96.4: Sababuna o KAWASANA OPU amaoge tee atopuji mpuu. Incia alaenga atomaeka alabhi minaaka i bhari-bharia dewa.
96.5: Bhari-bharia dewa isombana manga lipu satotuuna o barahala, maka o KAWASANA OPU mopadhaangiana laiana.
96.6: Incia amaoge tee amulia; kuasa tee kakesa dhaangia i tampana momangkilo.
96.7: Akuimea o KAWASANA OPU, e uumatina maanusia, akuimea o KAWASANA OPU o kamuliangina tee kakaana!
96.8: Akuimea o kamuliangina sarona to KAWASANA OPU, bhawamo pasombaa tee uumbamo i aroana Bhanuana Aulataʼala!
96.9: Sujumo usomba KAWASANA OPU tee upake pakea momangkilo; maekamo tee urengkumo i aroana, e saangua alamu!
96.10: Pakoleleakea i tanga-tangana manga lipu, "KAWASANA OPU sumai o Raja! Atotuu-totuu o alamu amatangka tee inda akohudha, Incia bheahaakimu manga lipu tee kaʼadili."
96.11: Taroakamo o laiana akaunde-unde tee o dunia asambo-sambo; taroakamo o tawo akanduu-nduu tee bhari-bharia modhaangiana i nuncana,
96.12: taroakamo inawu akaunde-unde tee bhari-bharia modhaangiana i bhawona. I wakutuu incia sumai bhari-bharia puuna kau i koo bhealagu roonamo akaunde-unde
96.13: i aroana KAWASANA OPU, roonamo Incia bheaumba, roonamo Incia bheaumba to ahaakimu alamu. Incia bheahaakimu dunia tee kaʼadili, tee bhari-bharia lipu tee kabanarana.

97.1: KAWASANA OPU o Raja! Taroakamo alamu akaunde-unde; taroakamo o pulo-pulo mobhari sumai akaunde-unde!
97.2: Taʼina ngalu tee kalalanda abulilingi KAWASANA OPU, kabanara tee kaʼadili amembali polandakana kauncuramakana.
97.3: Waa arore i aroana, apekangau manga bhali i saripina.
97.4: Manga bhibhitona asuluwi alamu, tee o dunia akamatamea tee arengku.
97.5: Manga gunu arere mboomo taru i aroana KAWASANA OPU, i aroana Aulataʼalana saangua alamu.
97.6: Laiana apakoleleaka kabanarana, tee bhari-bharia lipu akamata kamuliangina.
97.7: Bhari-bharia mia mosombana barahala bheatopekaea, siitumo manga incia mosomboakana karona roonamo barahalana; bhari-bharia dewa bheasuju tee asomba i aroana Kawasana Opu.
97.8: Raʼeatina Sion akaunde-unde tee manga kampo modhaangiana i Tana Yuda uka amasanaa, wakutuuna arango kambotumu, e KAWASANA OPU.
97.9: Ingkoomo, e KAWASANA OPU, Momalangana i bhawona saangua alamu; Ingkoo utomuliangi mpuu alabhi minaaka i bhari-bharia dewa.
97.10: E ingkomiu momaasiakana KAWASANA OPU, bancimea o kadhaki! Sababuna KAWASANA OPU ajagani dhadhina uumatina mosaalihi, tee arambasakea manga incia minaaka i limana mia madhaki.
97.11: Kainawa asuluwi mia mobanara, tee o kasanaa to mia momakatena incana.
97.12: E manga mia mobanara, kaunde-undemo roonamo KAWASANA OPU, tee usukurumo to sarona momangkilo.

98.1: Zaburu. Laguakamo lagu bhaau to KAWASANA OPU roonamo Incia padhamo apewau manga giu inda momentela; kasalaamati padhamo akarajaaia lima kaanana, siitumo o lima kaanana momangkilo.
98.2: KAWASANA OPU apakoleleaka kasalaamatina; Incia apaumbaaka kaʼadilina i aroana matana manga lipu.
98.3: Incia audhania o kaasina molagina tee akeniaka pojanjiana inda momabhotu to siwuluna Israel. Saangua dunia padhamo akamatea o kasalaamati minaaka i Aulataʼalata.
98.4: Sambo-sambomo to KAWASANA OPU, e saangua dunia! Kaunde-undemo tee usambo-sambomo, tee ulaguakamea manga lagu kapujia!
98.5: Laguakamea o lagu kapujia to KAWASANA OPU, poose umagasiaakea tee kecapi tee suara momandii,
98.6: tee torompe tee sangkakala tee suara momandii. Sambo-sambomo i aroana Raja, siitumo o KAWASANA OPU!
98.7: Taroakamo o tawo akanduu-nduu tee bhari-bharia modhaangiana i nuncana, tee uka o dunia tee bhari-bharia mombooresia.
98.8: Taroakamo manga umala asambo-sambo, tee manga gunu alagu apobhawa-bhawa roonamo akaunde-unde
98.9: i aroana KAWASANA OPU roonamo Incia aumba to ahaakimu dunia. Incia bheahaakimu alamu tee kabanara, tee ahaakimu manga lipu tee kaʼadili.

99.1: KAWASANA OPU satotuuna o Raja! Sumaimo manga lipu arengku! Incia auncura i kauncuramakana i bhawona manga malaaʼekati kerub; taroakamo o dunia akohudha!
99.2: KAWASANA OPU momaoge i Sion; Incia amalanga alabhi minaaka i bhari-bharia lipu.
99.3: Taroakamo manga incia apuji saromu momaoge tee motomaekana sumai. Incia amangkilo mpuu!
99.4: Raja Momakaa, momaasiakana kaʼadili, Ingkoo upadhamo upatotapu kabanara; Ingkoo upadhamo uewaaka hukumu tee kaʼadili i tanga-tangana miana Israel.
99.5: Pekalangea o KAWASANA OPU, Aulataʼalata, tee usujumo usomba i polandakana aena! Incia amangkilo mpuu!
99.6: Musa tee Harun adhaangia i tanga-tangana manga imamuna, Samuel atolentu i tanga-tangana manga mia mogoraakana sarona. Manga incia agora i KAWASANA OPU, tee Incia alawania.
99.7: Incia afirimani minaaka i ariina taʼina ngalu i manga incia; manga incia akenia pekatangka manga parintana, tee manga katotapu mopadhana idhawuakana to manga incia.
99.8: E KAWASANA OPU, e Aulataʼalamami, Ingkoo padhamo ulawani manga incia. Ingkoo o Aulataʼala moʼamponina dosana miana Israel, maka Ingkoo uka mohukumuna manga incia wakutuuna apewau kasalaha.
99.9: Pekalangea o KAWASANA OPU, Aulataʼalata, tee usujumo usombaia i gununa momangkilo; roonamo o KAWASANA OPU Aulataʼalata, amangkilo.

100.1: Zaburu to kurubani kasukuru. Sambo-sambomo to KAWASANA OPU, e saangua alamu!
100.2: Sambaheamo i KAWASANA OPU tee ukaunde-undemo, umbamo i aroana tee ulaguaka lagu-lagu momasanaa.
100.3: Mataumea ande o KAWASANA OPU sumai o Aulataʼala. Inciamo manga padhaangiana, tee ingkita o pewauana; ingkitamo o uumatina tee dumba-dumba igembalana.
100.4: Pesuamo ulaloi bhambana lawana upoose ulaguaka lagu kasukuru, upesua i aroana Bhanuana Aulataʼala upoose upujia. Sukurumo i Incia tee upujimo sarona.
100.5: Roonamo o KAWASANA OPU sumai amalape; kaasina molagina abakaa saʼumurua, tee Incia akeni janjina saʼumurua zamani.

101.1: Zaburuna Daud. Iaku bhekulaguaka lagu to kaasina molagina tee kaʼadili, to Ingkoo, e KAWASANA OPU, iaku bhekulaguaka lagu kapujia.
101.2: Iaku bhekupengkaadhariaka carana mamudhaakana kudhadhi inda tee kasalahaku. Naepia bhekupotibhaaka dhala sumai? Iaku bhekudhadhi tee kakatena totona incaku i nuncana bhanuaku.
101.3: Iaku inda bhekudhikaia i aroaku giu inda mokoampadhea. Iaku kubancia o pewau motagalina Aulataʼala; giu incia sumai amaridho tee iaku.
101.4: Iaku bhekupekaridho karoku tee fikiri inda mototo, tee kumendeu kumatau tee saangu giu uka momadhaki.
101.5: Incemapo uka mofitanaana sarimbanuana i talikuna bhekupabinasea. Iaku inda bhekusabara to mia mosombo tee momalangana incana.
101.6: Iaku kumaasiaka manga mia motaʼatina tee Aulataʼala, mamudhaakana manga incia amembali amboore tee iaku. Mia modhadhina i dhala inda mosala, inciamo bhemolaianiaku.
101.7: Pande gau-gau inda bheamboore i bhanuaku; mia mobhoasakana kagau-gau inda bheasadhaadhaa i aroaku.
101.8: Saesaeo bhekupabinasea bhari-bharia mia madhaki i lipu sii, mamudhaakana kupomofu bhari-bharia mia mopewauna kadhaki minaaka i kotana KAWASANA OPU.

102.1: Doʼana samia monarakaana, i wakutuuna amangule tee amalute apeenci i aroana KAWASANA OPU.
102.2: E KAWASANA OPU, maasangia urangoa o doʼaku; taroakamo o goraku akawa i Ingkoo.
102.3: Bholi ubuniakea o roumu minaaka i iaku i eona kunamisi kanarakaa. Perangoiaku; i eona kugora madheimo ulawaniaku,
102.4: roonamo o dhadhiku aila mboomo ombu, tee manga bukuku amangau mboomo dhalika.
102.5: Ngangarandaku mboomo ibhebhe tee amalau mboomo rumpu, sabutuna amawala kukande.
102.6: Roonamo kakaana suaraku kupeenci, badaku soomo buku.
102.7: Iaku mboomo manu-manu koa i tana matuu, mboomo koa maidhiidhi i tampa mohancuru tee momalino.
102.8: Iaku Inda amembali kukole, mboomo manu-manu modhadhina sambaa-mbaana i bhawona padhana bhanua.
102.9: Saeoa ahinaaku manga musuku; manga incia aele-eleaku tee apake saroku to katunda.
102.10: Iaku kukande rapu mboomo roti, giu isumpuku apojaloaka lolu,
102.11: roonamo amaramu tee pamurumu; uangkaaku, kasiimpo ubhanakaaku.
102.12: Saesaeo dhadhiku mboomo ngkamia-mia i wakutuuna konowia, tee kumalau mboomo rumpu.
102.13: Maka Ingkoo, e KAWASANA OPU, ukokauncuramaka saʼumurua; saromu asadhaadhaa atoudhani saʼumurua zamani.
102.14: Ingkoo bheubhangu tee umaasiaka Sion, roonamo wakutuunamo to umaasiakea, tee akawamo wakutuu itantuakana.
102.15: Manga bhatuamu amaasiaka manga bhatuna Kota Sion, moomini o bhatuna amembalimo ngawu.
102.16: Sumaimo manga lipu amembali amaeka tee sarona KAWASANA OPU, tee bhari-bharia raja i alamu amaeka tee pewaumu momulia.
102.17: KAWASANA OPU bheabhangu Sion pendua, tee Incia bheaumba i nuncana kamuliangina.
102.18: Incia bheaperangoi doʼana manga mia monarakaa, tee o KAWASANA OPU inda bheamendeu doʼana manga incia.
102.19: Buria bhari-bharia o giu incia sumai to siwulu bhemoumbana naile itu, mamudhaakana o lipu bhemolaahirina naile itu apuji KAWASANA OPU.
102.20: KAWASANA OPU apotonto minaaka i kalangaana i tampana momangkilo, minaaka i sorogaa Incia apotonto i alamu,
102.21: to aperangoi pekidheina mia itorongku tee arambasaka manga mia mopadhana itantuaka to atopekamate;
102.22: mamudhaakana o sarona KAWASANA OPU atopetulatulaaka i Sion, tee bheatopuji i Yerusalem,
102.23: wakutuuna manga lipu tee manga pamarintana, aporomusaka to asambahea i KAWASANA OPU.
102.24: KAWASANA OPU apaila kakaaku wakutuuna dhaangiapo kumangura, tee apekampodho umuruku.
102.25: Kasiimpo kupogau, "E Aulataʼalaku, bholi uala inyawaku i pomuntangaana umuruku, Ingkoo usadhaadhaa dhaangia saʼumurua zamani."
102.26: I piamo itu Ingkoo upadhaangia ariina dunia; umbe, laiana uka karajaana limamu.
102.27: Bhari-bharia sumai bheamofu, maka Ingkoo usadhaadhaa udhadhi saʼumurua. Bhari-bharia sumai bheamalusa mboomo pakea, Ingkoo bheubhalii alamu sii mboomo satuwu juba tee bhari-bharia uka bheakoʼaahiri.
102.28: Maka Ingkoo asadhaadhaa inda ubhalii, tee o dhadhimu inda bheakoʼaahiri.
102.29: Anamami bheamboore tee kaʼamani, tee o siwuluna manga incia bheasadhaadhaa i aroamu.

103.1: Zaburuna Daud. Pujimo KAWASANA OPU, e ngangarandaku! E saangua baatiniku, pujimea o sarona momangkilo!
103.2: Pujimo KAWASANA OPU, e ngangarandaku, tee bholi umalinguakea bhari-bharia kalapena.
103.3: Incia moʼamponina bhari-bharia kasalahamu, tee Incia mopauntona bhari-bharia panyakimu.
103.4: Incia mopasalaamatina inyawamu minaaka i koburu, tee Incia modhawuko rahumati tee kaasina molagina.
103.5: Incia mopatumpuna incamu tee kalape. Sabutuna ingkoo usadhaadhaa umangura mboomo manu-manu bunia.
103.6: KAWASANA OPU mokarajaana hukumu tee kaʼadili to bhari-bharia mia motopisaki.
103.7: Incia asusuaka dhalana to Musa tee apaumbaaka opea mopadhana ipewauna to miana Israel.
103.8: Sababuna o KAWASANA OPU abukeaka kaasina inca tee rahumati, Incia sadia asabara tee o kaasina molagina ataralabhi-labhi.
103.9: Incia inda mangaraeaka torotorosu, tee inda bheaʼamara to saʼumurua.
103.10: Incia inda manga hukumu apokana tee dosata, atawa mangabalasi apokana tee kasalahata.
103.11: Roonamo mboomo kalangana laiana i bhawona alamu, mboo sumaimo o kaogena kaasina molagina to manga mia momaekaia.
103.12: Mboomo karidhona minaaka i timbu sakawana i bhara, mboo sumaimo Kawasana Opu ahapusu manga dosata tee abhanakea pekaridho minaaka i karota.
103.13: Mboomo samia ama amaasiaka manga anana, mboo sumaimo o KAWASANA OPU amaasiaka manga mia momaekaia.
103.14: Roonamo Incia amataua tuaapa ingkita tatopebhangui; Incia amataua ande ingkita sii tangkanamo ngawu.
103.15: Maanusia o dhadhina amampodho mboomo rumpu; manga incia akokamba mboomo kamba-kamba i inawu;
103.16: ande atowiia ngalu, amalaumo o kamba-kamba sumai, tee o tampana indamo atomatau uka.
103.17: Maka o kaasi molagina KAWASANA OPU sadhaadhaa abakaa to manga mia momaekaia, tee o kabanarana to anana tee siwuluna manga incia,
103.18: siitumo to manga incia mokeniakana pojanjiana tee moudhania to aose manga parintana.
103.19: KAWASANA OPU padhamo apatotapuaka kauncuramakana i sorogaa, tee o pamarintana akuasai bhari-bharia ipadhaangiana.
103.20: E bhari-bharia malaaʼekati pujimo KAWASANA OPU, e manga malaaʼekati mobarani momakaa tee mopewauna firimanina, tee motaʼatina tee opea ibhoasakana!
103.21: E bhari-bharia tantarana i sorogaa pujimo KAWASANA OPU, e manga bhatuana moosena parintana!
103.22: Pujimo KAWASANA OPU, e bhari-bharia mahaluku ipadhaangiana, i sagala tampa ikuasaina! Pujimo KAWASANA OPU, e ngangarandaku!

104.1: Pujimo KAWASANA OPU, e ngangarandaku! E KAWASANA OPU, e Aulataʼalaku! Ingkoomo momaogena! Ingkoo uposalibumbuaka kaogesa tee kamuliangi,
104.2: tee upakana kainawa mboomo juba. Ingkoo ubhakesaka laiana mboomo saangu kema,
104.3: tee upakaro ariina bhanuamu i uwe i bhawona kubana laiana. Manga taʼina ngalu upamembalia karetamu, tee Ingkoo usawi i bhawona ngalu.
104.4: Ngalu upamembalia potumpuamu, tee o bherese amembali bhatuamu.
104.5: Ingkoo udhika alamu i bhawona fondasina tee upekatangkea, sabutuna inda bheakohudha saʼumurua.
104.6: Ingkoo apake andalaoge mboomo juba to usalibumbu alamu, o uwena mawa apene atutubhi manga gunu.
104.7: Roonamo pamurumu o uwe sumai asiwulu makaa tee apalai, tee roonamo arango ruuna guntumu o uwe sumai apalai pekadhei.
104.8: Uwe sumai akompa i manga gunu tee asapo i nuncana manga mbolonga, i tampa mopadhana itantuakamu to uwe sumai.
104.9: Ingkoo padhamo utantuakea o tidha inda momembalina ilaloina mamudhaakana o uwe sumai inda apendua uka asalibumbu alamu.
104.10: Ingkoo upewau matana uwe alua i manga mbolonga, kasiimpo asiwulu i tanga-tangana manga gunu,
104.11: tee apasumpu bhari-bharia binata maila; apaila katuuna bhorokona manga keledai maila.
104.12: I bhiwina uwe sumai manga manu-manu i antara amboore, kasiimpo manga incia apekawowo i tanga-tangana manga puuna kau.
104.13: Minaaka i paana bhanuamu upasapoakea wao to manga gunu; alamu abukeaka hali momalape mopadhana ipadhaangiamu.
104.14: Ingkoo mopatuwuna rumpu to binata kadhambaaka, tee upatuwu penembula to maanusia mamudhaakana o alamu amembali akohasiliaka giuna ikande,
104.15: siitumo o angguru ipeeluna maanusia, mina zaitun mopewauna rou akocahea, tee o roti mopekatangkana dhadhina maanusia.
104.16: Manga puuna kauna KAWASANA OPU apotibhaaka wao motaralabhi-labhi, siitumo manga puuna aras i Libanon ipombulana karona.
104.17: Iwe sumaimo manga manu-manu akarajaa poteona, manu-manu ranggung akarajaa bhanuana i puuna sanobar.
104.18: Manga gunu momalanga amembali tampa mbooresana bhembe maila, tee manga kabumbu mokobhatu amembali tampana peulusana paapaando.
104.19: Ingkoo upadhaangia bula to amembali tanda to motantuakana wakutuuna bula mobhaau, tee o matanaeo amataua naepia o wakutuuna bheatondu.
104.20: Ingkoo mopadhaangiana kalalanda, kasiimpo amembali amalo, i wakutuumo incia sumai sagala binata i koo aposawele.
104.21: Manga singa mangura akomburu apeelo kinandena, aemani kinande minaaka i Aulataʼala.
104.22: Matanaeo uka abhete, kasiimpo manga binata sumai ambuli apotidhole i nuncana mbooresana.
104.23: Kasiimpo maanusia alimba to akarajaa, tee apajala usahana sakawana konowia.
104.24: E KAWASANA OPU, abhari mpuu mopadhana ipewaumu! Tee hikimati upamembalia bhari-bharia; alamu abukeaka tee mahalukumu.
104.25: Kamatea o tawo momaewa motobhakesakana sumai, iwe sumako dhaangia tee sagala giu mahaluku mopondele inda atogagari o kabharina, dhaangia o binata momaidhiidhi tee manga binata maoge.
104.26: Iwe sumai manga kapala adhala, tee iwe sumai uka o Lewiatan mopadhana ipadhaangiamu amagamagasia.
104.27: Bhari-bharia aharapu i Ingkoo, mamudhaakana udhawua kinande ande akawa wakutuuna.
104.28: Wakutuuna udhawuakea kinande, manga incia arombusakea; wakutuuna ubungkale limamu, manga incia akandea sakawana amambosu.
104.29: Wakutuuna ubuniaka roumu, manga incia atokidha; Wakutuuna uala poinuncana, amatemo manga incia, kasiimpo ambuli pendua amembali ngawu.
104.30: Maka ande manga incia udhawua poinunca, manga incia atopamembali; Ingkoo udhawu dhadhi bhaau to alamu.
104.31: Taroakamo o kamuliangina KAWASANA OPU asadhaadhaa saʼumurua; taroakamo KAWASANA OPU akaunde-unde tee opea mopadhana ipewauna!
104.32: Wakutuuna Incia atonto alamu, sumaimo o alamu akorende, tee wakutuuna adhingku manga gunu, sabutuna akoombu manga gunu incia sumai!
104.33: Iaku bhekulaguaka lagu to KAWASANA OPU saʼumurua dhadhiku; iaku bhekupuji Aulataʼalaku kananteana dhaangiapo kudhadhi.
104.34: Maasangia opea ifikiriku amasanaakea incana; iaku bhekukaunde-unde roonamo KAWASANA OPU.
104.35: Taroakamo o mia mokodosa amapupu minaaka i bhawona alamu, tee manga mia madhaki indamo dhaangia. Pujimo KAWASANA OPU, e ngangarandaku! Pujimo KAWASANA OPU!

105.1: Sukurumo i KAWASANA OPU, tee ugoraakamo sarona, pakoleleakea opea ipewauna i tanga-tangana manga lipu!
105.2: Lagumo to Incia, tee upuji-pujimea; petulatulaakamea bhari-bharia ipewauna inda momentela!
105.3: Kaunde-undemo roonamo sarona momangkilo; taroakamo akaunde-undeaka manga mia mopeelona KAWASANA OPU.
105.4: Sadiamo upeelo KAWASANA OPU tee uemani kakaa minaaka i Incia; sadiamo upeeloa.
105.5: Udhania manga pewauna inda momentela mopadhana ikarajaana, manga muuzizatina, tee manga kambotu ipakawaakana,
105.6: e siwuluna Ibrahim, o bhatuana Aulataʼala, e siwuluna Yakub, uumati ipilina Kawasana Opu!
105.7: KAWASANA OPU satotuuna o Aulataʼalata; kambotuna atopake i saangua alamu.
105.8: Incia sadia bheaudhania o pojanjiana, tee firimani mopadhana iparintaakana saʼumurua to siwulu bhemoumbana naile itu,
105.9: siitumo o pojanjia ibhokena tee Ibrahim, tee o sumpana tee Ishak,
105.10: Incia apekatangka sumpa incia sumai to Yakub amembali saangu katotapu, tee amembali pojanjia mobakaa to miana Israel,
105.11: firimanina, "Tana Kanaan bhekudhawuaka to ingkoo, amembali tinaurakamu."
105.12: Wakutuuna miana Israel o kabharina tangkanamo saidhe, saidhemea, tee manga incia amboore mboomo mia dhaga iwe sumai,
105.13: manga incia apekalingka-lingka minaaka i saangu lipu sakawana i lipu mosagaanana, minaaka i saangu pamarinta sakawana i pamarintana lipu mosagaanana.
105.14: Maka o KAWASANA OPU inda ataroaka incema uka mopisakina manga incia. KAWASANA OPU audhaniaka manga raja to ajagani manga incia,
105.15: "Bholi ukia-kiaia manga mia ipiliku, tee bholi upacilaka manga nabiiku!"
105.16: Wakutuuna o KAWASANA OPU aumbaaka balaana kaara to lipu incia sumai, tee apahancuru bhari-bharia kinande modhaangiana iwe sumai,
105.17: KAWASANA OPU atumpumo samia moporikanaakana manga incia, sarona mia incia sumai o Yusuf, mopadhana iaso amembali bhatua.
105.18: Aena apekambelaakea tee rante, bhorokona atobhokeaka tee rante minaaka i ase;
105.19: sabutuna opea ipekilalaakana Yusuf atopamondomo, KAWASANA OPU afirimani ande o Yusuf abanara.
105.20: Rajana Mesir momaogena kuasana sumai, atumpu mia to apabebasi Yusuf minaaka i katorongku.
105.21: Incia aangkea amembali samia momalangana pangkatina i nuncana maligena raja, tee o raja adhawua kuasa to moʼurusuna bhari-bharia harataana,
105.22: tee uka adhawua kuasa to aʼatoro manga pagawena raja peepeeluana incana, tee aadhariaka hikimati to manga mancuana monaasehatina raja.
105.23: Kasiimpo Yakub aumba i Mesir, Yakub amboore i Tana Ham mboomo samia dhaga.
105.24: KAWASANA OPU, apamembalia o uumatina ajulu o kabharina, tee apamembalia manga incia alabhi o kakaana minaaka i bhalina.
105.25: Kasiimpo KAWASANA OPU abhalii incana manga miana Mesir to abanci uumatina, tee atipu miana Israel.
105.26: Sumaimo Incia alamboko Musa, tee Harun, bhatuana mopadhana ipilina.
105.27: Rua-rua miaia apadhaangia manga giu inda momentela minaaka i Kawasana Opu i tanga-tangana manga miana Mesir sumai, tee apewau manga muuzizati i Tana Ham.
105.28: Kawasana Opu aumbaaka kalalanda, sumaimo amalalandamo o lipu incia sumai maka o miana Mesir inda aose firimanina.
105.29: Incia abhalii uwena miana Mesir amembali raa, tee apekamate bhari-bharia ikanena manga incia.
105.30: Manga barakaka abuke i lipuna manga incia sampe apesua uka i nuncana kolemana raja.
105.31: Kawasana Opu afirimani, sabutuna aumbamo manga lale mosampa, tee ngkonunu apabuke saangua lipu.
105.32: Incia apasapo waona esi, tee bhibhito mokakila-kila i saangua lipuna manga incia.
105.33: Incia apabinasa puuna angguru tee puuna ara, tee apatobhata bhari-bharia manga puuna kau i lipuna manga incia.
105.34: Kawasana Opu afirimani uka, kasiimpo aumbamo manga kabhoro, tee o kabhoro mopolaka kabharina inda atogagari.
105.35: Kabhoro sumai akande bhari-bharia penembula i lipuna manga incia, tee apepadhaia bhari-bharia hasilina inawuna manga incia.
105.36: Kawasana Opu uka apekamate bhari-bharia ana tumpe umane modhaangiana i lipuna incia sumai siitumo bhaa-bhaana o kakaana manga incia.
105.37: Kasiimpo Aulataʼala apalimba miana Israel apoose abhawa pera tee bulawa, bhari-bharia manga incia amalape o namisina tee amakaa o bukuna wakutuuna alimba minaaka i Mesir.
105.38: Miana Mesir akaunde-unde wakutuuna manga incia alingka abholi lipu sumai roonamo miana Mesir amaeka mpuu tee miana Israel.
105.39: Aulataʼala abhakesaka taʼina ngalu to apapeulu uumatina, tee waa to kasuluwi i wakutuuna amalo.
105.40: Manga incia aemani kinande i Aulataʼala, sabutuna o Aulataʼala alambokoakea manu-manu sonta, tee manga incia apekambosuakea roti minaaka i laiana.
105.41: Awetaia o bhatu maoge, kasiimpo apidhimo o uwe, asiwulu mboomo umala i tana matuu,
105.42: roonamo Incia audhani firimanina momangkilo, tee audhani Ibrahim o bhatuana sumai.
105.43: Jadi Incia abhawa uumatina alimba tee akaunde-unde, tee manga mia ipilina alagu tee asambo-sambo.
105.44: Aulataʼala adhawuakea tanana manga lipu mosagaanana to manga incia, sabutuna manga incia apotibhaaka harataana manga lipu incia sumai.
105.45: Tee mboo sumai, manga incia amembali akenia pekatangka manga katotapuna, tee aose kaadharina. Pujimea o KAWASANA OPU!

106.1: Pujimea o KAWASANA OPU! Sukurumo i KAWASANA OPU, roonamo Incia amalape, kaasina molagina abakaa saʼumurua.
106.2: Incema momembalina mopetulatulaakana giu maoge mopadhana ipewauna KAWASANA OPU, atawa apaperangoiakea sagala kapujia to Incia?
106.3: Amasanaamo manga mia mopewauna kaʼadili, tee modhadhina i nuncana kabanara.
106.4: E KAWASANA OPU, udhaniaku wakutuuna upewau malape i uumatimu; bholi umalinguakaaku wakutuuna upasalaamati manga incia.
106.5: Mamudhaakana amembali kukamata kalapena dhadhina manga mia ipilimu, mamudhaakana amembali kumasanaa i nuncana kaunde-undena manga miana lipumu, tee mamudhaakana amembali kupujiko kupobhawa-bhawa tee uumati momembalina tinaurakamu.
106.6: Ingkami padhamo tapewau dosa mboomo opu-opuamami; ingkami padhamo tapewau kasalaha tee tadorohaka.
106.7: Wakutuuna i Mesir, opu-opuamami inda amaʼanaia manga giu inda momentela ipewaumu; manga incia inda audhania o kaasimu molagina motaralabhi-labhi sumai, maka manga incia adorohaka i Aulataʼala Momalanga i bhiwina Tawo Towu Lambe.
106.8: Maka o Kawasana Opu apasalaamati manga incia to ajagani sarona karona, mamudhaakana amataua o kaogena kuasana.
106.9: Incia agorampangi Tawo Towu Lambe sabutuna amatuumo o tawo sumai, kasiimpo abhawa manga incia apolimba i tawo mboomo adhala i tana matuu.
106.10: Jadi o Kawasana Opu apasalaamati manga incia minaaka i kuasana manga mia mobancia, tee arambasakea manga minaaka i limana musu.
106.11: Uwena tawo apatondu bhalina manga incia; inda samia uka mosalaamatina.
106.12: I wakutuu incia sumai manga incia aparacaeamo tee opea ifirimaniakana, tee alaguaka manga kapujia to Incia.
106.13: Maka manga incia amasimba mpuu amalinguaka opea ipewauna Kawasana Opu, tee inda aantagi to arango opea ihaejatiakana to manga incia.
106.14: Manga incia akuasaia nawusuu to akande i tampa momalino, tee auji Aulataʼala mamudhaakana abukutiiakea o kuasana i tana matuu.
106.15: Kawasana Opu adhawuakea opea iemanina manga incia, maka apoose alambokoakea tee panyaki imembaliakana manga incia amangkuru.
106.16: Wakutuuna i pokemaa manga incia amapii incana tee Musa, tee amapii incana uka tee Harun, mia momangkilo ipilina KAWASANA OPU.
106.17: Alamu apoweta kasiimpo adhoku Datan, tee o tana atutubhi manga moosena Abiram.
106.18: Waa uka arore i tanga-tangana manga incia, rorena waa apekangau manga mia madhaki.
106.19: Manga incia akarajaa patu anana sapi i Horeb, kasiimpo asomba patu motorabu sumai.
106.20: Tee mboo sumai, manga incia padhamo abholosi kamuliangina Aulataʼala tee patuna sapi mokandena rumpu.
106.21: Manga incia amalinguaka Aulataʼala mopasalaamatina manga incia, mopadhana mopewauna manga giu momaoge i Mesir.
106.22: Siitumo Incia apewau manga giu inda momentela i Tana Ham, tee manga giu motomaeka i bhiwina Tawo Towu Lambe.
106.23: Siitumo sababuna o Kawasana Opu afirimani ande bheapabinasa manga incia maka ataangia Musa, mia ipilina. Musa ataangi pamuruna Kawasana Opu to manga incia, sabutuna amarana auntomo tee inda apabinasea.
106.24: Kasiimpo manga incia amendeu apesua i lipu momangada sumai, tee inda aparacaea firimanina.
106.25: Manga incia akamburu-mburu i nuncana kemana, tee inda aperangoi firimanina KAWASANA OPU.
106.26: Siitumo sababuna Incia aposumpa ande bheapekamate manga incia i tana matuu,
106.27: tee o siwuluna manga incia bheapapogaa-gaaia i tanga-tangana manga lipu, tee apasaraakaakea i lipu mosagaanana.
106.28: Manga incia uka asomba dewa Baal i Gunu Peor, tee akande manga kurubani isumbele to manga barahala inda modhadhi.
106.29: Manga giu incia sumai amapiiakea incana KAWASANA OPU, sabutuna aumbamo o panyaki imateaka i tanga-tangana manga incia.
106.30: Maka o Pinehas aumba ahukumu manga mia mosala, sabutuna auntomo o panyaki imateaka sumai.
106.31: Pewauna Pinehas sumai amembali saangu jasa tee giu mobanara to incia sakawana saʼumurua zamani.
106.32: Manga incia apekapii incana KAWASANA OPU i saripina matana uwe i Meriba sabutuna o Musa anarakaa roonamo pewauna manga incia,
106.33: sababuna manga incia apekarewu incana Musa, sabutuna incia abhoasaka manga pogau inda ifikirina porikana.
106.34: Manga incia uka inda apabinasa manga lipu i Kanaan, mboomo iparintaakana KAWASANA OPU to manga incia,
106.35: maka manga incia aporomu tee manga miana lipu incia sumai, tee asiringi pewauna manga incia.
106.36: Miana Israel asomba manga barahalana miana Kanaan, sabutuna o giu incia sumai amembali katapu to manga incia.
106.37: Manga incia apasombaakea o anana, malape o ana umane atawa o ana bhawine amembali kurubani to manga seetani.
106.38: Manga incia apekamate manga mia inda mosala, siitumo o raana anana manga incia, ipasombaakana amembali kurubani to manga barahala i Kanaan, sabutuna o lipu sumai amarombuaka raa.
106.39: Sumaimo manga incia apekarombu karona tee opea ipewauna, tee o feʼelina mboomo bhawinena dhala.
106.40: Siitumo sababuna o pamuruna KAWASANA OPU akarore-rore to uumatina, tee amarika akamata lipuna uumatina karona.
106.41: Sumaimo Kawasana Opu apasarakaaka manga incia i manga lipu mosagaanana, sabutuna manga incia akuasaia musuna.
106.42: Manga incia apisakia musuna, sabutuna o miana Israel atokuasai tee atotalo.
106.43: Amenturu o Kawasana Opu atulungia, maka manga incia sadia adorohaka tee opea ihaejatiakana, sabutuna manga incia atondu i nuncana dosa.
106.44: Maka o Kawasana Opu akamatea o kanarakaana manga incia wakutuuna arangoa o gorana.
106.45: Rampaakanamo Incia afaduli tee manga incia, Kawasana Opu audhanimea o pojanjiana, tee amaasi akamata manga incia apokana tee kaasina molagina motaralabhi-labhi.
106.46: Rampaakanamo Kawasana Opu, manga incia apotibhaaka rahumati sabutuna manga musuna amaasiakea.
106.47: Manga pasalaamatimo, e KAWASANA OPU, e Aulataʼalamami! Manga romusakamo tee manga pambulimo minaaka i lipuna mia, mamudhaakana ingkami tamembali tasukuru i saromu momangkilo tee takaunde-unde wakutuuna tapuji-pujiko.
106.48: Atopujimo o KAWASANA OPU, Aulataʼala isombana miana Israel, sii-sii tee saʼumurua! Taroakamo bhari-bharia mia apogau, "Aamin!" Pujimea o KAWASANA OPU!

107.1: Sukurumo i KAWASANA OPU roonamo Incia amalape, tee kaasina abakaa saʼumurua.
107.2: Taroakamo o giu incia sumai abhoasakea manga mia mopadhana itolosina KAWASANA OPU, siitumo manga incia mopadhana itolosina minaaka i kanarakaa,
107.3: tee mopadhana iromusakana minaaka i manga lipu mosagaanana, minaaka i timbu tee minaaka i bhara, minaaka i napa tee minaaka i salata.
107.4: Dhaangia uka manga mia mopekalingka-lingkana i tana matuu, tee inda amatau dhala moporopena i kampo imbooresina mia.
107.5: Manga incia amaara tee amatuu bhorokona, tee ailamo bhari-bharia iharapuna.
107.6: Manga incia agora tee aemani tulungi i KAWASANA OPU i wakutuuna kaseke, kasiimpo Incia arambasakea manga minaaka i kanarakaana,
107.7: tee atondaia alaloi dhala momakate, sabutuna manga incia akawa i kampo imbooresina mia.
107.8: Taroakamo manga incia asukuru i KAWASANA OPU roonamo kaasina molagina, tee roonamo manga giu inda momentela ipewauna to maanusia,
107.9: sababuna Incia apatumpu incana mia momatuuna bhorokona, tee apekambosu mia momaara tee giu momalape.
107.10: Sagaa minaaka i manga incia auncura i nuncana kalalanda tee kagalapu, manga mia itaangi i katorongku amaporo incana tee atobhoke tee rante ase,
107.11: roonamo manga incia adorohaka tee firimanina Aulataʼala, tee amendeu atarima kaadharina Kawasana Opu Momalanga.
