107.12: Siitumo sababuna Incia apisaki ngangarandana manga incia tee karajaa matamo, manga incia amandawu tee inda dhaangia motulungia.
107.13: Kasiimpo manga incia agora i KAWASANA OPU i wakutuuna kaseke, tee Incia apasalaamatia manga minaaka i kanarakaana;
107.14: Manga incia apalimbaia minaaka i kalalanda tee kagalapu, tee abhotukimea o kabhokena rantena manga incia.
107.15: Taroakamo manga incia asukuru i KAWASANA OPU to kaasina molagina, tee manga giu inda momentela ipewauna to maanusia,
107.16: roonamo Incia apasaki manga bhamba tambaga, tee atumpo manga kapasona bhamba motokarajaana minaaka i ase.
107.17: Dhaangia uka momembalina mokabhongo-bhongo roonamo feʼelina manga incia modorohaka, tee roonamo kasalahana karona, manga incia atosikisaa.
107.18: Manga incia amendeu akande opea uka, tee o ajalana manga incia amakasumo.
107.19: Kasiimpo, manga incia agora aemani tulungi i KAWASANA OPU i wakutuuna kaseke, tee Incia apasalaamatia manga minaaka i kanarakaa.
107.20: KAWASANA OPU afirimani, tee o firimanina sumai amembali apaunto kapiina manga incia, tee apasalaamatia manga minaaka i bhalona koburu.
107.21: Taroakamo manga incia asukuru i KAWASANA OPU roonamo kaasina molagina, tee roonamo manga giu inda momentela ipewauna to maanusia.
107.22: Taroakamo manga incia abhawa pasombaa kasukuru, tee apokoleleakea bhari-bharia ipewauna apoose asambo-sambo!
107.23: Dhaangia uka mosapona mokarajaana i kapala i tawo, siitumo manga mia mopodhagana i andalaoge.
107.24: Manga incia akamatea bhari-bharia ipewauna KAWASANA OPU, tee manga giu inda momentela ipewauna i andalaoge.
107.25: Incia afirimani, sabutuna akawamo ngalu tee garura moangkana manga ewona tawo pekalanga-langa.
107.26: Manga incia atoangka sakawana i antara, kasiimpo atotudhaaka i andalaoge. Manga incia akailanga kabaranina roonamo apoaro tee balaa.
107.27: Manga incia alingka kabhele-bhele tee adida mboomo mia malango, tee ailamo o akalana.
107.28: Kasiimpo manga incia agora aemani tulungi i KAWASANA OPU i wakutuuna kaseke, tee manga incia arambasakea minaaka i kanarakaa,
107.29: tee apaunto garura, sabutuna manga ewo i tawo amembali amalino.
107.30: Kasiimpo manga incia akaunde-unde roonamo amalinomo, tee Incia abhawea manga i labusa iporopeana.
107.31: Taroakamo manga incia asukuru i KAWASANA OPU roonamo kaasina molagina, tee roonamo manga giu inda momentela ipewauna to maanusia!
107.32: Taroakamo manga incia amuliangia i tanga-tangana poromusakaana uumatina, tee apujia i nuncana majilisina manga mancuanana lipu.
107.33: Incia abhalii manga umala amembali tana matuu, tee manga matana uwe amembali tana inda mokouwe.
107.34: Tana mosuburu apamembalia tana mokogara inda momembalina ipombulaaka penembula roonamo kadhakina manga mia mombooresia.
107.35: Incia uka abhalii tana matuu amembali kolam, tee o tana inda mokouwe apamembalia manga matana uwe.
107.36: KAWASANA OPU ataroaka manga mia momaara amboore iwe sumai, kasiimpo manga incia abhangu kota to tampana mbooresana.
107.37: Manga incia ahewi manga inawu tee apombulaakea puuna angguru, tee apotibhaaka timpua mobhari.
107.38: Minaaka i kabarakatina Kawasana Opu, manga incia ajulu o kabharina, tee Incia inda ataroaka binata kadhambaakana akura o kabharina.
107.39: Maka sapadhana sumai, manga incia atalomea musuna, sabutuna o kabharina akuramo tee atungku i aroana bhalina, roonamo o musu apisaki tee apacilaka manga incia tee apekaporoa incana.
107.40: KAWASANA OPU apasapoakea kahina to manga kaogesana lipuna, manga incia apewaua apekalingka-lingka i tana matuu tee inda apotibhaaka dhala.
107.41: Maka o mia misikini aangkea minaaka i kanarakaana, tee manga incia apamembalia ajulu o kabharina mboomo gulumana dumba.
107.42: Manga mia mobanara akamatea o giu incia sumai tee akaunde-unde, maka o ngangana mia madhaki atosoncongi.
107.43: Taroakamo manga mia moʼaarifu akamata bhari-bharia o giu incia sii, tee afahamua o kaasina KAWASANA OPU molagina.

108.2: Ngangarandaku amatangka, e Aulataʼala! Gauku bhekulaguaka lagu kapujia to Ingkoo. Bhangumo, e inyawaku!
108.3: Iaku bhekubhangu tee kumagasiaaka gambusu tee kecapi! Iaku bhekubhangu raneeooge!
108.4: Iaku bhekusukuru i Ingkoo i tanga-tangana manga lipu, e KAWASANA OPU, tee kulaguaka manga lagu kapujia i manga lipu mosagaanana.
108.5: Sababuna o kaasimu molagina amaoge akawa i laiana, tee kabanaramu akawa i taʼina ngalu.
108.6: E Aulataʼala, susuakea kaogesamu i laiana, tee kamuliangimu i saangua alamu.
108.7: Mangapakana tee kuasamu tee uperangoimea o doʼaku, mamudhaakana manga mia imaasiakamu atopasalaamati.
108.8: Aulataʼala padhamo afirimani i tampana momangkilo, "Iaku gauku kukaunde-unde, tee kupodhawu-dhawuaka Tana Sikhem, tee kuʼukuru Mbolongana Sukot."
108.9: Gilead tee Manasye o pewauaku, Efraim mboomo helem minaaka i ase mojaganina bhaaku, tee Yuda katukona pamarintaku.
108.10: Maka o Tana Moab amembali palangga tampana bhanuiana aeku, tee i bhawona Tana Edom kutudhaaka sandaliku. E Tana Filistin, Iaku kusambo-sambomo roonamo padhamo kutaloko!"
108.11: Incema bhemobhawaaku i kota mokobentena makaa sumai? Incema momembalina moʼantaraaku sakawana i Edom?
108.12: E Aulataʼala, buaka mencuana Ingkoo mangabhanakana? E Aulataʼala, Ingkoo inda umaju upobhawa tee tantaramami to taewangi musu.
108.13: Manga tulungi minaaka i musu, roonamo o katulungina maanusia inda akoguna.
108.14: Tapobhawa tee Aulataʼala ingkita tamembali tatalo musuta, sababuna Incia bhemopahancuruna musuta.

109.1: To kapalana molaguna. Zaburuna Daud. Bholi inda tee uuʼuumu, e Aulataʼala ipuji-pujiku.
109.2: Roonamo ngangana manga mia madhaki tee pande gau-gau padha apogauakaaku madhaki; manga incia afitanaaku tee dhela mogau-gau.
109.3: Pogau ibhoasakana manga incia abukeaka kabancia, tee aewangiaku inda akoʼalasa.
109.4: Manga incia araeakaaku kupewau kadhaki to abalasi kaasiku, moomini i tangasaana kudoʼaakea.
109.5: Jadi manga incia abalasi kalapeku tee kadhaki, tee abalasi kaasiku tee kabancia.
109.6: Angkamo o mia madhaki to alawani musuku, taroakamo o mia i weta kaanana to araeakea.
109.7: Ande atoʼadili, taraoakamo incia atobhotukiaka amembali mia mosala, tee doʼana atoabhi dosa.
109.8: Maasangia o umuruna amampodho, tee taroakamo kauncuramakana aalea mia mosagaanana.
109.9: Taroakamo manga anana amembali amaelu, tee o bhawinena amembali iaiaro.
109.10: Taroakamo manga anana apekalingka-lingka tee apengkaemani, maasangia manga incia atopadhencu minaaka i karunggana bhanuana.
109.11: Maasangia o mia pande giwuna dhosa aalea bhari-bharia pewauana modhaangiana i karona, tee maasangia mia mosagaanana arampasia hasilina usahana.
109.12: Bholi dhaangia samia uka momalapena incana tee incia, atawa momaasiakana manga ana-anana momaeluna sumai.
109.13: Taroakamo bhari-bharia siwuluna atopabinasa, tee o sarona atomalinguaka i siwulu muri-murina.
109.14: Taroakamo kasalahana opu-opuana sadhaadhaa audhania KAWASANA OPU, tee inda ahapusu dosana inana.
109.15: Taroakamo kasalahana sadhaadhaa i aroana KAWASANA OPU, tee inda dhaangia uka moudhanina mia incia sumai i alamu,
109.16: roonamo incia inda dhaangia audhani kalape, tangkanamo apadhende mia monarakaa tee mia motopisaki, tee mia momaporona incana sakawana amate.
109.17: Incia sadia apekatunda, jadi taroakamo o katundana akangkanai karona! Incia amendeu adoʼaaka tee abarakati mia mosagaanana, jadi taroakamo o barakati amaridho minaaka i karona!
109.18: Incia apake katunda mboomo bajuna, maasangia katunda sumai apesua i nuncana badana mboomo uwe, tee apesua i nuncana buku-bukuna mboomo mina.
109.19: Taroakamo o katunda sumai amembali mboomo juba ipakena to mosalibumbungiakana karona, tee mboomo kabhokena tanga mosadiana abhokeaka tangana.
109.20: Taroakamo o giu incia sii amembali kabalasina KAWASANA OPU to manga mia moraeakaaku, tee manga mia mopogauakaaku madhaki.
109.21: Maka Ingkoo, e KAWASANA OPU, e Aulataʼalaku, tulungiakumo roonamo saromu, tee upasalaamatiaku roonamo kalapemu tee kaasimu molagina.
109.22: Roonamo iaku sii kunarakaa tee kumisikini, tee i nuncana karoku amambela o ngangarandaku.
109.23: Iaku kuila mboomo ngkamia-mia i wakutuuna konowia; inyawaku mboomo kabhoro itantamaka.
109.24: Toputuku arengku roonamo kupoasa, tee o badaku amangkurumo.
109.25: Mia moraeakaaku ahinaaku; wakutuuna akamataaku, manga incia alengko-lengko bhaana.
109.26: E KAWASANA OPU, e Aulataʼalaku, tulungiaku. Pasalaamatiaku apokana tee kaasimu molagina.
109.27: Taroakamo o musuku amataua ande bhari-bharia sumai ipewauna limamu, tee amataua ande Ingkoo mopewaua e KAWASANA OPU.
109.28: Taroakamo manga incia apekatunda, maka Ingkoo ubarakatiaku. Taroakamo manga incia apotibhaaka kaea, maka o bhatuamu sii bheakaunde-unde.
109.29: Taroakamo manga mia moraeakaaku apake kaʼaebu to bajuna, tee taroakamo manga incia aposalibumbuaka kaeana mboomo juba motutubhina karona.
109.30: Iaku sadia bhekusukuru i KAWASANA OPU tee ngangaku, tee bhekupujia i tanga-tangana mia bhari
109.31: roonamo Incia aewaaka mia misikini to apasalaamatia minaaka i manga mia mohukumua.

110.1: Zaburuna Daud. Mboo siimo o firimanina KAWASANA OPU to Opuku, "Uncuramo i weta kaanaku, sakawana kupewau manga musumu amembali polandakana aemu."
110.2: KAWASANA OPU bheapekaewa pamarintamu minaaka i Kota Sion. Kokuasamo i tanga-tangana manga musumu!
110.3: Raʼeatimu arela bheamaju tee totona incana, i eona ukapalai manga pasukamu i bhawona manga gunu momangkilo. Manga ana manguramu bheaumba i aroamu, mboomo alo mosapona i wakutuuna raneeo.
110.4: KAWASANA OPU padhamo apotunda tee Incia inda bheahelaia pendua o kambotuna, "Ingkoo satotuuna o imamu to saʼumurua mboomo tuturana Malkisedik."
110.5: Kawasana Opu dhaangia i weta kaanamu; Incia bheapahancuru manga raja i eona pamuruna.
110.6: Incia bheahukumu manga lipu, sabutuna o lipu sumai abukeaka tee manga maeati. Incia bheapasaki bhaana manga musuna i saangua alamu.
110.7: Incia bheasumpu minaaka i saangu umala modhaangiana i bhiwina dhala, siitumo incia bheaangka bhaana roonamo padhamo atalo manga musuna.

111.1: Pujimea o KAWASANA OPU! Iaku bhekusukuru i KAWASANA OPU tee mpuu-mpuuna incaku i tampa poromusakaana mia momakatena incana tee i tampana poromusakaana uumati.
111.2: Tapanamo inda amentela ipewauna KAWASANA OPU, alaenga mpuu afikiria bhari-bharia mia mopeelua,
111.3: pewauna amulia tee atopuji, kabanarana sadhaadhaa to saʼumurua.
111.4: Incia apatokamata manga pewauna inda momentelana mamudhaakana sadhaadhaa taudhania; KAWASANA OPU sumai amalape incana tee amaasiaka uumatina.
111.5: KAWASANA OPU adhawu razakii i mia momaekaia, Incia sadhaadhaa audhani janjina.
111.6: KAWASANA OPU padhamo asusuaka kuasana i uumatina, tee manga incia adhawuakea tana tinaurakana manga lipu.
111.7: KAWASANA OPU apewau adili tee amembali atoparacaea i nuncana bhari-bharia ipewauna, tee bhari-bharia parintana atoparacaea.
111.8: Bhari-bharia sadhaadhaa amatangka to saʼumurua, tee apewaua i nuncana kaʼadili tee kabanara.
111.9: KAWASANA OPU padhamo apabebasi uumatina, tee apatotapuaka pojanjiana to saʼumurua. Sarona amangkilo tee amaoge!
111.10: Mia momaekana i KAWASANA OPU satotuuna o auwalina mia amembali aʼaarifu; bhari-bharia mia mopewaua apotibhaaka fahamu momalape. Kapujia to KAWASANA OPU asadhaadhaa saʼumurua!

112.1: Pujimea o KAWASANA OPU! Amasanaamo mia momaekana i KAWASANA OPU, mopeeluna mpuu manga parintana.
112.2: Manga opu-opuana bheakokuasa i alamu, tee siwulu momakatena incana bheatobarakati.
112.3: Harataa tee karangkaea dhaangia i nuncana bhanuana, tee kabanarana manga incia sadhaadhaa to saʼumurua.
112.4: Moomini i nuncana kalalanda, dhaangia tee kainawa to mia mosaalihi; siitumo to mia momalape, momaasi, tee mobanara.
112.5: Akodhawuamo o mia mobukeakana kaasi tee momenturuna mopekapadhaakana doina, tee aʼadili i nuncana bhari-bharia karajaana.
112.6: Roonamo iimanina mia mobanara inda bheakohudha saʼumurua, tee bheatoudhani saʼumurua.
112.7: Manga incia inda amaeka tee lele madhaki; incana amatangka roonamo aparacaea i KAWASANA OPU.
112.8: Incana amatangka tee manga incia inda amaeka; sabutuna manga incia bheakamata manga musuna amatalo.
112.9: Tee relana totona incana, manga incia sadia asadakaa i mia misikini. Kabanarana sadhaadhaa to saʼumurua; manga incia akokuasa tee atohoromati.
112.10: Manga mia madhaki akamata giu incia sumai asabhaakea randana; manga incia uka apakiri-kiri ngincina, kasiimpo amofu. Opea ihaejatiakana mia madhaki inda bheamembali.

113.1: Pujimea o KAWASANA OPU! Pujimea, e manga bhatuana KAWASANA OPU, pujimea o sarona KAWASANA OPU!
113.2: Bhari-bharia kapujia to sarona KAWASANA OPU, sii-sii sampe saʼumurua!
113.3: Pepuu minaaka i abhete matanaeo sakawana asoo matanaeo, sarona KAWASANA OPU alaenga atopuji.
113.4: KAWASANA OPU amalanga tee akokuasa i bhawona bhari-bharia lipu, tee kamuliangina alabhi amalanga minaaka i laiana.
113.5: Incema buaka mboomo KAWASANA OPU, Aulataʼalata, mokokauncuramakana i tampa momalanga,
113.6: tee mopaʼungkona karona to apotonto i laiana tee i alamu?
113.7: Incia aangka mia misikini minaaka i ngawu, tee apalimba mia monarakaa minaaka i kabumbuna ngawu
113.8: to apauncura manga incia aposaangu tee manga kaogesa minaaka i uumatina.
113.9: Incia arahumatiakea anaana i manga bhawine mokomba, sabutuna o bhawine sumai akaunde-unde i nuncana bhanuana. Pujimea o KAWASANA OPU!

114.1: Wakutuuna miana Israel alimba minaaka i Mesir, siitumo wakutuuna siwuluna Yakub abholi lipu moposalana pogauna sumai,
114.2: Kawasana Opu apamembali Yuda tampana momangkilo, tee Israel amembali tampana pamarintana.
114.3: Tawo Towu Lambe akamata KAWASANA OPU sabutuna apalai tee amembali amatuu, Umala Yordan ambuli i talikuna.
114.4: Manga gunu apekalumpa-lumpa mboomo dumba umane, tee manga kabumbu apekatiba-tiba mboomo anana dumba.
114.5: E Tawo Towu Lambe, apokia upalai? E Umala Yordan, apokia umbuli i talikumu?
114.6: E manga gunu, apokia upekalumpa-lumpa mboomo dumba umane, tee manga kabumbu, apokia upekatiba-tiba mboomo anana dumba?
114.7: E alamu, torendemo i aroana Kawasana Opu, i aroana Aulataʼala isombana Yakub,
114.8: mopamembalina uwe alimba minaaka i nuncana bhatu sakawana amembali tampana lembokana uwe to asumpuaka miana Yahudi, tee o bhatu dhempa amembali matana uwe.

115.1: Mencuana ingkami, e KAWASANA OPU, mencuana ingkami, maka soomo saromu molaengana imuliangi, roonamo kaasimu molagina tee umembali utoparacaea.
115.2: Pokia manga lipu mosagaanana bheapogau, "I iapai o Aulataʼalana manga incia?"
115.3: Aulataʼalamami dhaangia i sorogaa, Incia bheapewau opeapo uka ipeeluna.
115.4: Barahalana manga lipu sumai minaaka i bulawa tee pera, ikarajaana limana maanusia.
115.5: Manga barahala sumai akomuncu, maka inda amembali apogau, akomata, maka inda amembali apokamata,
115.6: akotalinga, maka inda amembali aporango, akoango, maka inda amembali apebhou,
115.7: akolima, maka inda dhaangia momembalina ipererena, akoae, maka inda amembali alingka, tee inda amembali uka apalimba suara minaaka i goncona.
115.8: Manga mia mokarajaaia amembali apokana tee barahala sumai, tee bhari-bharia mia moparacaeana i barahala sumai.
115.9: E Israel, paracaeamo i KAWASANA OPU! Incia motulungikomiu tee amembali katangkesi mojaganikomiu.
115.10: E manga imamu mominaakana i siwuluna Harun, paracaeamo i KAWASANA OPU. Incia motulungikomiu tee amembali katangkesi mojaganikomiu.
115.11: E manga mia momaekana tee KAWASANA OPU, paracaeamo i KAWASANA OPU! Incia motulungikomiu tee amembali katangkesi mojaganikomiu.
115.12: KAWASANA OPU manga udhani tee bheamangabarakati, Incia bheabarakati miana Israel, tee bhari-bharia imamu mominaakana i siwuluna Harun,
115.13: tee Incia bheabarakati manga mia momaekana tee KAWASANA OPU, malape o kaogesa atawa o mia momaidhiidhi.
115.14: Maasangia KAWASANA OPU apekabharia o siwulumu, malape to ingkoo atawa to manga anamu.
115.15: Maasangia ingkoo abarakatiko KAWASANA OPU, mopadhaangiana laiana tee alamu!
115.16: Laiana momalanga sumai o pewauana KAWASANA OPU, maka o alamu sii padhamo adhawuakea to anana maanusia.
115.17: Manga mia momate inda bheapuji-puji KAWASANA OPU, mboo sumai uka manga mia mosapona i duniana mia mate momalino,
115.18: maka ingkita dhaangiapo modhadhina sii bhemopujina KAWASANA OPU pepuu sii-sii sakawana saʼumurua. Pujimea o KAWASANA OPU!

116.1: Iaku kumaasiaka KAWASANA OPU, sababuna Incia arango goraku tee bhari-bharia iemaniku.
116.2: Roonamo Incia aperangoiaku, sumaimo bhekugora i Incia saʼumurua dhadiku.
116.3: Manga katapu imateaka abulilingiaku, kanarakaa i nuncana koburu angkakanaiku, iaku kunamisi kaseke tee kaporo.
116.4: Kasiimpo kugoraaka sarona KAWASANA OPU, "E KAWASANA OPU, pasalaamatia o inyawaku!"
116.5: KAWASANA OPU satotuuna amalape tee abanara; Aulataʼalata satotuuna amaasiaka uumatina.
116.6: KAWASANA OPU ajagani manga mia inda momembalina motulungina karona. Wakutuuna inda tee kakaaku, Incia mopasalaamatiaku.
116.7: E ngangarandaku, tanangimo pendua roonamo KAWASANA OPU padhamo apewau malape tee ingkoo.
116.8: E KAWASANA OPU, Ingkoo padhamo upasalaamati inyawaku minaaka i mate, ujagani mataku mamudhaakana inda kutangi, tee upekatangka aeku mamudhaakana inda atosunu.
116.9: Iaku bhekudhala i aroana KAWASANA OPU, i lipuna manga mia modhadhi.
116.10: Iaku sadhaadhaa kuparacaea, moomini wakutuuna kupogau, "Iaku kunarakaa mpuu."
116.11: I wakutuuna kubingu kupogau, "Bhari-bharia mia inda amembali atoparacaea."
116.12: Opea buaka momembalina ipasombaakaku i KAWASANA OPU to kubalasiaka bhari-bharia kalapena incana to karoku?
116.13: Iaku bhekuangka tondena kasalaamati tee kugoraaka sarona KAWASANA OPU.
116.14: Iaku bhekutolosi tolauna oniku i KAWASANA OPU i aroana bhari-bharia uumatina.
116.15: Akoharagaa i matana KAWASANA OPU matena manga mia mosaalihi.
116.16: E KAWASANA OPU, satotuuna iaku sii o bhatuamu. Iakumo bhatuamu, o anana minaaka i bhatuamu bhawine. Ingkoo padhamo urambasakaaku minaaka i kabhokeku.
116.17: Iaku bhekupasombaaka kurubani sukuru to Ingkoo tee kugoraaka sarona KAWASANA OPU.
116.18: Iaku bhekutolosi tolauna oniku i KAWASANA OPU i aroana bhari-bharia uumatina,
116.19: i tanalapana Baitullana KAWASANA OPU, i tanga-tangamu, e Yerusalem! Pujimea o KAWASANA OPU!

117.1: Pujimo KAWASANA OPU, e bhari-bharia lipu! Muliangimea Incia, e bhari-bharia lipu!
117.2: Roonamo amaoge o kaasina molagina to ingkita tee KAWASANA OPU amembali atoparacaea saʼumurua. Pujimo KAWASANA OPU!

118.1: Sukurumo i KAWASANA OPU roonamo Incia amalape, kaasina molagina abakaa saʼumurua.
118.2: Taroakamo miana Israel apogau, "Kaasina molagina abakaa saʼumurua."
118.3: Taroakamo siwuluna Harun apogau, "Kaasina molagina abakaa saʼumurua."
118.4: Taroakamo bhari-bharia mia momaekana i KAWASANA OPU apogau, "Kaasina molagina abakaa saʼumurua."
118.5: I nuncana kaseke iaku kugora i KAWASANA OPU, KAWASANA OPU alawaniaku tee apekalalesaia o ngangarandaku.
118.6: Iaku inda bhekumaeka roonamo KAWASANA OPU apoose tee iaku; maanusia inda amembali apewau opeopea tee iaku.
118.7: KAWASANA OPU apoose tee iaku to atulungiaku, iaku bhekukamata manga mia mobanciaku atotalo.
118.8: Salabhina kupeulu i KAWASANA OPU, tee kuparacaea i maanusia.
118.9: Salabhina kupeulu i KAWASANA OPU, tee kuparacaea i manga kaogesa.
118.10: Bhari-bharia lipu alibuaku, maka tee kuasana KAWASANA OPU, manga incia kutaloa!
118.11: Manga incia alibuaku; umbe, manga incia alibuaku minaaka i bhari-bharia rope, maka tee kuasana KAWASANA OPU, manga incia kutaloa!
118.12: Manga incia alibuaku mboomo uwani, maka manga incia atopekatalo i nuncana sakija mata mboomo waa motununa rumpu mokorui-rui. Tee kuasana KAWASANA OPU, manga incia kutaloa!
118.13: Iaku amakaa kutojumpuraka sabutuna saidhepo kumandawu, maka o Kawasana Opu atulungiaku.
118.14: KAWASANA OPU o kakaaku tee kapujiaku. Incia amembalimo kasalaamatiku.
118.15: Dhaangia o suarana sambo-sambo tee kamangantalo i nuncana kemana manga mia mobanara, "Lima kaanana KAWASANA OPU apewau manga giu momaoge!
118.16: Lima kaanana KAWASANA OPU atopekalanga! Lima kaanana KAWASANA OPU apewau manga giu momaoge!"
118.17: Iaku inda bhekumate, maka kudhadhi tee kupakoleleaka manga pewauna KAWASANA OPU.
118.18: KAWASANA OPU padhamo ahukumuaku pekakaa, maka Incia inda apasaraakaaku i mate.
118.19: Bungkaleakaaku manga bhambana lawana kabanara, mamudhaakana iaku bhekupesua tee kusukuru i KAWASANA OPU.
118.20: Siimo bhambana lawana KAWASANA OPU, manga mia mobanara bheapesuaikia alaloia.
118.21: Iaku bhekusukuru tee Ingkoo, roonamo Ingkoo padhamo ulawani doʼaku, tee umembalimo mopasalaamatiaku.
118.22: Bhatu ibhanakana manga pandena bhanua amembalimo bhatu parapuu mobhaa-bhaana.
118.23: Siimo pewauna KAWASANA OPU, inda amentela i matata.
118.24: Siimo o eo ipadhaangiana KAWASANA OPU, maimo tasambo-sambo tee takaunde-unde rampaakanamo Incia.
118.25: E KAWASANA OPU, manga pasalaamatimo! E KAWASANA OPU, manga dhawumo kamangantalo!
118.26: Atobarakatimo incia moumbana i nuncana sarona KAWASANA OPU! Ingkami taemaniakako barakati minaaka i nuncana Baitullana KAWASANA OPU.
118.27: KAWASANA OPU o Aulataʼala, tee Incia manga suluwina. Bhokemea o kurubanina raraea sumai tee rabuta i manga tanduna singkuna tampana tunuana kurubanina KAWASANA OPU.
118.28: Ingkoomo o Aulataʼalaku, iaku bhekusukuru tee Ingkoo; Ingkoomo o Aulataʼalaku, iaku bhekumuliangiko!
118.29: Sukurumo i KAWASANA OPU roonamo Incia amalape tee kaasina molagina abakaa saʼumurua.

119.1: Amasanaamo mia modhadhina inda tee kasalahana, tee adhadhi aose hukumuna KAWASANA OPU.
119.2: Amasanaamo mia moosena manga tuturana, mopeeloa tee mpuu-mpuuna incana,
119.3: tee inda apewau kadhaki, maka adhadhi aose manga dhalana.
119.4: Manga kasameamu padhamo upatotapuakea, mamudhaakana atokeniaka mpuu-mpuu.
119.5: Maasangia o bhengkalaku amatangka mamudhaakana kuosea mpuu-mpuu manga katotapumu!
119.6: Sumaimo, iaku inda bhekupotibhaaka kaea ande iaku kuperangoi bhari-bharia parintamu.
119.7: Iaku bhekusukuru i Ingkoo tee kakatena totona incaku wakutuuna kupengkaadhariaka manga tuturamu mobanara
119.8: Iaku bhekukeniakea mpuu-mpuu manga katotapumu, bholi sampeampearo ubholiaku.
119.9: Tee opea o mia mangura ajagani pemingkuina mamudhaakana sadhaadhaa amangkilo? Ajagania alaloi pemingkuina apokana tee firimanimu.
119.10: Iaku kupeeloko tee mpuu-mpuuna incaku; bholi utaroakaaku kusaladhala minaaka i parintamu.
119.11: Firimanimu kudhikaia i nuncana ngangarandaku mamudhaakana inda kukodosa tee Ingkoo.
119.12: Bhari-bharia kapujia to Ingkoo, e KAWASANA OPU! Adhariakaaku manga katotapumu.
119.13: Tee bhiwiku kupetulatulaaka bhari-bharia tutura ibhoasakamu.
119.14: Iaku kukaunde-unde kuose manga tuturamu, mboomo mokopewauaakana sagala giuna harataa.
119.15: Iaku bhekufikiria mpuu-mpuu manga kasameamu, tee bhekukamatea manga dhalamu.
119.16: Iaku bhekukaunde-unde roonamo manga katotapumu, tee inda bhekumalinguakea o firimanimu.
119.17: Pewaumo giu malape i bhatuamu mamudhaakana sadhaadhaa kudhadhi, tee bhekukeniakea mpuu-mpuu o firimanimu.
119.18: Bungkalea o mataku mamudhaakana bhekukamata manga giu inda momentela minaaka i hukumumu.
119.19: Iaku samia dhaga i dunia sii, bholi ubuniakea o parintamu minaaka i karoku.
119.20: Incaku amapii roonamo sadia kupemeliliaka manga tuturamu.
119.21: Ingkoo ugorampangi manga mia mosombo, siitumo manga mia mototunda, mosaladhalana minaaka i parintamu.
119.22: Pekaridhoakaaku minaaka i kaele-ele tee kahinana manga incia, roonamo kuose manga tuturamu.
119.23: Moomini manga kaogesa apomufakati to aewangiaku, bhatuamu sii bheafikiria mpuu-mpuu manga katotapumu.
119.24: Manga tuturamu amembali kapeeluku tee amembali monaasehatiaku.
119.25: Inyawaku apika tee ngawu roonamo kumatalo; padhadhiaku apokana tee firimanimu.
119.26: Iaku padhamo kupetulatulaaka dhalana dhadiku, Ingkoo ulawaniaku; adhariakaaku manga katotapumu.
119.27: Tulungiaku mamudhaakana kumembali kumaʼanaia manga kasameamu, sumaimo iaku bhekufikiria mpuu-mpuu manga pewaumu inda momentela sumai.
119.28: Inyawaku atangi roonamo kaporona inca, pekatangkaaku apokana mboomo firimanimu.
119.29: Pekaridhoakaaku minaaka i dhala inda mobanara, tee roonamo kalapena incamu, uadhariakaakumo o hukumumu.
119.30: Iaku kupili dhala mobanara; manga tuturamu padhamo kudhikaia i aroaku.
119.31: Iaku padhamo kukeniaka bhari-bharia o tuturamu, e KAWASANA OPU; bholi utaroakaaku kupotibhaaka kaea.
119.32: Iaku kuose manga parinta isusuakamu roonamo Ingkoo mopekalalesana ngangarandaku.
119.33: E KAWASANA OPU, adhariakaaku manga katotapumu sumaimo bhekuosea sakawana kumate.
119.34: Pamembaliaku kumaʼanaia hukumumu mamudhaakana kutaʼatia, tee kukeniakea pekatangka tee mpuu-mpuuna incaku.
119.35: Tondaakumo mamudhaakana kudhadhi kuose manga parintamu, roonamo giumo incia sumai ipeeluku.
119.36: Pamembalia o ngangarandaku to aose manga tuturamu, mencuana kupeelo laba.
119.37: Pekaridhoakaaku o mataku minaaka i manga giu mosia-sia, padhadhiaku i nuncana manga dhalamu.
119.38: Pekatangkea o janjimu i bhatuamu, idhawuakamu to mia momaekako.
119.39: Pekaridhoakaaku o kahina imaekaku sumai roonamo manga tuturamu amalape.
119.40: Satotuuna kupemeliliaka manga kasameamu; padhadhiaku i nuncana kabanaramu.
119.41: E KAWASANA OPU, maasangia o kaasimu molagina aumbatiaku, tee o kasalaamatimu apokana tee janjimu.
119.42: Tee mboo sumai, amembali kulawani manga mia mohinaaku roonamo kuparacaea i Firimanimu.
119.43: Bholi sampeampearo ualea pendua manga firimanimu mobanara minaaka i ngangaku, roonamo kuparacaea tee tuturamu.
119.44: Iaku bhekutorotorosu kukeniakea pekatangka o hukumumu to saʼumurua.
119.45: Iaku bhekudhadhi i nuncana kalalesa roonamo kupeelo manga kasameamu.
119.46: Iaku uka bhekupogauaka manga tuturamu i aroana manga raja, tee iaku inda bhekumaea.
119.47: Iaku kumasanaa roonamo manga parintamu imaasiakaku sumai.
119.48: Iaku bhekuangka limaku to kumuliangiaka manga parintamu imaasiakaku sumai, tee bhekufikiria mpuu-mpuu manga katotapumu.
119.49: Udhania o firimani ipakawaakamu to bhatuamu roonamo firimanimu sumai mopamembaliaku dhaangia tee iharapuku.
119.50: Siimo mohiburuaku i nuncana kanarakaaku ande o janjimu sumai mopadhadhiaku.
119.51: Mia mosombo ahinaaku mpuu, maka iaku inda kusaladhala minaaka i hukumumu.
119.52: Wakutuuna kuudhani manga tuturamu modhaangiana minaaka i piamo itu, sumaimo atohiburumo incaku, e KAWASANA OPU.
119.53: Amasodho o ngangarandaku roonamo mia madhaki tee mia inda moosena hukumumu.
119.54: Kangengena dhadhiku momampodho i alamu sii, katotapumu kupamembalia manga lagu kapujiaku.
119.55: Wakutuuna amalo kuudhanimo saromu, e KAWASANA OPU, tee kukeniakea pekatangka o hukumumu.
119.56: Barakatimo incia sii momembalina dhawuku roonamo padhamo kuose manga kasameamu.
119.57: KAWASANA OPU o dhawuku, iaku padhamo kupojanji to kukeniakea pekatangka o firimanimu.
119.58: Iaku kuemani kaasina incamu tee mpuu-mpuuna incaku, maasiakaaku apokana tee janjimu.
119.59: Iaku kufikiri dhalana dhadhiku, tee kubhotukiakea to kumbuli kuose manga tuturamu;
119.60: kupekadhei tee inda kupekanoe-noe to kukeniakea pekatangka manga parintamu.
119.61: Mia madhaki ataakaaku katapu, maka iaku inda kumalinguaka hukumumu.
119.62: Pontanga malo iaku bhekubhangu to kupujiko, roonamo manga tuturamu mobanara.
119.63: Iaku kuposabhangka tee bhari-bharia mia momaekako, tee mokenina pekatangka manga kasameamu.
119.64: E KAWASANA OPU, alamu sii abukeaka tee kaasimu molagina; adhariakaaku manga katotapumu.
119.65: Ingkoo padhamo upewau kalape i bhatuamu, apokana tee firimanimu, e KAWASANA OPU.
119.66: Dhawuakaaku hikimati tee ilimuu, roonamo kuparacaea tee manga parintamu.
119.67: Wakutuuna indapo uhukumuaku, iaku kusaladhala, maka sii-sii kukeniakea pekatangka o firimanimu.
119.68: Ingkoo umalape tee upewau kalape; adhariakaaku manga katotapumu.
119.69: Mia mosombo afitanaaku, maka iaku kuose manga kasameamu tee mpuu-mpuuna incaku.
119.70: Incana manga incia amakapa mboomo tabha sabutuna inda anamisi opeopea, maka iaku kumaasiaka hukumumu.
119.71: Amalape uka to iaku ande kutopisaki mamudhaakana kumembali kupengkaadhariaka manga katotapumu.
119.72: Hukumu ibhoasakamu alabhi o kalapena to iaku minaaka i rewuna tibhana bulawa tee pera.
119.73: Limamumo mopamembaliaku tee mopebhanguiaku; dhawuaku katau mamudhaakana kumembali kupengkaadhariaka manga parintamu.
119.74: Manga mia momaekako bheakamataaku tee akaunde-unde roonamo kuharapu i firimanimu.
119.75: E KAWASANA OPU, iaku kumataua ande o tuturamu abanara, tee moomini padhamo upanarakaaku, Ingkoo sadhaadhaa umembali utoparacaea.
119.76: Taroakamo kaasimu molagina mohiburuaku, apokana tee janjimu i bhatuamu.
119.77: Taroakamo rahumatimu aumba i iaku mamudhaakana kudhadhi, roonamo hukumumu satotuuna ipeeluku.
119.78: Taroakamo mia mosombo amaea, roonamo manga incia afitanaaku inda tee sababuna, maka iaku bhekufikiria mpuu-mpuu manga kasameamu.
119.79: Taroakamo manga mia momaekako aumbatiaku, siitumo manga incia momatauna manga tuturamu.
119.80: Maasangia o ngangarandaku inda alimba minaaka i manga katotapumu mamudhaakana iaku inda kupotibhaaka kaea.
119.81: Ngangarandaku apemeliliaka kasalaamati minaaka i Ingkoo, iaku kuharapu i firimanimu.
119.82: Mataku amarea roonamo kupemeliliaka janjimu; iaku kupogau, "Naepia buaka Ingkoo bheuhiburuaku?"
119.83: Moomini iaku mboomo saangu kadhuna angguru momalusa, iaku inda kumalinguakea manga katotapumu.
119.84: Sakawana naepia buaka o bhatuamu tabeana bheaantagiko? Naepia buaka Ingkoo bheuhukumu manga mia mopajereaku?
119.85: Manga mia mosombo padhamo aseli kabhalongko to karoku, siitumo manga mia inda motaʼatina tee hukumumu.
119.86: Bhari-bharia parintamu atoparacaea. Tulungiaku, roonamo manga incia apajereaku inda tee sababuna!
119.87: Saidhepo manga incia apekamateaku, maka iaku inda kubholia manga kasameamu.
119.88: Padhadhiaku apokana tee kaasimu molagina mamudhaakana kukeniakea mpuu-mpuu manga tutura ipakawaakamu.
119.89: E KAWASANA OPU, firimanimu amatangka saʼumurua i sorogaa.
119.90: Ingkoo amembali utoparacaea saʼumurua zamani; Ingkoo upekatangka alamu sabutuna asadhaadhaa adhaangia.
119.91: Manga tuturamu asadhaadhaa sakawana sii-sii roonamo bhari-bharia modhaangia o bhatuamu.
119.92: Ande o hukumumu inda amembali giu imasanaakana incaku, sumaimo dhaanamo kubinasa i nuncana kanarakaaku.
119.93: Inda sampeampearo bhekumalinguakea manga kasameamu, roonamo alaloi bhari-bharia giu incia sumai Ingkoo upadhadhiaku.
119.94: Iaku sii o pewauamu; pasalaamatiaku, roonamo iaku padhamo kupeeloa manga kasameamu.
119.95: Manga mia madhaki aantagiaku to apabinasaaku, maka iaku bhekufikiria mpuu-mpuu manga tuturamu.
119.96: Bhari-bharia ikamataku dhaangia tee batasina, moomini o giu mosangka, maka o parintamu amaewa mpuu.
119.97: Tapanamo kumaasiakea o hukumumu! Iaku kufikiria mpuu-mpuu saeoa.
119.98: Manga parintamu apamembaliaku kuʼaarifu minaaka i manga musuku, roonamo bhari-bharia giu incia sumai sadia adhaangia i karoku.
119.99: Katauku alabhi o kabharina minaaka imatauna manga guruku, roonamo kufikiria mpuu-mpuu manga tuturamu.
119.100: Kumembali kumaʼanaia alabhi minaaka i manga mancuana, roonamo iaku kuose manga kasameamu.
119.101: Kutaangia o aeku minaaka i bhari-bharia pewau madhaki, mamudhaakana kumembali kukenia mpuu-mpuu o firimanimu.
119.102: Iaku inda kusaladhala minaaka i manga tuturamu, roonamo Ingkoomo mopadhana moadhariaku.
119.103: Tapanamo kameko o firimanimu, alabhi o kamekona minaaka i golana uwani!
119.104: Minaaka i manga kasameamu kupotibhaaka katau, siitumo sababuna kubancia bhari-bharia dhala inda mobanara.
119.105: Firimanimu mboomo kanturu mosuluwina bhengkalaku, tee mopekainawana dhalaku.
119.106: Iaku padhamo kuposumpa tee bhekupekatangkea pendua, ande bhekukeniakea mpuu manga tuturamu mobanarana sumai.
119.107: Iaku kunarakaa mpuu, e KAWASANA OPU, padhadhiaku pendua apokana tee firimanimu.
119.108: Maasangia utarimaia o pasombaana karelana incaku, siitumo manga kapujiaku, e KAWASANA OPU, tee uadhariakaaku manga tuturamu.
119.109: Iaku sadia kutaaka inyawaku, maka iaku inda kumalinguakea o hukumumu.
119.110: Manga mia madhaki ataa katapu to iaku, maka iaku inda kusaladhala minaaka i manga kasameamu.
119.111: Manga tuturamu kupamembalia dhawuku mobakaa, roonamo bhari-bharia sumai satotuuna mopaunde-undena incaku.
119.112: Iaku padhamo kubhawea o ngangarandaku to kupewauaka manga katotapumu to saʼumurua, sakawana aahirina dhadhiku.
119.113: Iaku kubancia manga mia inda mototona incana, maka kumaasiakea o hukumumu.
119.114: Ingkoomo tampana peulusaku tee katangkesi mojaganiaku; iaku kuharapu i firimanimu.
119.115: Pekaridhomo minaaka i iaku, e manga mia mopewauna madhaki, mamudhaakana kumembali kuose manga parintana Aulataʼalaku.
119.116: Pekakaaku apokana tee janjimu mamudhaakana kudhadhi, tee bholi upekaeaaku i nuncana harapuku.
119.117: Tukoaku mamudhaakana kutopasalaamati, tee sadia bhekuhoromatia manga katotapumu.
119.118: Ingkoo umendeu bhari-bharia mia mosaladhalana minaaka i manga katotapumu, roonamo inda akoguna o katipuna manga incia.
119.119: Ingkoo uabhia bhari-bharia mia madhaki i alamu mboomo karombuna pera; siitumo sababuna kumaasiakea manga tuturamu.
119.120: Badaku arengku roonamo kumeakako, tee kumaeka tee manga tuturamu.
119.121: Iaku padhamo kupewau kaʼadili tee kabanara, bholi upasaraakaaku i manga mia mopisakiaku.
119.122: Pojanjimo ande o bhatuamu bheamalape; bholi utaroakaaku apisakiaku manga mia mosombo.
119.123: Mataku amarea roonamo kuantaantagi kasalaamati minaaka i Ingkoo, tee utolosia o janjimu mobanara sumai.
119.124: Pewaumo to iaku apokana tee kaasimu molagina, tee uadhariakaaku manga katotapumu.
119.125: Iaku o bhatuamu; dhawuaku maʼana, mamudhaakana kumataua manga tuturamu.
119.126: Akawamo wakutuuna to KAWASANA OPU abhangu tee ahukumu manga incia, roonamo manga incia inda ataʼati hukumumu.
119.127: Siitumo sababuna, kumaasiaka manga parintamu alabhi minaaka i bulawa, alabhi minaaka i bulawa asilii.
119.128: Siitumo sababuna, kupekakate dhalaku to kuose bhari-bharia kasameamu; tee kubancia bhari-bharia dhala inda mobanara.
119.129: Manga tuturamu inda amentela; sababuna sumai kuosea.
119.130: Wakutuuna firimanimu sumai atopatinda, amembali adhawuaka kainawa tee adhawuaka maʼana to mia inda momatauna opeopea.
119.131: Iaku kubungkale ngangaku tee kukahaahaa, roonamo kupemeliliaka manga parintamu.
119.132: Tontoakumo tee umaasiakaakumo, mboomo kananea ipewaumu to mia momaasiakana saromu.
119.133: Pekatangkea o bhengkalaku tee firimanimu, tee bholi utaroakaaku akuasaiaku kadhaki.
119.134: Tolosiakumo minaaka i manga mia mopisakiaku mamudhaakana kumembali kukeniakea mpuu-mpuu manga kasameamu.
119.135: Taroakamo roumu akocahea i bhawona karoku, tee uadhariakaaku manga katotapumu.
119.136: Loluku asiwulu mboomo umala, roonamo mia inda akeniakea mpuu-mpuu o hukumumu.
119.137: E KAWASANA OPU, Ingkoo uʼadili tee manga tuturamu uka abanara.
119.138: Manga tuturamu padhamo upatotapuakea i nuncana kabanara tee alaenga atoparacaea.
119.139: Amaraku ahanda mpuu i nuncana karoku roonamo manga musuku amalinguaka firimanimu.
119.140: Janjimu atouji mpuu; rampaakanamo sumai kumaasiakea.
119.141: Iaku sii kumaidhiidhi tee kumembali mia mohina, maka iaku inda kumalinguakea manga kasameamu.
119.142: Kabanaramu atotuu saʼumurua, tee o hukumumu atoparacaea.
119.143: Kaseke tee kanarakaa akangkanaiaku, maka manga parintamu apasanaa ngangarandaku.
119.144: Manga tuturamu abanara saʼumurua; dhawuaku katau mamudhaakana kudhadhi.
119.145: Iaku kugora tee mpuu-mpuuna incaku; lawaniakumo, e KAWASANA OPU. Iaku bhekuosea manga katotapumu.
119.146: Iaku kugora i Ingkoo; pasalaamatiaku, mamudhaakana bhekukenia mpuu-mpuu manga tuturamu.
119.147: Indapo raneeooge, kubhangumo tee kugora kuemani tulungi; iaku kuharapu i firimanimu.
119.148: Samaloa inda kukole mamudhaakana amembali kufikiria mpuu-mpuu o firimanimu.
119.149: Maasangia urangoa o doʼaku apokana tee kaasimu molagina. E KAWASANA OPU, padhadhiaku apokana tee kaʼadilimu.
119.150: Manga mia mopajereaku tee haejati madhaki amakasumo; manga incia amaridho minaaka i hukumumu.
119.151: Maka Ingkoo umakasu, e KAWASANA OPU, tee bhari-bharia parintamu abanara.
119.152: Minaaka i piamo itu kumataua minaaka i manga tuturamu ande Ingkoo padhamo upatotapuakea to saʼumurua.
119.153: Kamatamea o kanarakaaku tee upasalaamatiakumo, roonamo inda kumalinguakea o hukumumu.
119.154: Ewaakea o parakaraku tee upabebasiaku, padhadhiaku apokana mboomo janjimu.
119.155: Kasalaamatimu sumai amaridho minaaka i manga mia madhaki roonamo manga incia inda apeelo katotapumu.
119.156: Tapanamo kaoge o rahumatimu, e KAWASANA OPU! Padhadhiaku apokana mboomo manga tuturamu.
119.157: Abhari o mia mopajereaku tee momusuiaku, maka inda kusaladhala minaaka i manga tuturamu.
119.158: Iaku kumarikaia manga pande hiaanati sumai, roonamo manga incia inda aose firimanimu.
119.159: Kamatea tapanamo kaasiku tee manga kasameamu, e KAWASANA OPU! Jagania o inyawaku apokana tee kaasimu molagina.
119.160: Bhari-bharia ipogauakamu atotuu, tee bhari-bharia tuturamu mobanara sumai abakaa saʼumurua.
119.161: Manga kaogesa apajereaku inda tee sababuna, maka tangkanamo firimanimu imaekaku.
119.162: Janjimu apewauaku kukaunde-unde, mboomo mia mopotibhaakana harataa mobhari minaaka i potimbea.
119.163: Bhari-bharia kagau-gau kubancia, maka o hukumumu kumaasiakea.
119.164: Pitu mpearo saeo kupujiko, roonamo tuturamu moʼadili.
119.165: Mia momaasiakana hukumumu aʼamani tee amasanaa o dhadhina, inda dhaangia giu momembalina imandawuakana manga incia.
119.166: Iaku kuantagi kasalaamati minaaka i Ingkoo, e KAWASANA OPU, tee manga parintamu kupewaua.
119.167: Iaku kutaʼatia manga tuturamu, tee kumaasiakea tee mpuu-mpuuna incaku.
119.168: Iaku kutaʼati manga kasameamu tee tuturamu, roonamo ukamatea sagala giu ipewauku.
119.169: Maasangia o goraku akawa i Ingkoo, e KAWASANA OPU; dhawuaku maʼana mopokanana tee janjimu.
119.170: Taroakamo iemaniku akawa i Ingkoo; pasalaamatiaku apokana tee janjimu.
119.171: Taroakamo bhiwiku sadia apujiko, roonamo padhamo uadhariakaaku manga katotapumu.
119.172: Taroakamo o dhelaku alaguaka janjimu, roonamo bhari-bharia parintamu abanara.
119.173: Taroakamo limamu sadia atulungiaku, roonamo iaku padhamo kupili manga kasameamu.
119.174: Iaku kupemeliliaka kasalaamati minaaka i Ingkoo, e KAWASANA OPU, tee o hukumumu apaunde-undeaku.
119.175: Taroakamo kudhadhi, mamudhaakana kupujiko, tee maasangia manga tuturamu atulungiaku.
119.176: Iaku kusaladhala mboomo dumba momambuu; sumaimo uumbamo tee upokawaaka bhatuamu, roonamo inda kumalinguakea manga parintamu.

120.1: Laguna ziara. I nuncana kanarakaaku kugora i KAWASANA OPU, tee Incia alawaniaku.
120.2: "E KAWASANA OPU, maasangia urambasakaaku minaaka i bhiwi mogau-gau tee dhela mopekatipu."
120.3: Opea bheidhawuakana to ingkoo, tee opea bheiranganina to ingkoo, e pande tipu?
120.4: Samia suludadu bheapanako tee pana momatadha tee atunuakako tee weona waa!
120.5: Kucilakamo roonamo kumboore mboomo samia dhaga i Mesekh, tee tabeana kumboore i tanga-tangana kemana miana Kedar!
120.6: Amangengemo laulau kumboore kupoose tee manga mia mobancina dhadhi pomalape.
120.7: Iaku gauku kudhadhi pomalape, maka ande kupogau mamudhaakana ingkita tadhadhi pomalape, manga incia gauna apotimbe.

121.1: Laguna ziara. Iaku kupotingara i manga gunu, minaaka iapai bheakawa o katulungi to iaku?
121.2: Katulungiku aumba minaaka i KAWASANA OPU, mopadhaangiana laiana tee alamu.
121.3: Incia inda bheataroakako usindoli; Incia mojaganiko tee inda akole.
121.4: Satotuuna, Incia mojaganina Israel inda bheamangkoo matana atawa atokole.
121.5: KAWASANA OPU mojaganiko, KAWASANA OPU o peulusamu i weta kaanamu.
121.6: Matanaeo inda bheapacilakako i wakutuuna eo, atawa o bula i wakutuuna amalo.
121.7: KAWASANA OPU bheajaganiko minaaka i balaa, Incia bheajagani inyawamu.
121.8: KAWASANA OPU bheajaganiko wakutuuna uumba tee ulingka, pepuu sii-sii sakawana saʼumurua.

122.1: Laguna ziarana Daud. Iaku kukaunde-unde wakutuuna o mia apogau tee iaku, "Mai talingkaaka i Bhanuana KAWASANA OPU!"
122.2: Sii-sii aemami akakaro i bhambana lawamu, e Yerusalem!
122.3: Yerusalem padhamo atopakaro amembali kota mototapi momakaa tee momatangka.
122.4: Iwe siimo manga lipu aziara, siitumo uumatina manga lipu ipilina KAWASANA OPU, to aumba asukuru i Incia mboomo manga tutura mopadhana iparintaakana to miana Israel.
122.5: Iwe siimo manga rajana Israel, siitumo manga siwuluna Raja Daud auncura i kauncuramakana tee adhawuaka kambotuna moʼadili to lipuna.
122.6: Doʼamo to kasanaana Yerusalem, "Maasangia bhari-bharia mia momaasiakako apotibhaaka kaʼamani.
122.7: Maasangia dhaangia tee kasanaa i nuncana lipumu, tee kaʼamani i nuncana manga bentemu."
122.8: Rampaakanamo manga witinaiku tee manga sabhangkaku momboorena iwe sumai, iaku bhekupogau, "Maasangia umasanaa!"
122.9: Rampaakanamo Bhanuana KAWASANA OPU, Aulataʼalata dhaangia iwe sumai, iaku bhekupeeloakako kalape.

123.1: Laguna ziara. I Ingkoomo kupotingara, e Ingkoo mokokauncuramakana i sorogaa!
123.2: Kamatea, mboomo samia bhatua umane moposaronakana i opuna, tee mboomo samia bhatua bhawine moposaronakana i opuna bhawine, mboo siitumo ingkita taposaronaka i KAWASANA OPU, Aulataʼalata, sakawana manga maasiaka.
123.3: Manga maasiakapo e KAWASANA OPU, manga maasiakapo, roonamo amenturumo mpuu ingkami tatohina.
123.4: Ingkami tamambosuakamo kaele-elena manga mia moabhina karona amulia, tee kahinana manga mia mosombo.

124.1: Laguna ziara. Zaburuna Daud. Ande mencuana o KAWASANA OPU mopobhawana tee ingkita taroakamo miana Israel apogau mboo sumai,
124.2: ande mencuana KAWASANA OPU mopobhawana tee ingkita wakutuuna mangahumbuni bhalita,
124.3: sumaimo manga incia mangadhoku takadhadhi-dhadhi wakutuuna o amarana manga incia akarore-rore to ingkita.
124.4: Sumaimo o uwena mawa mangapaampe, tee o siwuluna uwena umala momaranca mangapatondu,
124.5: sumaimo o uwe mokalua-lua sumai akangkanaimo ingkita.
124.6: Atopujimo o KAWASANA OPU, inda mangapasaraaka tamembali kinandena manga incia.
124.7: Ingkita talapamo mboomo manu-manu minaaka i katapuna manga pande pekaose. Katapu sumai amabhotumo, tee ingkita uka talapamo.
124.8: Katulungita aumba minaaka i KAWASANA OPU mopadhaangiana laiana tee alamu.

125.1: Laguna ziara. Manga mia moparacaeana i KAWASANA OPU, mboomo Gunu Sion momatangka tee inda amembali atohudha, tee asadhaadhaa saʼumurua.
125.2: Mboomo manga gunu ajagani Yerusalem, mboomo uka KAWASANA OPU ajagani uumatina pepuu sii-sii sakawana saʼumurua.
125.3: Raja momadhaki inda bheakeni pamarintana saʼumurua i lipuna manga mia mobanara, mamudhaakana manga mia mobanara sumai inda aose to apewau kadhaki.
125.4: E KAWASANA OPU, maasangia upewau kalape i manga mia momalape, tee i manga mia momakatena incana.
125.5: Maka manga mia mosaladhala moosena dhalana karona mopekabelo-belo, bheapadhencua KAWASANA OPU apobhawa tee manga mia mopewauna kadhaki. Amasanaamo miana Israel!

126.1: Laguna ziara. Wakutuuna KAWASANA OPU apambuli kadhaangiana Sion amembali amalape pendua, ingkita mboomo mia mopongipi.
126.2: Wakutuu incia sumai o ngangata apotawa roonamo tamasanaa tee o dhelata asambo-sambo roonamo takaunde-unde. Sabutuna manga lipu mosagaanana apogau, "KAWASANA OPU padhamo apewau giu momaoge to manga incia."
126.3: KAWASANA OPU padhamo apewau giu momaoge to ingkita, sababuna sumai takaunde-undemo.
126.4: E KAWASANA OPU, maasangia upambulia pendua o kadhaangiamami momalape, mboomo umala i Tana Negeb akouwe pendua i bulaana wao.
126.5: Manga mia mohewina apoose atangi, naile itu bheatimpu tee asambo-sambo.
126.6: Mia molimbana minaaka i bhanua tee amaasi apoose abhawa wine to ahewia, dhaanamo bheambuli asambo-sambo apoose abhawa hasilina timpuana.

127.1: Lagu ziarana Sulaiman. Ande mencuana KAWASANA OPU mopakarona bhanua, asia-siamo kangulena mia mopakaroa. Ande mencuana KAWASANA OPU mojaganina kota, asia-siamo manga suludadu mojagania.
127.2: Asia-siamo ubhangu saeona, tee ukarajaa torotorosu inda uunto-unto sakawana pontanga malo, tee ukande kinande ipotibhaakamu minaaka i kanguleana bukumu tee ulilaho; roonamo Aulataʼala adhawu mia imaasiakana i wakutuuna akole.
127.3: Satotuuna ana umane sumai o rahumati minaaka i KAWASANA OPU, tee o antona kadhuma satotuuna saangu fahala.
127.4: Mboomo anana pana i limana samia suludadu, mboo sumaimo manga ana umane i wakutuuna amangura.
127.5: Amasanaamo mia mopabukena dhingkanana panana tee anana pana. Incia inda bheapotibhaaka kaea, wakutuuna apogau tee manga musuna i bhambana lawa kota.

128.1: Laguna ziara. Amasanaamo o mia momaekana i KAWASANA OPU, tee adhadhi aose parintana.
128.2: Ingkoo bheukande minaaka i hasilina kanguleana bukumu; ingkoo bheumasanaa, tee o dhadhimu bheamalape.
128.3: Bhawinemu bheamembali mboomo puuna angguru mosuburu i nuncana bhanuamu, tee manga anamu mboomo tunana puuna zaitun i saripina mejamu.
128.4: Satotuuna, mboo sumaimo rahumati bheadhawuaka to mia momaekana i KAWASANA OPU.
128.5: Maasangia o KAWASANA OPU abarakatiko minaaka i Sion. Maasangia ingkoo ukamata Yerusalem inda akakurangaaka opeopea saʼumurua dhadhimu.
128.6: Maasangia ingkoo ukamata manga opu-opuamu minaaka i manga anamu! Amasanaamo miana Israel!

129.1: Laguna ziara. "Pepuu dhaangia kumangura amenturumo mpuu apanarakaaku manga musuku," taroakamo miana Israel apogau mboo sumai,
129.2: "Pepuu dhaangia kumangura amenturumo mpuu apanarakaaku manga musuku, maka manga incia inda amembali ataloaku.
129.3: Manga incia apekambela awaaku mboomo tana ibhingkuni, amaarate tee amandala o kambelana awaaku mboomo pande poinawu mobhingkunina tana.
129.4: KAWASANA OPU abanara. Incia padhamo atumpo rabuta ibhokena manga mia madhaki mamudhaakana mangarambasaka minaaka i kuasana mia madhaki.
129.5: Taroakamo bhari-bharia mia mobancina Sion asowo tee amaea.
129.6: Taroakamo manga incia mboomo rumpu i bhawona padhana bhanua amalau wakutuuna tangasaana atuwu;
129.7: manga pande dhodhona gandum inda awelia, tee manga pande bhokena timpua inda abhokea rampaakanamo rumpu sumai inda akoguna.
129.8: Sabutuna manga mia molalo inda bheapogau, "Maasangia abarakatiko KAWASANA OPU, Ingkami tabarakatiko i nuncana sarona KAWASANA OPU."

130.1: Laguna ziara. Minaaka i mbolongana kanarakaa iaku kugoraakako, e KAWASANA OPU!
130.2: E Kawasana Opu, maasangia urangoa o suaraku! Taroakamo uperangoia opea iemaniku.
130.3: E KAWASANA OPU, ande Ingkoo utorotorosu uudhani dosamami, incema bhemomembalina abebasi minaaka i kahukumumu, e Aulataʼala?
130.4: Maka Ingkoo sadia usiapu to upekaʼamponi, mamudhaakana o mia amembali ahoromatiko.
130.5: Iaku kuantagi katulungina KAWASANA OPU, tee o janjina kuharapua.
130.6: Ngangarandaku aharapuaka Kawasana Opu alabhi minaaka i pande jagana kota mopemeliliakana akawa o wakutuuna matanaeo akotila.
130.7: E Israel harapumo i KAWASANA OPU! Roonamo KAWASANA OPU dhaangia tee kaasina molagina, tee Incia sadia bheamangapasalaamati.
130.8: Incia bhemopabebasina Israel minaaka i bhari-bharia kasalahana.

131.1: Laguna ziara. Zaburuna Daud. E KAWASANA OPU, iaku inda kusombo, tee inda kupandaʼente mia. Iaku inda kupajere manga hali momaoge atawa manga giu inda momentela to karoku.
131.2: Satotuuna, padhamo kupatanangi ngangarandaku, mboomo anaana indamo adudu maka dhaangiapo i nuncana sangoana inana, Umbe, ngangarandaku atanangimo mboomo anaana indamo adudu.
131.3: E miana Israel, harapumo i KAWASANA OPU, pepuu sii-sii sakawana saʼumurua.

132.1: Laguna ziara. E KAWASANA OPU, maasangia uudhani Daud, tee bhari-bharia kanarakaana inamisina.
132.2: Incia padhamo aposumpa i KAWASANA OPU, tee ajanji i Aulataʼala Momakaa isombana Yakub,
132.3: "Satotuuna, iaku inda bhekupesua i nuncana kema mbooresaku atawa kukole i kolemaku;
132.4: Satotuuna inda bhekutokole atawa amangkoo mataku
132.5: ande indapo kupotibhaaka tampa to KAWASANA OPU, tee saangu mbooresa to Aulataʼala Momakaa isombana Yakub."
132.6: Satotuuna, ingkita padhamo tarangoa o pokaiana tee Sorongana Pojanjia sumai i Bait Lahim, tee padhamo tapotibhaakea i Tana Yaar.
132.7: Maimo talingkaaka i mbooresana i Yerusalem! Maimo tasuju tee tasombaia i aroana kauncuramakana.
132.8: E KAWASANA OPU, pekadheimo ulingka i tampa mbooresamu, tee upobhawa tee Soronga Pojanjia, tandana Ingkoo ukokuasa.
132.9: Maasangia manga imamu sadia apewau kabanara, tee taroakamo manga mia mosaalihi asambo-sambo tee akaunde-unde.
132.10: Roonamo Daud, o bhatuamu, bholi umendeua o raja mopadhana ilantimu.
132.11: KAWASANA OPU padhamo aposumpa mpuu-mpuu tee Daud, tee Incia inda bheamalinguaka opea ijanjiakana, "Samia anamu minaaka i karomu bhekupamembalia raja."
132.12: Ande manga anamu akeniakea mpuu-mpuu o pojanjiaku tee ataʼatia manga parinta bheiadhariakaku to manga incia, sumaimo manga opu-opuana uka bheamembali raja sakawana saʼumurua."
132.13: KAWASANA OPU padhamo apili Sion, tee gauna apamembalia tampana mbooresana.
132.14: "Siimo mbooresaku sakawana saʼumurua, Iwe siimo bhekumboore roonamo kupeelua.
132.15: Iaku bhekudhawuakea bhaku motaralabhi-labhi, tee bhekupekambosuakea tee roti manga mia misikini.
132.16: Manga imamuna Yerusalem bheasusuaka kasalaamati moumbana minaaka i Iaku, tee manga mia mosaalihi bheasambo-sambo tee akaunde-unde.
132.17: Iwe sumakomo bhekuangka siwuluna Daud; Iaku bhekupamembali o siwuluna aparinta sakawana saʼumurua mboomo sulu momainawana torosu.
132.18: Manga musuna bhekupekaeaia, maka incia, bhekupakanaakea mahakota bhemokakila-kila i bhaana."

133.1: Laguna ziara. Zaburuna Daud. Kamatea, tapanamo kalape tee kangada ande manga witinai adhadhi apomaamaasiaka.
133.2: Giu incia sumai mboomo mina-mina mawondu mokoharagaa i bhawona bhaa, asiwulu apekabhaho jangku, i jangkuna Harun, kasiimpo asapo sakawana i bhorokona jubana.
133.3: Giu incia sumai mboomo alo i Gunu Hermon, mosapona i bhawona manga gunu i Sion roonamo iwe sumakomo KAWASANA OPU apasapo barakatina, siitumo dhadhi to saʼumurua.

134.1: Laguna ziara. Mai, pujimo KAWASANA OPU, e bhari-bharia bhatuana KAWASANA OPU molaianina i Bhanuana KAWASANA OPU i wakutuuna amalo!
134.2: Angkamea o limamiu upaporopea i tampa momangkilo, tee upujimo KAWASANA OPU!
134.3: Maasangia KAWASANA OPU, siitumo Incia mopadhaangiana laiana tee alamu, abarakatiko minaaka i Sion.

135.1: Pujimo KAWASANA OPU! Pujimo sarona KAWASANA OPU! Pujimea, e manga bhatuana KAWASANA OPU,
135.2: e manga mia molaianina i Bhanuana KAWASANA OPU i tanalapa i aroana Bhanuana Aulataʼalata.
135.3: Pujimo KAWASANA OPU roonamo Incia amalape, laguakamea manga lagu kapujia to sarona, roonamo sarona amakesa.
135.4: KAWASANA OPU padhamo apili Yakub to karona, tee o miana Israel apamembalia pewauana imaasiakana.
135.5: Satotuuna kumataua ande o KAWASANA OPU amaoge mpuu, tee o Aulataʼalata alabhi o kaogena minaaka i bhari-bharia dewa.
135.6: KAWASANA OPU apewau opea ipeeluna, malape i sorogaa atawa i alamu, malape i tawo atawa i andala.
135.7: Incia aumbaaka gawu minaaka i tapana alamu, Incia apatiumba bhibhito apoose tee wao, tee apalimba ngalu minaaka i tampana atodhika.
135.8: Incia mopekamatena manga anaana tumpe i Mesir, malape maanusia atawa o binata.
135.9: Incia mopadhaangiana manga tanda tee manga muuzizati i tanga-tangana miana Mesir, aewangi Firaun tee bhari-bharia pagawena.
135.10: Incia mopekatalona manga lipu tee apekamate manga raja momakaa--
135.11: siitumo Sihon rajana Amori, tee Og rajana Basan, tee bhari-bharia raja i Kanaan.
135.12: Kasiimpo adhawuaka manga lipuna Kanaan to apamembalia pusaka, siitumo o pusaka to miana Israel o uumatina sumai.
135.13: E KAWASANA OPU, saromu abakaa, e KAWASANA OPU, bhari-bharia siwulu bheaudania saʼumurua opea ipewaumu.
135.14: KAWASANA OPU bheaewaaka parakarana uumatina, tee amaasiaka manga bhatuana.
135.15: Barahalana manga lipu inda mosombako atokarajaa minaaka i bulawa tee pera, ikarajaana limana maanusia.
135.16: Manga barahala sumai akomuncu, maka inda amembali apogau; akomata, maka inda apokamata;
135.17: akotalinga, maka inda aporango. Manga incia inda dhaangia o poinuncana.
135.18: Bhari-bharia mia mokarajaana barahala tee bhari-bharia moparacaeaia bheamembali mboomo barahala sumai tee inda bheamembali apewau opeopea uka.
135.19: E siwuluna Israel, pekaogemo sarona KAWASANA OPU! E manga imamu, siwuluna Harun, pekaogemo sarona KAWASANA OPU!
135.20: E siwuluna Lewi, pekaogemo sarona KAWASANA OPU! E manga mia momaekana i KAWASANA OPU, pekaogemo sarona KAWASANA OPU!
135.21: Pekaogemo sarona KAWASANA OPU minaaka i Sion; Incia momboorena i Yerusalem. Pujimo KAWASANA OPU!

136.1: Sukurumo i KAWASANA OPU, roonamo Incia amalape, kaasina abakaa saʼumurua.
136.2: Sukurumo i Aulataʼalana sagala Aulataʼala, kaasina abakaa saʼumurua.
136.3: Sukurumo i Kawasana Opuna sagala opu, kaasina abakaa saʼumurua.
136.4: Incia mopewauna manga giu inda momentela, kaasina abakaa saʼumurua.
136.5: Incia mopadhaangiana laiana tee kalapena budina, kaasina abakaa saʼumurua.
136.6: Incia mobhakesakana ati i bhawona uwe, kaasina abakaa saʼumurua.
136.7: Incia mopadhaangiana manga kainawa momaogena i laiana, kaasina abakaa saʼumurua;
136.8: matanaeo to akuasai eo, kaasina abakaa saʼumurua;
136.9: bula tee kalipopo to akuasai malo, kaasina abakaa saʼumurua.
136.10: Incia mopekamatena manga anaana tumpe i Mesir, kaasina abakaa saʼumurua;
136.11: tee o miana Israel apalimbaia minaaka i Mesir, kaasina abakaa saʼumurua;
136.12: tee limana momakaa tee kuasana momaoge, kaasina abakaa saʼumurua.
136.13: Incia aweta Tawo Towu Lambe apaporuawetaia, kaasina abakaa saʼumurua;
136.14: tee apapolimba miana Israel adhala i tanga-tangana, kaasina abakaa saʼumurua;
136.15: maka Incia apatondu Firaun tee tantarana i nuncana Tawo Towu Lambe, kaasina abakaa saʼumurua.
136.16: Incia akapalai uumatina alaloi tana matuu, kaasina abakaa saʼumurua.
136.17: Incia apekatalo manga raja momakaa, kaasina abakaa saʼumurua;
136.18: tee apekamate manga raja momulia, kaasina abakaa saʼumurua;
136.19: siitumo Sihon, rajana miana Amori, kaasina abakaa saʼumurua;
136.20: tee Og, rajana Basan, kaasina abakaa saʼumurua;
136.21: tee adhawuakea o lipuna manga incia apamembalia pusakana uumatina, kaasina abakaa saʼumurua;
136.22: amembali pusaka to miana Israel o bhatuana sumai, kaasina abakaa saʼumurua.
136.23: Incia inda mangamalinguaka wakutuuna tee masaʼalata, kaasina abakaa saʼumurua;
136.24: tee mangarambasaka minaaka i limana musu, kaasina abakaa saʼumurua.
136.25: Incia mopakandena bhari-bharia mahaluku, kaasina abakaa saʼumurua.
136.26: Sukurumo i Aulataʼala moparintana i laiana, kaasina abakaa saʼumurua.

137.1: I bhiwina umala Babel, iwe sumakomo ingkami tauncura tee tatangi ande taudhani Sion, mbooresana miana Israel.
137.2: I manga puuna gandarusa i tampa sumai, ingkami tapaloe kecapimami
137.3: roonamo iwe sumai manga miana Babel mangataangi tee atumpu ingkami talaguakea, mia mopisakina ingkami manga tumpu talaguakea manga lagu kaunde-unde, pogauna, "Laguakamo to ingkami sala saangu lagu minaaka i Sion."
137.4: Tuaapa amembali ingkami talaguaka lagu to KAWASANA OPU i lipu dhaga?
137.5: E Yerusalem, ande kumalinguakako, taroakamo limaku indamo amembali amagasiaaka kecapi!
137.6: Taroakamo dhelaku indamo amembali alagu ande kumalinguakako, tee ande inda kupamembali Yerusalem tampa ikaunde-undeakaku mpuu.
137.7: E KAWASANA OPU, udhania o miana Edom, i wakutuuna Yerusalem atopahancuru, manga incia apogau, "Patobhatamea! Patobhatamea sakawana i tana!"
137.8: E raʼeatina Babel, ingkomiu bheutopabinasa! Amasanaamo mia mobalasina ingkomiu roonamo pewaumu momadhaki i ingkami.
137.9: Amasanaamo mia morakona manga anaana maidhiidhimiu tee arambitakea i bhatu!

138.1: Zaburuna Daud. Iaku bhekusukuru i Ingkoo, E KAWASANA OPU, tee mpuu-mpuuna incaku. Iaku bhekulaguaka manga lagu kapujia to Ingkoo i aroana manga malaaʼekati.
138.2: Iaku bhekusuju tee kusomba kupoaro i Bhanuamu momangkilo tee kusukuru poose kupuji saromu roonamo kaasimu molagina tee umembali utoparacaea, sababuna Ingkoo padhamo ususuaka saromu tee janjimu alabhi minaaka i opeopeapo uka.
138.3: I eona kugora, Ingkoo ulawaniaku, tee Ingkoo upekatangka incaku tee kakaamu.
138.4: Bhari-bharia raja i alamu bheapuji Ingkoo, e KAWASANA OPU, roonamo manga incia padhamo arangoa manga janji ipakawaakamu.
138.5: Manga incia bhealaguaka opea mopadhana ipewauna KAWASANA OPU roonamo amaoge o kamuliangina KAWASANA OPU.
138.6: Moomini KAWASANA OPU sumai amalanga, maka Incia akamata mia momaidhiidhi, sainamo mia mosombo akamatea minaaka i karidhoana.
138.7: Moomini kudhadhi i nuncana kanarakaa, Ingkoo upotaangiaka dhadhiku; Ingkoo upaulu limamu to ubhali pamuruna manga musuku, tee o lima kaanamu mopasalaamatiaku.
138.8: KAWASANA OPU bheapamando haejatina to dhadhiku; E KAWASANA OPU, kaasimu abakaa saʼumurua; bholi uunto upewau sagala giu mopadhana ipewaumu to uumatimu.

139.1: To kapalana molaguna. Zaburuna Daud. E KAWASANA OPU, Ingkoo utilikiaku tee umatauaku.
139.2: Ingkoo umataua bhari-bharia ipewauku, tee Ingkoo umatau opea ifikiriku minaaka i karidhoana.
139.3: Ingkoo utilikiaku wakutuuna kulingka tee kupotidhole, tee umataua bhari-bharia lingkaaku.
139.4: Moomini indapo kupogau, satotuuna Ingkoo umataumea bhari-bharia bheipogauakaku, e KAWASANA OPU.
139.5: Ingkoo ujaganiaku minaaka i bhari-bharia singku, tee ujaganiaku tee kuasamu.
139.6: Tee katau incia sumai inda amentela mpuu to karoku, tee inda akawa i fikiriku sababuna amalanga mpuu.
139.7: Iapai bhekulingka mamudhaakana kumaridho minaaka i rohimu? Iapai bhekupalai mamudhaakana kumaridho minaaka i karomu?
139.8: Ande kupene i laiana, Ingkoo dhaangia iwe sumai. Ande kukole i duniana mia mate, iwe sumai uka Ingkoo udhaangia.
139.9: Ande kupene i laiana kupolaka tee panina matana eo wakutuuna abhete, tee kumboore i tampana matanaeo atondu,
139.10: iwe sumai Ingkoo upobhawa tee iaku, tee o lima kaanamu bhemopekatangkaaku.
139.11: Ande kupogau, "Satotuuna o kalalanda bheasalibumbungiaku, tee o kainawa i saripiku bheamembali kalalanda,"
139.12: sumaimo o kalalanda uabhia mencuana giu momalalanda to Ingkoo, tee o malo mboomo kainawana pontanga eo, roonamo kalalanda uabhia mboomo kainawa to karomu.
139.13: Roonamo Ingkoo mopadhaangiana bhari-bharia parewana badaku; Ingkoo mopebhanguiaku i nuncana kadhumana inaku.
139.14: Iaku kusukuru i Ingkoo roonamo upadhaangiaaku tee cara inda momentela. Bhari-bharia ipewaumu inda amentela, tee atotuu-totuu kumataua o giu incia sumai.
139.15: Manga bukuku ukamatea, wakutuuna upadhaangiaaku i tampa rahasia, tee upebhanguiaku i wetana alamu moporitambena mpuu.
139.16: Ingkoo ukamataaku wakutuu dhaangiapo kumembali satongka raa, tee i nuncana kitabimu bhari-bharia giu incia sumai padhamo atoburi to eo-eona mopadhana ipatantuakamu to iaku wakutuuna indapo aumba saangu eo minaaka i manga incia.
139.17: Amarasai mpuu o fikirimu, e Aulataʼala, soo mpuu amarasai kumaʼanaia! Abhari mpuu o fikirimu!
139.18: Ande amembali kugagaria, kabharina alabhi minaaka i kabharina bhone, tee wakutuuna kuunto kugagaria, iaku dhaangiapo uka kupobhawa tee Ingkoo.
139.19: E Aulataʼala, maasangia Ingkoo upabinasa manga mia madhaki, tee upekaridhoakaaku manga pande pekamatena mia!
139.20: Manga incia apogauakako madhaki, tee asia-sia asomboaka karona to aewangiko.
139.21: E KAWASANA OPU, kubancia o mia mobanciko, kumarikaia o mia moewangiko!
139.22: Manga incia kubancia! Kubancia mpuu tee kuabhia mboomo musu!
139.23: E Aulataʼala, parakisaakumo tee umataumo ngangarandaku; ujiakumo tee umataumea o fikiriku.
139.24: Kamatamea ara dhaangia o kadhaki i nuncana karoku, tee ususuakaakumo dhala mobakaa.

140.2: E KAWASANA OPU, maasangia utulungiaku minaaka i mia madhaki, tee ujaganiaku minaaka i mia masega.
140.3: Manga incia ahaejatiaka kadhaki i nuncana ngangarandana, tee saesaeo apadhaangia manga potimbea.
140.4: Manga incia apekatadha dhelana mboomo ulo, pogauna manga incia mboomo racuna ulo mokobisa. Sela
140.5: E KAWASANA OPU, jaganiaku minaaka i kuasana mia mokodosa, tee ujaganiaku minaaka i mia masega, mohaejatina to apekandawuaku.
140.6: Mia mosombo abuniaka katapu to iaku. Manga incia abhakesaka jarina i bhiwina dhala, tee sakaaratea dhala manga incia ataakaaku katapu. Sela
140.7: Iaku kupogau tee KAWASANA OPU, "Ingkoomo Aulataʼalaku, perangoimea opea iemaniku e KAWASANA OPU!"
140.8: E KAWASANA OPU, e Aulataʼalaku, Ingkoomo o kasalaamatiku tee kakaaku, Ingkoo padhamo ujagani bhaaku i eona potimbea.
140.9: E KAWASANA OPU, bholi uose peeluana mia madhaki, bholi uperangoia o haejati madhakina manga incia, mamudhaakana inda asomboaka karona. Sela
140.10: Maasangia o racu mominaakana i bhiwina apatondu manga mia madhaki molibuaku.
140.11: Taroakamo manga incia apakowaoakea weona waa, tee abhanakea i nuncana waa tee i bhalo mandala imateaka, sabutuna inda amembali alimba pendua.
140.12: Manga pande fitanaa inda bheadhadhi malape i dunia, tee o mia mopewauna kasega bheaosea balaa.
140.13: Iaku kumataua ande o KAWASANA OPU bheaewaaka hakuna mia motopisaki, tee adhawu kaʼadili to mia momisikini.
140.14: Atantumo o mia mobanara bheapuji saromu, tee o mia momakatena totona incana bheamboore i aroamu.

141.1: Zaburuna Daud. E KAWASANA OPU, iaku kugora i Ingkoo, umbamo pekadhei! Rangomea o doʼaku wakutuuna kugora i Ingkoo.
141.2: Maasangia o doʼaku amembali pasombaa mboomo dhupa i aroamu, tee limaku motoangkana mboomo pasombaa i wakutuuna konowia.
141.3: E KAWASANA OPU, jagania muncuku, tee kamatea bhiwiku.
141.4: Bholi utaroakea incaku aose giu momadhaki to kupewau manga giu mokodosa tee manga mia mopewauna kadhaki; bholi utaroakaaku kukande kinandena kariaana manga incia.
141.5: Taroakamo mia mobanara atapaaku to audhaniaku; taroakamo mia motaʼatiko ahukumuaku ande kupewau kasalaha, ancosala o bhaaku amendeu atarima mina minaaka i mia mobanara. Maka iaku sadhaadhaa kudoʼa kuewangi pewauna momadhaki manga mia madhaki sumai.
141.6: Wakutuuna haakimuna manga incia atudhaakea minaaka i pimpina gunu bhatu, sumaimo manga incia bheamataua ande manga pogauku abanara.
141.7: Mboomo bhatu apaporua wetaia tee apahancurua i tana, mboomo sumai uka bukuna manga incia bheamantale i ngangana koburu.
141.8: Maka, mataku atonto i Ingkoo, e KAWASANA OPU, Aulataʼala isombaku; Ingkoomo peulusaku, bholi utaroakaaku kubinasa!
141.9: Maasangia ujaganiaku minaaka i katapu itaana manga incia, tee minaaka i katapuna manga mia mopewauna kadhaki.
141.10: Taroakamo manga mia madhaki sumai apesua i nuncana katapu itaana karona, sainamo karoku samia kulaloia tee inda akangkanaiaku.

142.1: Lagu kaadharina Daud wakutuuna incia apalaiaka Saul tee aopo i nuncana lia. Saangu doʼa.
142.2: Tee suara makaa kugora i KAWASANA OPU; tee suara makaa kuemani kaasi i KAWASANA OPU.
142.3: I aroana kupeenci, kupaumbaakea bhari-bharia kanarakaaku i Incia.
142.4: Wakutuuna amate akalaku, Ingkoo umataua o dhalaku. I dhala bheilaloiku manga musuku abuniaka katapu to iaku.
142.5: Poilimo i weta kaanaku tee kamatea, inda samia uka mokamataaku. Inda dhaangia tampana peulusaku, tee inda samia uka mofaduliakaaku.
142.6: E KAWASANA OPU, iaku kugora i Ingkoo. Pogauku, "Ingkoomo tampana peulusaku, tee tangkanamo Ingkoo ifaraluuku i nuncana dhadhiku sii."
142.7: Perangoia o doʼaku roonamo indamo tee kakaana o bukuku. Pasalaamatiaku minaaka i manga musu mosikisaaku roonamo manga incia alabhi kakaana minaaka i iaku.
142.8: Palimbaaku minaaka i katorongku, mamudhaakana kumembali kusukuru i Ingkoo. Manga mia mosaalihi bheaporomu tee iaku to tapuji saromu, roonamo Ingkoo padhamo upewau malape i iaku.

143.1: Zaburuna Daud. Maasangia urangoa o doʼaku, e KAWASANA OPU! Perangoia iemaniku roonamo umembali utoparacaea; lawaniaku i nuncana kabanaramu.
143.2: Bholi ubhawa bhatuamu i pangadila, roonamo inda dhaangia mia inda mosala i aroamu.
143.3: Musuku apajereaku tee apatidhomuaku i tana; incia adhikaaku i tampa momalalanda mboomo mia momangengena momate.
143.4: Sababuna sumai, amate akalaku, tee ngangarandaku ameri mpuu.
143.5: Kutoudhanimo tee zamani momangenge, iaku kuudhania bhari-bharia ipewaumu, tee kufikiria bhari-bharia ipadhaangiamu.
143.6: Iaku kuangka limaku tee kudoʼa i Ingkoo, ngangarandaku apemeliliakako mboomo tana matuu apemeliliaka wao. Sela
143.7: E KAWASANA OPU, maasangia ulawaniaku madhei, roonamo amatemo akalaku. Bholi ubuniaka karomu minaaka i iaku mamudhaakana iaku inda mboo manga mia mosapona i duniana mia mate.
143.8: Parangoakaaku kaasimu molagina i wakutuu saeona, roonamo kuparacaea i Ingkoo. Susuakaaku dhala bheilaloiku, roonamo i Ingkoomo kupasaraaka ngangarandaku.
143.9: E KAWASANA OPU, pasalaamatiaku minaaka i manga musuku, i Ingkoomo tampaku kupalai to kupeulu.
143.10: Adhariaku kupewau opea ipeelumu, roonamo Ingkoomo Aulataʼalaku. Taroakea o rohimu momalape sumai akapalaiaku i tana morata.
143.11: E KAWASANA OPU, padhadhiaku roonamo saromu, tee i nuncana kabanaramu pasalaamatiaku minaaka i kanarakaa.
143.12: Roonamo kaasimu molagina, pahancurumea manga musuku, tee pabinasamea bhari-bharia mia mopanarakaaku roonamo iaku o bhatuamu.

144.1: Zaburuna Daud. Atopujimo KAWASANA OPU o gunu bhatuku, moadharina limaku to apotimbe tee kauna limaku to apoewangi.
144.2: Incia momaasiakaaku saʼumurua tee o bente potaangiaku, kota benteku tee mopabebasiaku. Incia o katangkesiku, Incia o tampana peulusaku, Incia apekatalo manga lipu tee adhikaia i tambena kuasaku.
144.3: E KAWASANA OPU, incema buaka o maanusia sumai mbakana uudhania? Incema buaka o maanusia sumai mbakana ufaduliakea?
144.4: Maanusia sumai mboomo wiina ngalu, tee o umuruna mboomo ngkamia-mia molalo.
144.5: E KAWASANA OPU, bungkalemea o laianamu tee usapomo, dhingkumea manga gunu mamudhaakana akoombu.
144.6: Pasapomea o bhibhitomu mamudhaakana o musu apogaa-gaa, rambasakamea o panamu mamudhaakana manga incia amambura.
144.7: Paulumea o limamu minaaka i kalangaana; pabebasiaku tee upasalaamatiakumo minaaka i uwena mawa, tee minaaka i limana manga mia dhaga!
144.8: Manga incia kapeeluana apekatipu, tee agau-gau wakutuuna aposumpa.
144.9: Iaku bhekulaguakako lagu bhaau, e Aulataʼala, tee bhekulaguakako manga lagu kapujia poose kutikiakako gambusu sapulu taliana.
144.10: Ingkoo modhawuna kamangantalo to manga raja, tee upasalaamati Daud o bhatuamu.
144.11: Rambasakaaku minaaka i hancuna mia masega, pasalaamatiaku minaaka i kuasana manga mia dhaga. Manga incia kapeeluana apekatipu, tee agau-gau wakutuuna aposumpa.
144.12: Maasangia manga anata umane mboomo penembula motuwuna amembali amaoge, tee manga anata bhawine mboomo manga arii makesa mobhelokina manga singkuna malige.
144.13: Maasangia manga kampirita abukeaka sagala giu hasilina alamu; maasangia manga dumbata i tana mokorumpu amembali rewuna mbaa, tee ajulu o kabharina amembali puluna rewu mbaa o kabharina.
144.14: Maasangia manga sapita ahanda ajulu o kaogena badana tee inda dhaangia momadhakina i nuncana kadhumana atawa amambuu. Tee inda atorango suara motomaporoakana inca i dhalana manga kotata.
144.15: Amasanaamo o lipu ibarakati mboo sumai! Amasanaamo mpuu o lipu mosombana i Aulataʼala, siitumo mosombana i KAWASANA OPU.

145.1: Lagu kapujiana Daud. E Aulataʼalaku, e Raja, iaku bhekupekalangako, tee bhekupuji saromu to saʼumurua.
145.2: Saesaeo bhekupujiko, tee bhekumuliangia o saromu to saʼumurua.
145.3: Tapanamo kalanga o KAWASANA OPU tee alaenga mpuu atopuji! Inda bhari-bharia sifatuna momaoge amembali amaʼanaia maanusia.
145.4: Manga mancuana bheapuji opea mopadhana ikarajaamu i manga anana sakawana bhari-bharia siwuluna amataua, tee bheapogauaka ande Ingkoo momakaana.
145.5: Manga incia apakoleleaka kaogesamu momuliana tee pewaumu inda momentela bhekufikiria i nuncana ngangarandaku.
145.6: Mia bheapetulatulaaka manga ipewaumu momakaana, tee bhekupakoleleaka kaogesamu.
145.7: Manga incia bheakaunde-undeaka kaogesana saromu roonamo pewaumu momalape, tee bheasambo-sambo roonamo kabanaramu.
145.8: KAWASANA OPU sumai abukeaka kaasi tee rahumati. Incia asabara mpuu tee o kaasina molagina amaoge.
145.9: KAWASANA OPU sumai amalape i bhari-bharia mia, tee rahumatina to bhari-bharia mahaluku mopadhana ipadhaangiana.
145.10: Bhari-bharia ipadhaangiamu sumai bheasukuru i Ingkoo, e KAWASANA OPU, tee bhari-bharia mia mosaalihi bheapujiko.
145.11: Manga incia bheapogauaka kamuliangina pamarintamu, tee apetulatulaaka kakaamu,
145.12: sabutuna o maanusia amataua o kaogesana manga pewaumu, tee kamuliangina pamarintamu amalanga.
145.13: Pamarintamu o pamarinta mobakaa, tee o kuasamu asadhaadhaa to saʼumurua. KAWASANA OPU amembali atoparacaea i nuncana bhari-bharia janjina tee bhari-bharia ipewauna abukeaka rahumati.
145.14: KAWASANA OPU atulungi bhari-bharia mia monarakaa, tee apekatangka bhari-bharia mia motungku.
145.15: Bhari-bharia matana mia aantaantagiko, tee Ingkoo uka udhawua kinande akawa wakutuuna.
145.16: Ingkoo ubungkale limamu, tee upadhaangiaaka opea ipeeluna bhari-bharia mahaluku mokoinyawa.
145.17: KAWASANA OPU abanara i bhari-bharia dhalana, amalape tee abukeaka rahumati.
145.18: KAWASANA OPU atulungi bhari-bharia mia mogorana i Incia, bhari-bharia mia mogorana i Incia i nuncana kabanara.
145.19: Incia apadhaangiakea bhari-bharia ifaraluuna mia momaekana i Incia; Incia uka arangoa o pekeena manga incia tee apasalaamatia.
145.20: KAWASANA OPU ajagani bhari-bharia mia momaasiakea, maka Incia apabinasa bhari-bharia mia madhaki.
145.21: Iaku bhekupuji KAWASANA OPU, tee bhari-bharia mahaluku bheapuji sarona momangkilo to saʼumurua.

146.1: Pujimo KAWASANA OPU! E inyawaku, pujimo KAWASANA OPU!
146.2: Iaku bhekupuji KAWASANA OPU saʼumurua dhadhiku, tee bhekulaguaka manga lagu kapujia to Aulataʼalaku kangengena dhaangia kudhadhi.
146.3: Bholi uparacaea i manga mokokuasana, i maanusia inda momembalina mopasalaamati.
146.4: Wakutuuna inyawana amabhotu, manga incia ambulimo i tana, tee i eo incia sumai uka bhari-bharia ihaejatiakana ailamo.
146.5: Amasanaamo mia motarimana katulungi minaaka i Aulataʼala isombana Yakub, modhikana harapuna i KAWASANA OPU, Aulataʼalana.
146.6: Inciamo mopadhaangiana laiana tee alamu, tawo tee bhari-bharia antona, tee sadhaadhaana akeni janjina to saʼumurua.
146.7: Inciamo moewaakana hakuna manga mia motopisaki, tee adhawu kinande i manga mia momaara. KAWASANA OPU apabebasi manga mia itorongku;
146.8: KAWASANA OPU abungkale matana manga mia mawilo. KAWASANA OPU aangka manga mia motungku; KAWASANA OPU amaasiaka mia mobanara.
146.9: KAWASANA OPU ajagani manga mia dhaga; Incia apambuli kadhaangiana manga ana maelu tee iaiaro, maka Incia apakacau haejatina mia madhaki.
146.10: KAWASANA OPU bheaparinta mboomo Raja to saʼumurua. E raʼeatina Sion, Aulataʼalamu akokuasa saʼumurua zamani. Pujimo KAWASANA OPU!

147.1: Pujimo KAWASANA OPU! Amalape mpuu talaguaka manga lagu kapujia to Aulataʼalata; umbe, amalape mpuu tanamisia tee alaenga to tapujia!
147.2: KAWASANA OPU apabhangu Yerusalem, tee aromusaka manga miana Israel mopadhana ibhanakana.
147.3: Incia apaunto manga mia momaporona incana, tee atange kambelana manga incia.
147.4: Incia atantuaka kabharina manga kalipopo, tee sumbe-sumbere adhawua saro.
147.5: Kawasana Oputa amaoge tee kakaana ataralabhi-labhi, hikimatina inda atokera-kera.
147.6: KAWASANA OPU atulungi manga mia motopisaki, maka Incia apaporitambe manga mia madhaki sakawana i tana.
147.7: Lagumo tee usukurumo i KAWASANA OPU! Laguakamea manga lagu kapujia tee umagasiaaka kecapi to Aulataʼalata.
147.8: Inciamo motutubhina laiana tee manga taʼina ngalu, mopadhaangiana wao i alamu, tee apatuwu rumpu i manga gunu.
147.9: Incia uka modhawuna kinande i binata, tee i manga anana manu-manu tongkaa mokaoni-onina.
147.10: Mencuana kakaana ajara ipeeluna Aulataʼala, tee uka mencuana suludadu momakaa imasinaina;
147.11: maka o KAWASANA OPU amaasiaka manga mia momaekaia, tee manga mia moharapuakana kaasina molagina.
147.12: Muliangia o KAWASANA OPU, e Yerusalem! Pujimo Aulataʼalamu, e Sion!
147.13: Roonamo Incia apekatangka manga kapasona bhambana lawamu, tee abarakati raʼeatimu tee manga giu momalape.
147.14: Incia adhawu kaʼamani i lipumu, tee apekambosuko tee gandum momalape.
147.15: Incia apakawaaka parintana i alamu, sumaimo firimanina lausaka atopewau.
147.16: Incia apasapo salju mboomo buluna dumba, tee o alo mokobhatu akamburakea mboomo rapu.
147.17: Incia apasapo waona esi mboomo katongkana roti; inda dhaangia momembalina motaraina kagarina.
147.18: Incia apakawaaka firimanina, sumaimo areremo o esi sumai; Incia atowii ngalu, sumaimo o uwe asiwulumo.
147.19: Incia apakawaaka firimanina i Yakub, tee manga katotapuna tee manga tuturana to Israel.
147.20: Incia inda apewau giu mboo sumai i lipu mosagaanana iapaipo uka; manga incia inda amataua manga tuturana. Pujimo KAWASANA OPU!

148.1: Pujimo KAWASANA OPU! Pujimo KAWASANA OPU minaaka i sorogaa, pujimea i tampa momalanga!
148.2: Pujimo Incia, e bhari-bharia malaaʼekatina, pujimo Incia, e bhari-bharia tantarana!
148.3: Pujimo Incia, e matanaeo tee bula; pujimo Incia, e manga kalipopo momainawana!
148.4: Pujimo Incia, e laiana momalanga, tee uwe i bhawona laiana!
148.5: Taroakamo bhari-bharia apuji sarona KAWASANA OPU roonamo minaaka i firimanina Incia apadhaangia bhari-bharia.
148.6: Incia uka motantuakana bhari-bharia giu i sorogaa tee i laiana to saʼumurua; opea ipatotapuakana abakaa.
148.7: Pujimo KAWASANA OPU minaaka i alamu, e manga nagana tawo tee saangua andala oge;
148.8: e waa tee waona esi, salju tee taʼina ngalu, tee garura moosena parintana Kawasana Opu;
148.9: manga gunu tee bhari-bharia kabumbu, manga puuna kau mokobhake tee bhari-bharia puuna aras;
148.10: binata maila tee bhari-bharia kadhambaaka, bhari-bharia binata mopondele tee manu-manu mokopani;
148.11: manga raja i alamu tee bhari-bharia lipu i dunia, manga kaogesa tee bhari-bharia haakimu i alamu;
148.12: manga anaana umane tee kabuabua, manga mancuana tee anaana apoose apuji Incia!
148.13: Taroakamo bhari-bharia apuji sarona KAWASANA OPU, roonamo tangkanamo sarona molaengana motopekalanga! Kalangana alabhi minaaka i kalangana alamu tee laiana.
148.14: Incia padhamo apajaea uumatina, tee apamembalia giuna kapujia to bhari-bharia mia mosaalihi, siitumo miana Israel, uumati momakasuna tee Incia. Pujimo KAWASANA OPU!

149.1: Pujimo KAWASANA OPU! Laguakamo lagu bhaau to KAWASANA OPU! Pujimea i nuncana poromusakaana mia mosaalihi!
149.2: Taroakamo Israel akaunde-unde roonamo Kawasana Opu mopadhaangiakomiu, tee taroakamo raʼeatina Sion akaunde-unde roonamo Rajana.
149.3: Taroakamo manga incia amanari to apuji sarona Kawasana Opu, tee alaguaka manga lagu kapujia apoose amagasiaaka ganda-ganda tee kecapi to apuji Incia,
149.4: roonamo KAWASANA OPU amaasiaka uumatina, tee Incia apakanaakea o mahakota kasalaamati to manga mia mopaporitambena karona.
149.5: Taroakamo uumatina akaunde-unde i nuncana kamuliangi, tee alagu asambo-sambo i kolemana.
149.6: Taroakamo manga incia apuji Aulataʼala tee ngangana, apoose akeni hancu momatadha ruaanguana matana i limana
149.7: to abalasi pewauna manga lipu i dunia sii, tee ahukumu manga raʼeatina lipu i alamu sii,
149.8: to abhokeakea ase manga raja, tee abhokeakea rante ase manga kaogesana lipu,
149.9: to ahukumu manga lipu mboomo mopadhana ipatotapuakana Aulataʼala to manga incia. Giu incia sumai amembali saangu giu momulia to bhari-bharia mia mosaalihi. Pujimo KAWASANA OPU!

150.1: Pujimo KAWASANA OPU! Pujimo Aulataʼala i tampana momangkilona! Pujimea i sorogaana momakaana!
150.2: Pujimea roonamo pewauna mosusuakana kakaana. Pujimea apokana tee kaogesana inda momentela!
150.3: Pujimea tee onina torompe, pujimea tee gambusu tee kecapi!
150.4: Pujimea tee ganda-ganda tee umanari, pujimea tee gambusu tee suli!
150.5: Pujimea tee ceracap mokonduu, pujimea tee ceracap mokondii!
150.6: Taroakamo bhari-bharia mahaluku modhadhi apuji KAWASANA OPU! Pujimo KAWASANA OPU!

1.1: Siimo manga opuana Isa Al Masi, siwuluna Daud, siwuluna Ibrahim. Minaaka i Ibrahim sakawana i Daud, manga sarona opuana Isa sumai mboomo sii:
1.2: Ibrahim akoanaakamo Ishak, Ishak akoanaakamo Yakub, Yakub akoanaakamo Yuda tee manga witinaina,
1.3: Yuda akoanaakamo Peres tee Zerah. Inana Peres tee Zerah isarongiaka Tamar. Peres akoanaakamo Hezron, Hezron akoanaakamo Ram,
1.4: Ram akoanaakamo Aminadab, Aminadab akoanaakamo Nahason, Nahason akoanaakamo Salmon,
1.5: Salmon akoanaakamo Boas. Inana Boas isarongiaka Rahab. Boas akoanaakamo Obed. Inana Obed isarongiaka Rut. Obed akoanaakamo Isai,
1.6: Isai akoanaakamo Raja Daud, Raja Daud akoanaakamo Sulaiman minaaka i iaiarona Uria;
1.7: Sulaiman akoanaakamo Rehabeam, Rehabeam akoanaakamo Abia, Abia akoanaakamo Asa,
1.8: Asa akoanaakamo Yosafat, Yosafat akoanaakamo Yoram, Yoram akoanaakamo Uzia,
1.9: Uzia akoanaakamo Yotam, Yotam akoanaakamo Ahas, Ahas akoanaakamo Hizkia.
1.10: Hizkia akoanaakamo Manasye, Manasye akoanaakamo Amon, Amon akoanaakamo Yosia,
1.11: Yosia akoanaakamo Yekhonya tee manga witinaina wakutuuna miana Israel atobhanaka i tana Babel,
1.12: Yekhonya akoanaakamo Sealtiel sapadhana miana Israel atobhanaka i tana Babel. Sealtiel akoanaakamo Zerubabel,
1.13: Zerubabel akoanaakamo Abihud, Abihud akoanaakamo Elyakim, Elyakim akoanaakamo Azor,
1.14: Azor akoanaakamo Zadok, Zadok akoanaakamo Akhim, Akhim akoanaakamo Eliud,
1.15: Eliud akoanaakamo Eleazar, Eleazar akoanaakamo Matan, Matan akoanaakamo Yakub,
1.16: Yakub akoanaakamo Yusuf, Yusuf sumai umanena Siti Mariam, minaaka i Siti Mariam sumai apalaahirimo Isa Al Masi. Maʼanana Al Masi "Raja ipilina Aulataʼala to apasalaamatiaka uumatina."
1.17: Jadi bhari-bharia siwuluna apepuu minaaka i Nabii Ibrahim sakawana i Raja Daud dhaangia sapulu pata siwulu, tee apepuu minaaka i Raja Daud sakawana wakutuuna miana Israel atobhanaka i tana Babel siwuluna dhaangia sapulu pata mia uka, tee mboo sumai uka minaaka i wakutuuna miana Israel atobhanaka i tana Babel sakawana Al Masi dhaangia sapulu pata mia siwuluna. Laahiriana Isa Al Masi 1:18-25 (Luk. 2:1-7)
1.18: Mboo siimo tulatulana laahiriana Isa Al Masi. Inana siitumo Siti Mariam, apoporae tee Yusuf. Maka indapo manga incia akawi, garaaka Siti Mariam abhawa-bhawamo. (Yusuf inda amataua ande Siti Mariam abhawa-bhawa roonamo kuasana Rohina Aulataʼala).
1.19: Yusuf poraena sii mia mobanara, jadi bheahaejatimo abhotuki Siti Mariam, maka inda amarobhoakea, mamudhaakana Siti Mariam inda amaea i aroana mia bhari.
1.20: Maka tangasaana afikiri giu incia sumai, malaaʼekatina Kawasana Opu apatiumba karona i nuncana pongipina tee apogau, "E Yusuf, anana Daud, bholi umaeka utarima Siti Mariam amembali bhawinemu roonamo o anaana ibhawa-bhawana itu minaaka i Rohina Aulataʼala Momangkilo.
1.21: Incia bheapalaahiri anaana umane tee ingkoo usarongiakea Isa, roonamo Inciamo mopasalaamatina uumatina minaaka i dosana manga."
1.22: Bhari-bharia sumai amembali mamudhaakana apamondoa Firimanina Kawasana Opu ipakawaakana i nabiina,
1.23: "Kamatea! Samia kabuabua bheabhawa-bhawa tee apalaahiri samia Anaana umane tee manga mia bheasarongiakea Imanuel," (maʼanana, "Aulataʼala apobhawa tee ingkita.")
1.24: Sabhanguna Yusuf minaaka i koleana, incia apewaumo opea iparintangiakana malaaʼekatina Kawasana Opu. Incia atarimamea Siti Mariam to amembali bhawinena.
1.25: Moomini mboo sumai, incia sadhaadhaa inda aporomuakea sakawana Siti Mariam apalaahiri anaana sumai. Salaahirina Anaana sumai, Yusuf asarongiakamea Isa.

2.1: Isa alaahiri i Bait Lahim i Tana Yudea i zamanina pamarintana Raja Herodes. Kasiimpomo aumbamo i kota Yerusalem pia mia ahalii nujumu minaaka i lipu maridho i Timbu.
2.2: Manga incia sumai apekaabha-abhamo kooni, "Iapai Rajana miana Yahudi siimpo molaahirina itu? Ingkami padhamo takamatea kalipopona abhete i Timbu tee ingkami taumba iwe sii mamudhaakana tasomba Incia."
2.3: Sanampuu Raja Herodes arangoa hali incia sumai, atokidhamo mpuu tee uka bhari-bharia manga mia momboorena i Yerusalem.
2.4: Sumaimo Raja Herodes aromusaka manga imamu maoge tee manga ahalii Hukumu Taurati miana Yahudi. Kasiimpomo aabhamo manga kooni, "Bhealaahiri iapai Al Masi?" Maʼanana Al Masi, "Raja ipilina Aulataʼala to apasalaamatiaka uumatina."
2.5: Lawanimo manga kooni, "I kampo Bait Lahim, i Tana Yudea roonamo mboo sumaimo motoburina i nuncana kaburina samia nabii kooni,
2.6: 'E Bait Lahim kota i Tana Yudea, sampeampearo ingkoo mencuana momaidhiidhina i tanga-tangana manga incia moparintana i Yudea, roonamo minaaka ingkoo bheabhangu samia momembalina kapala to mowuluna uumatiku Israel.' "
